name: Justice Democrats
subject: Diet Republicans
disclaimer_text: paid for by AIPAC and other right-wing,
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Earlier this week we reached out about a dangerous bill, HR 9495, that
would give the Trump administration sweeping power to shut down any
nonprofit organization he doesn’t like by accusing them of wrongdoing
without any due process.

Many of you spoke up and sent urgent messages to your members of Congress,
and thankfully, the bill failed to pass the House — but 52 Democrats voted
for it.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241117?refcode=em20241117-36158&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36158_1203867_VWjSPC&akid=36158%2E1203867%2EVWjSPC ]List of 52 Democrats who voted for HR 9495

These are Democrats bought and paid for by AIPAC and other right-wing,
corporate lobbies who were okay with granting Trump unprecedented and
unchecked power so that it could be used to silence the Pro-Palestinian
movement.

This bill was a far-right assault on our freedom of speech and right to
protest, and it’s appalling that any Democrat would support it. It’s yet
another example of why so many people are disillusioned with Democratic
leadership, who continue to abandon our shared values and move further to
the right.

It’s time to drastically transform the Democratic Party, and these diet
Republicans are a good place to start cleaning up shop. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241117?refcode=em20241117-36158&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36158_1203867_VWjSPC&akid=36158%2E1203867%2EVWjSPC ]Help Justice
Democrats recruit and elect the next generation of progressive leaders to
replace them in Congress and truly fight for our values: pitch in
$5 now →

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241117?refcode=em20241117-36158&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36158_1203867_VWjSPC&akid=36158%2E1203867%2EVWjSPC ]Contribute $5

— Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241117-36158-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36158_1203867_VWjSPC&akid=36158%2E1203867%2EVWjSPC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36158%2E1203867%2EVWjSPC

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603

name: Mary Peltola
subject: Friend, I’m telling you first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97244741/512772035/-1989993574?refcode=em-11.17.24-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzc1ZjcwYS00MGE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Le5GaZ-51jkILfB-NjbLQfDQeG4nnhAuqVWMpj0JxYw=) Friend, we’re getting new info about my race by the minute, and I urgently need your support before the next surge of details come through. **The most important thing to know right now is this: This race is far from over, friend.** Across Alaska, thousands of in-person votes remain to be counted, and they’re coming from areas with large Alaska Native populations (where I often perform best). On top of those in-person ballots, we estimate that there are still thousands of absentee and early votes that are yet to be counted. **_There is a LOT of counting left to do, friend. But the reality is, we likely won’t know who won until the ranked choice voting process plays out in the coming days._** Team Mary is prepared for _any_ and _all_ scenarios, and we’re ready to fight to ensure that every single vote is counted. **The catch is, while other campaigns are done fundraising, we still need to power this work – however long it takes.** **We can’t ensure every Alaskan’s voice is heard without support.** [**So please, will you split $3 between DASS PAC and I to ensure that we have the resources to keep this seat in the people’s hands? >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97244752/512772044/-1989993574?refcode=em-11.17.24-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzc1ZjcwYS00MGE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Le5GaZ-51jkILfB-NjbLQfDQeG4nnhAuqVWMpj0JxYw=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97244758/512772052/-1989993574?refcode=em-11.17.24-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzc1ZjcwYS00MGE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Le5GaZ-51jkILfB-NjbLQfDQeG4nnhAuqVWMpj0JxYw=)**

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for your journey to heaven?
body:
I often hear the question, “What will we do in heaven?”
I often hear the question, "What will we do in heaven?"
| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=744da455b77c494ab5315ca1104faf97&_t=th-d--jbta-7Kex1T6e5KMuYlVHmebZCPerkkREDKMpJcAycKfycdZrL7yHb0-iejAIpRp7_l4ojmf1KpASE3Po7leMugnSoHxRqg-s0oO4nfBqPzIZxn9L6eXA7FB6X)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=744da455b77c494ab5315ca1104faf97&_e=tuyKEmtp7-d6Q4Yew-DmW1YtoIh0iDVIHGiaoidR7D562pfTVWu9C3iTZNW04f2ve_ENNgVVFRNy2F7R1kmwb2EiCO22uU78ZEjoMp3NPh1g5vlAYKV0MzigQn0Xejs-Dr8C3Isvhh_IdaHjo3iBBMo5wpOylTkE1IR6rv1G0LJf4zcViPcEL2Z5YQ4f2nc50vfQKRRUD8XQvX7B__T9Bvv_zI5GCxg5WSuvVNfzOfSFzXym7SSy3UcN5haJieX6u1OccGAK4fHyjVGWGBRVU8I-1QcGT516QE5CUwvta1WPqkNnLqRDqFg9n4IqSxeIMONND2iOM7JbXXnP7u_Qp1b8LyJ0fLTkcQkVO0croDBxkyf3R_c_JJ3nIS8CWGD4uUiF4vZUNUPuF50LroXwKd5MCFaMJC3uduvq7i58CK0%3D)
Hello Friend,

I often hear the question, "What will we do in heaven?" Many imagine heaven as a place where we sit around on clouds, strumming harps. But nothing could be further from the truth.

The Bible gives us glimpses of a heaven filled with purpose and activity. Revelation 22:3 says, "His servants will serve Him." We will have meaningful work, free from the frustration we often face here on earth. There will be no more exhaustion or stress, only joy, as we serve the Lord.

Heaven will also be a place of joyful worship. Revelation 5:13 gives us a picture of all creation joining together to sing praises to the Lamb who was slain. Can you imagine what it will be like to be part of that heavenly choir?

In A Place Called Heaven, I explore 10 surprising truths about your eternal home, pointing to what the Bible tells us about our eternal home.
* What Difference Does a Future Heaven Make in My Life Today?
* Is Heaven a Real Place or Is It a State of Mind?
* Have Some People Already Visited Heaven?
* Do Christians Immediately Go to Heaven When They Die?
* What Will We Do in Heaven?
* Do People in Heaven Know What is Happening on Earth?
* Will We Know One Another in Heaven?
* Will Heaven Be the Same for Everyone?
* Who Will Be in Heaven?
* How Can I Prepare for My Journey to Heaven?

This book offers hope, direction, and clarity about what awaits those who follow Jesus Christ.

I'd love to send you a copy as a thank-you for your generous gift of $25 or more to Pathway to Victory. Your support helps us continue to pierce the darkness of this world by sharing the light of God's Word with many who desperately need hope.

Click here to donate and receive your copy: [https://secure.ptv.org/a-place-called-heaven-generous-gift-1](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=744da455b77c494ab5315ca1104faf97&_e=tuyKEmtp7-d6Q4Yew-DmW1YtoIh0iDVIHGiaoidR7D562pfTVWu9C3iTZNW04f2ve_ENNgVVFRNy2F7R1kmwb2EiCO22uU78ZEjoMp3NPh1g5vlAYKV0MzigQn0Xejs-Dr8C3Isvhh_IdaHjo3iBBMo5wpOylTkE1IR6rv1G0LJf4zcViPcEL2Z5YQ4f2nc50vfQKRRUD8XQvX7B__T9Bvv_zI5GCxg5WSuvVNfzOfSFzXym7SSy3UcN5haJieX6i5uuYozYkVHmbfiDNznnxnXwayk_kigQmrdha1x9YNlPEf9ba-GQ-r62f_CPTBUb1BNB5Qn-6B2d94ksk7xdWbuCh25KEaa-vS2anSFJqlBV2NoJXL0dh-VViT5XITGtC5WUH3Gekq4276GbzTKtR69z48S5DYEYGkbNf_XUsmQ%3D)

I hope this book creates in you excitement and anticipation for the eternal joy and purpose that awaits us in heaven.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

body:
I wish I had a better update, but this will be a knock-down, drag-out fight until the winner of CA-45 is decided.
and the winner of my election is...

| |
---
| | | Friend, the winner of my election is...

**Well, it 's too close to call!** I wish I had a better update, but this will be a knock-down, drag-out fight until the winner of CA-45 is decided.

Our fight to keep this seat in Republican hands and protect the House Majority is too important to give up before the race is called.

name: Team Harris-Walz
subject: Two reasons
body:
| | |
---
[ ](https://click.contact.kamalaharris.com/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtlGpBLNM9DdY-TrFptiHSq-L9c1ri9sVau_yBdU3bjlcgt11yaiPOxQivUjcB0wPJ7iVBr1KD5Kw_Au8YlZRNISvbRqmnpC5FHTydhRX9UzdPO5OFb8ro1RLgK5SB1PHGk_tR88FEYU8_tcCfXI1ekfJADp_KPGd7JVor3teve762tdfPTwuncN9SJyyXQWs2nBJOgtBPCsqYcAkW3RTCcuf5VkTAZCvIBiIGO4OH4VL-qIgnE-OrvAehn1ADI11MZWMHLHxdbUgCnWgzYe0rV3eA8bDSFln2mwhBVDdNiCQ/4bk/Es7f01AKTMCR8TlgIlc9bQ/h0/h001.hasRiG3eoZMDOwMd3WyojCg2KcBhNQ97bl_jfwRSqW4)
Peter, allow us to get right to it and explain why a donation to the Harris Fight Fund program is so important today. Donald Trump is on a spree of Cabinet nominations, elevating MAGA loyalists like Matt Gaetz to the top ranks of government. However, there are races that have yet to be called and these extremely close races are our best bulwark against a second Trump administration. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting **info@kamalaharris.com**.The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
clean_body: | | | Peter, allow us to get right to it and explain why a donation to the Harris Fight Fund program is so important today. Donald Trump is on a spree of Cabinet nominations, elevating MAGA loyalists like Matt Gaetz to the top ranks of government. However, there are races that have yet to be called and these extremely close races are our best bulwark against a second Trump administration. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for contributing today. Especially today. Team Harris-Walz | | | |

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 11/17/2024
body:
Colorado House Republicans celebrate elimination of Dems’ supermajority, plus all of Trump's picks
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**November 17, 2024** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST** **By Heidi Ganahl**
| | Dear friends,
Colorado conservatives celebrated a significant victory this week, successfully [preventing the Democratic supermajority in the state House](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). With the hard-fought wins of Rebecca Keltie and Dan Woog in House Districts 16 and 19, Republicans secured 22 seats, giving Coloradans a stronger voice against policies that threaten families and small businesses. These victories demonstrate the power of standing for lower taxes, reduced regulations, and common-sense solutions.
Meanwhile, President Trump continues to shape his administration with bold and unconventional leadership picks. Here's a full list of everyone he's handpicked so far:
**THE CABINET:** [Secretary of State](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.): Marco Rubio, [Secretary of Defense](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.): Pete Hegseth [Attorney General](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.): Matt Gaetz [Department of the Interior](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.): Doug Burgum [Health and Human Services](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.): Robert F. Kennedy Jr. Veterans' Affairs: Doug Collins [Homeland Security](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.): Kristi Noem [Energy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.): Chris Wright -- _**our very own from here in Colorado!**_ _*Still open: Treasury, Agriculture, Commerce, Labor, HUD, Transportation,[Education](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_
In addition to the 15 department heads comprising the core Cabinet, several other positions, such as the FBI director and the head of the Environmental Protection Agency, are frequently granted Cabinet rank and require Senate confirmation. However, other crucial roles within the Trump administration, like Elon Musk's position, do not require Senate approval and will not undergo the same vetting process.

**WHITE HOUSE STAFF:** [Chief of Staff](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.): Susie Wiles [Deputy Chief of Staff for Policy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.): Stephen Miller White House Counsel: William McGinley [Press Secretary](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.): Karoline Leavitt [Communications Director](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.): Steven Cheung Assistant to the President: Sergio Gor
Here's to a promising week ahead of more appointments, more good news, and more movement in the right direction for the country!
In liberty, Heidi Ganahl

| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=fbb9a2989fd04be08c18d23589e6a8a3&_e=lrn5Xt7XlEjTbtOBHB3bTtdueggiCuq7rFjSsYoUEFYGXIYakvlXaAYYRVtuOKjhYTMRgLt0vZbUBNtW3IDmTL5uOwp653UiWluDlYIxHIEhC9TNaNWCAW5toDgiIBY9AL4PdGbmO2DZS7siDnSAgLo0EUbnfZpP8-mmT8_ktqCMrCoj0q3-wSdyzR3ZXcE6JZR66kbfTHgiO-IURL1Fbbobbt-ZVSV35poj5p4NOWoayaf_JeurXEwTJsr8djo8ViQTf38nO_Gwic7CNQBH_FNvmgZUqL3TI6LevOKr9tV-b6iWc_MwKDgjvvSr1i9-tFNQGRvV9l3Ux_m72SEMk-JgFu5XzUuBtyvjl2k7OYLGPbXGKkhhz_KHkfkZz51rKRmJCDxvdzmORmJpNON9AG9XK6jPWatgZqK8L-QxqhzKTT5msd0wcHW-IhxJejy-)

| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=fbb9a2989fd04be08c18d23589e6a8a3&_e=lrn5Xt7XlEjTbtOBHB3bTtdueggiCuq7rFjSsYoUEFYGXIYakvlXaAYYRVtuOKjhYTMRgLt0vZbUBNtW3IDmTL5uOwp653UiWluDlYIxHIEhC9TNaNWCAW5toDgiIBY9AL4PdGbmO2DZS7siDnSAgLo0EUbnfZpP8-mmT8_ktqCMrCoj0q3-wSdyzR3ZXcE6JZR66kbfTHgiO-IURL1Fbbobbt-ZVSV35poj5p4NOWoayaf_JeurXEwTJsr8djo8ViQTf38nO_Gwic7CNQBH_FNvmgZUqL3TI6LevOKr9tWq8iwgdaLbW8t4rYN7EhuNVvad5zlIZM3zzXsKV6otEz_MpYdrlt65mVFcfmDGquLegnVBZGGbQz54SpfEV561td7RV0uvY5x6tqwPF2vDMbXmvmhAfP7od_wpX4AZUJ1DTRqYG9dBg1xO7-TKrnp2)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=fbb9a2989fd04be08c18d23589e6a8a3&_e=lrn5Xt7XlEjTbtOBHB3bTtdueggiCuq7rFjSsYoUEFYGXIYakvlXaAYYRVtuOKjhYTMRgLt0vZbUBNtW3IDmTL5uOwp653UiWluDlYIxHIEhC9TNaNWCAW5toDgiIBY9AL4PdGbmO2DZS7siDnSAgLo0EUbnfZpP8-mmT8_ktqCMrCoj0q3-wSdyzR3ZXcE6JZR66kbfTHgiO-IURL1Fbbobbt-ZVSV35poj5p4NOWoayaf_JeurXEwTJsr8djo8ViQTf38nO_Gwic7CNQBH_FNvmgZUqL3TI6LevOKr9tWM4K-WF8wIajgLrlooFttgIM36Yyp9axGRsa-pk0GNboZlnDAWMowSNShZP1Bdd0M8cuK4ybCrBKrtSqzJIUY-QR7ruALZ794j_IzbHlwtSUUi6IYq0ELLxcTNay_0xzIpUijgBaVOUO75OUjbR7l8) **The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." clean_body: | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | - | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." They're fighting radical doctors. #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Hi Friend,

THANK YOU!

I can’t tell you how much I appreciate the warm wishes you’ve sent my way for my birthday yesterday. Seeing the card you all signed was the best surprise. I feel incredibly grateful to have this phenomenal team with me through everything.

Having your support means more than any birthday gift, especially as we look toward a year that’s going to be, let’s face it, a wild one. Trump and his allies will be back in full force, and while that brings immense challenges, it also makes me appreciate this team even more. Because I know that together, we will not let up on Trump throughout his presidency.

While I’ve taken a little break this weekend to celebrate with my family, the work we’re doing together never stops. Knowing that you’re here, ready to face whatever comes next, means the world to me. I can’t wait to keep pushing forward together, every step of the way.

Thanks again for the kind words, and have a great night!

— Eric

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Real talk: Why are people still asking you for money?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends,
Election Day just happened. Donald Trump was elected President. We don’t know exactly what the future holds. So you may be wondering... Why are people still asking me for money?!
Well, let’s start here: One incredible thing about recent election cycles is the immense – and continuously growing! – power of grassroots fundraising.
It used to be the case that political campaigns were largely funded by wealthy individuals, PACs, or corporations writing big checks. But over the past decade, millions of people around the country have donated more than a billion dollars to campaigns – in increments of $5 given here or there, clicking on an email or a text message.
The rise of grassroots fundraising has some pretty amazing impacts on our politics. Many campaigns are funded in a much more democratized fashion nowadays, and many individuals feel invested in their leaders in a new way.
But one perhaps unforeseen impact is that now, online grassroots fundraising isn’t just a cool, new opportunity – it’s a must . Campaigns heavily rely on fundraising emails as a meaningful source of revenue to run competitive races.
And that is as true a week after the election as it was a week before the election . Meaning: Your inbox may very well *still* be full of fundraising emails.
To be clear: This is not one of those emails. I’m deeply grateful that my campaign benefitted from having a strong grassroots team contributing to our work, and I know that in the next election cycle, I will certainly strive to earn that support again. But right now, that’s not my focus.
So why am I still emailing you, and why are other people still asking you for money?
Let’s start with me. I’m emailing you because I care about you! This avenue of information sharing is important to me because it allows us to stay in touch – for you to hear about what I’m up to, and for me to receive feedback from the folks who are invested in this work. As we look ahead to the 119th Congress and how we’ll govern amid a Republican trifecta in Washington, these emails will be an important part of keeping our community together.
As for the rest of your inbox – there are several things to consider:
Right now, a number of races around the country have yet to be called, and those campaigns are fighting to fund voter outreach and recount efforts that are still so important.
Plus, like I mentioned, many campaigns depend on email fundraising to fund basic needs, like paying staff salaries or keeping the lights on in the office – and those don’t disappear the day after Election Day.
For those of us in the House, running every two years can mean that we essentially have to operate permanent campaign infrastructure to keep on doing this work – and winding things down just to ramp them up again can prove even more expensive than keeping things running all along.
And of course, many campaigns and political organizations understand that to truly engage voters, get more folks involved in the political process, and work towards the results we want, being present and engaged every day, all year round, whether it’s an “on” year or “off” year, is critical.
Those are just a few of the reasons you may still find fundraising requests in your inboxes. As always, decisions about who to support, and when, are personal and meaningful. As we all begin to navigate the way forward, I hope this email had some helpful or interesting information for you.
From me, you can expect to see fewer asks for the time being – and of course, when I do ask for support, I will always be honest with you about why.
That’s all for now, but I look forward to continuing to connect with you soon.
All my best,
Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Derek Tran
subject: NEW: We just took the lead!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Tran for Congress P

The day that the people became the rulers of this nation again. And exactly 8 years later, when President Trump returns to the very same steps where he first took the oath of office, YOU have a chance to be there by his side. It's your day. It's your celebration. And President Trump wants you there to soak it all in. After 4 long years, the greatest comeback in political history culminates in this very moment. Hundreds of thousands of PATRIOTS will be there to witness the moment that President Trump is sworn in as the 47th President. Will you be joining them, Friend? body:
[Thank you, Elon Musk!](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/GuryPHEI3-N1oPBU8_M3mA~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpHbTiP0TcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3RoYW5reW91LWVsb24tY2FyZC1hZWRnZS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWFlZGdlX25yc2NfQUZSJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTExNV9uYV90aGFua3lvdWVsb25jYXJkLXYxX0FGUl9ucnNjX25yc2MmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9ZnVuZHJhaXNpbmcmYW10cG9zaXRpb249NCZhbXQ0PTEwMCZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZVcDc3BjQgpnN4i0OmfAowHxUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

[](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/GuryPHEI3-N1oPBU8_M3mA~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpHbTiP0TcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3RoYW5reW91LWVsb24tY2FyZC1hZWRnZS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWFlZGdlX25yc2NfQUZSJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTExNV9uYV90aGFua3lvdWVsb25jYXJkLXYxX0FGUl9ucnNjX25yc2MmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9ZnVuZHJhaXNpbmcmYW10cG9zaXRpb249NCZhbXQ0PTEwMCZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZVcDc3BjQgpnN4i0OmfAowHxUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Fellow American,

name: Amanda Chase
subject: Special Election Update Coming THIS TUESDAY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
pay close attention
| | | | SPECIAL ELECTION DATE TO BE DETERMINED THIS TUESDAY
---
---
| Greetings!, This coming Tuesday, November 19 we should find out the date of the upcoming Special Election in Senate District 10, which includes Amelia, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Hanover, Powhatan and the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico.
So please stay tuned. Check your emails from me. You will have have 5 days between the announcement of the Special Election and voting in the Republican run-off.
Tuesday, the Senate District 10 Committee, composed of all of the unit chairs within the district will vote on the Republican method of nomination and a date.
I've always supported primaries, because they allow voters to quickly cast their vote and then be on their way. However, that option is not available with Special Elections.
The committee will either choose a convention, firehouse primary or Republican mass meeting. I've been told it will most likely be a Republican Mass Meeting in one location with multiple rounds of voting until the candidate reaches 50 plus one percent.
I'm hoping it's a firehouse primary so that you can vote and get back to your busy schedule. However, if a convention or mass meeting is chosen, there could be hours of waiting involved unless a candidate, hopefully me, wins on the first round of voting.

---
|
---
Based on internal polling, I am the front runner in Senate District 10. That said, the Richmond establishment is dumping thousands of dollars into one particular candidates race. So be on the look out for candidates that send out numerous expensive mailers. Where do you think they are getting their money?
I don't take money from PACs or lobbyists.
We the People are making a difference. President Trump's big win is a testimony that Americans are waking up and taking back their country from special interest groups, NGOs, and the lobbyist community.
The GOP is getting a welcome facelift and I've never been more encouraged.
You have another chance to make a difference. Please pay close attention to the vote that will take place in December.
Tuesday evening we find out more details. So please stay tuned.

---

| Greetings!, I am super excited to announce a number of meet and greets that my campaign will be hosting across Senate District 10. Here is our current schedule. If you would like to host a meet and greet, please reach out to Michelle at michelle@chaseforva.com.
Please take advantage of this opportunity. I want to hear what issues are important to you and how I can best put my 8 years in the Senate to work for you.
While we have a Special Election during the upcoming busy holiday season, I really hope you will take advantage of this opportunity to meet up.
I'm running for state senate in a Special Election to be held this December to fill John McGuire's term in the Virginia Senate to represent Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties.
We will fill you in on how to participate and vote in the Special Election in December and give you an opportunity to ask questions. I really hope you will save the date and join us.
---
|
---
There is no cost to attend this event.
If you are interested in sponsoring any of these meet & greets please click the sponsorship button below.
Please RSVP within 24 hours of the event so we can get an accurate count for refreshments.
Thank you! For God & Country,
---

| Greetings!, I am super excited to announce a number of meet and greets that my campaign will be hosting across Senate District 10. Please take advantage of the opportunity to introduce me to your friends and neighbors.
While we have a Special Election during the upcoming busy holiday season, you have an opportunity once again to choose your representation in the 10th Virginia Senate District. I really look forward to seeing you.
I'm running for state senate in a Special Election to be held this December to fill John McGuire's term in the Virginia Senate to represent Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties.
We will fill you in on how to participate and vote in the Special Election in December and give you an opportunity to ask questions. I really hope you will save the date and join us.

clean_body: Special Election THIS December | | | | You're Invited to meet Senator Amanda Chase | | RSVP ONLINE HERE SPACE IS LIMITED | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | == | Greetings!, I am super excited to announce a number of meet and greets that my campaign will be hosting across Senate District 10. Please take advantage of the opportunity to introduce me to your friends and neighbors. While we have a Special Election during the upcoming busy holiday season, you have an opportunity once again to choose your representation in the 10th Virginia Senate District. I really look forward to seeing you. I'm running for state senate in a Special Election to be held this December to fill John McGuire's term in the Virginia Senate to represent Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties. We will fill you in on how to participate and vote in the Special Election in December and give you an opportunity to ask questions. I really hope you will save the date and join us. | There is no cost to attend this event. If you are interested in sponsoring any of these meet & greets please click the sponsorship button below. Please RSVP within 24 hours of the event so we can get an accurate count for refreshments. Thank you! body:

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c671894-9fd0-4ed6-b0bd-f64c504774d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| We’re TIRED of seeing electoral maps look like this: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T71de985a-a079-4ef9-b727-dda1e4ddffe0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [END THE ELECTORAL COLLEGE →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0ff88c3f-1311-4627-b179-a66398f4ed8b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| So we have an important ask, Peter:
---
| Will you support the ending of the electoral college? [[SIGN YOUR NAME →]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c13fc12-dedc-4ffd-979e-e615fb11715f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Let’s be honest: The Electoral College makes our country more anti-democratic. Even though Donald Trump won the popular vote over Vice President Kamala Harris, we know that each presidential election will come down to a handful of battleground states. But Trump lost the popular vote in 2016 and 2020. In fact, Trump even attempted to exploit the Electoral College in his favor! We need to change that in order to preserve our democracy. And in order to make everyone’s vote count the same, we need to end the Electoral College. [Peter, will you take the next step by signing our petition to get rid of the Electoral College? If every Democrat who reads this signs their name, we’d have OVERWHELMING SUPPORT instantly.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta58de3f0-0b9f-4f77-a02d-88bf4df6dd02/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [SIGN YOUR NAME →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te33df92b-419f-473c-964b-01dffb8d01a7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you for reading, Team Blue Amp Action

| | |

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tca9c8592-f268-43f0-a869-092bc29dd493/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Southwest Plane Hit by Gunfire, Lottery Fraud, and a Flying Mattress Video
body:
A Southwest Airlines plane was hit by gunfire Friday night at Dallas Love Field Airport as it prepared for takeoff, prompting authorities to ground the aircraft and briefly close one of the airport's runways.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAUheGngS3WvYBjPDBUar206VSp3RCB6xgJhwhInLx9le7dP52j__tgDy6meD59upVMu8_ZChBqh7hDbYOL6WEVD-YIYUROBgeJoxh71fPFuBlAE_YgJeyDlnrQegZFqOQRnAMezXMMETWi0LLvBhjUCF64oPR8HBVTQCG2XLq2UKO7q3N65BuVzueVJ7O0dqlMvjAxMTFt29ZdqFTy1xbz-WmYmPxSYm2rq94VekI52ZqvxZP1ORCTr28fuNfvQn398GLCZYspxbofmILT6mL6-2r_xt-M-A0AAP__CBlbAw) | |
# Monday, November 18, 2024
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1977, the [National Women's Conference](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LFugzAQgOGnMRvIdxwYBg9d2NK1IzrwOVg1dgRWSN6-ave-wP9L39dtvnGIId0_eRdbXj7PqJFqgBqG2XGI75kqZxftRqjEgmlhxLGjrtoskNYLtZ4cEraeeu558AYc913vBKpgf2MAMADg0HaN0YZGvSI7GvwykiItLpR8NGWTIi8-fXznpxzNmvcq2q2Ux6naD4WTwum6rqacG-cUQ5ImH3eF08bJLTl_K5wklSPIqXBKXEJOHOsr75LOes3JyyFplRpGY6rDuscVYgxnbxTp-84h_i3LvwZPiz8BAAD__0cbXx8) began in Houston. Organized at the behest of President Gerald Ford, the conference submitted _A National Plan of Action_ for federal consideration in March 1978. Next spring, a Texas company is [launching a virtual power plant](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOhCAUheGnwQ7DveIABcU2drPtlgYBhQTFADvOvP1mpt_6JN9J_p_7fDcxxWP7NrvX7bnmGRlyCkBBzs7E9Jp55_TCnILOaxADKFQjH7ugnVpHJ4Ahs9IyxW4D3Kyw3C_AhZSqi_qNAYAEQDmMvWCCK2bROC7XRXHCmXex5dK34Jt_mrqmV3740tu8d0mH1s5Khi-CE8Hpuq7ehpKP90pwWn5rPHytBCdTWrTJE5w-Cj3z5QttwZc912ZapSbSLecteQpKIWNi6M9wdkW784opxXoThLNtNzF9ztu_NR4a_wIAAP__r_lhpw) by inviting its customers to enroll in a program that promises to save them money if they give up control of their thermostats. Let us know what you think about this idea in today's poll! Today’s sponsor is [The Voice of Martyrs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAUheGngS3WvYBjPDBUar206VSp3RCB6xgJhwhInLx9le7dP52j__tgDy6meD59upVMu8_ZChBqh7hDbYOL6WEVD-YIYUROBgeJoxh71fPFuBlAE_YgJeyDlnrQegZFqOQRnAMezXMMETWi0LLvBhjUCF64oPR8HBVTQCG2XLq2UKO7q3N65BuVzueVJ7O0dqlMvjAxMTFt29ZdqFTy1xbz-WmYmPxSYm2rq94VekI52ZqvxZP1ORCTr28fuNfvQn398GLCZYspxbofmILT6mL6-2r_xt-M-A0AAP__CBlbAw), supporting children persecuted for following Jesus.
* * *
Abilene ⛈️ 69/53° | Amarillo 🌧️ 58/42° | Austin 🌧️ 78/55° | Brownsville 🌦️ 89/70° | Corpus Christi 🌧️ 85/62° | DFW 🌧️ 72/57° | El Paso 🌤️ 63/45° | Houston ⛈️ 82/65° | Lubbock 🌧️ 64/49° | San Antonio 🌧️ 77/55° | Texarkana 🌧️ 76/57°
|
---
## NRG Launching Virtual Power Plant
Houston-based NRG Energy is partnering with Renew Home and Google Cloud to [launch a virtual power plant (VPP)](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOhCAUheGnwQ7DveIABcU2drPtlgYBhQTFADvOvP1mpt_6JN9J_p_7fDcxxWP7NrvX7bnmGRlyCkBBzs7E9Jp55_TCnILOaxADKFQjH7ugnVpHJ4Ahs9IyxW4D3Kyw3C_AhZSqi_qNAYAEQDmMvWCCK2bROC7XRXHCmXex5dK34Jt_mrqmV3740tu8d0mH1s5Khi-CE8Hpuq7ehpKP90pwWn5rPHytBCdTWrTJE5w-Cj3z5QttwZc912ZapSbSLecteQpKIWNi6M9wdkW784opxXoThLNtNzF9ztu_NR4a_wIAAP__r_lhpw) in Texas next year. The project aims to address the state’s ongoing grid reliability issues. The VPP will use AI-driven thermostats to optimize energy use and conserve power during peak demand, potentially [reducing consumption by up to 1 gigawatt](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGuqzAQRL_GdEbsYgIuXLyGLq-9JTLehVgyNjJWnPz9VdLfaprRzNH5uS9364OP-397sCmvLS3YoZIAEqaFrA_vRTVk1o40NGxg7EGjHtTQPAzxCr0lGtehxxtNq-XOOdI9IDrUW-PNZwwAJgCc-qEdu1HpzqElNW2rVkJ1TL6k3JYHF37Zawvv9OTcunQ0wTxKOS_R_xM4C5xrrS3ZYh3Hwpne0R7eXZ-qwJmjwDlyvT6Rd5k5cpU2ktxT2gPL0-YSOcsUJexVPs9T-ii_pwLnJhs6qw_BX7dRqG4_rA9fivKnlqfB3wAAAP__oqtmsQ)—enough to power 200,000 homes. The program requires customers to relinquish control of their thermostats but promises potential savings [through automatic, real-time HVAC adjustments](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7uO8yAUBOCngQ6Lcwy2KSj-hi5_u6XF5ThBS4JF2FzefuX020w332i-TuvJ55Jv5__-Sra_trqiRCUABCxr8rm8V8WTDTIZ4GRhHsGg0Urzi1WJzAZpMqhjCEhGTzqEGEDFZZoj8mwPDAAWAFxGPcxyVkZG9EktWzCKKUkp99qGfqFOL3_fyrs-qA2xXnmxl973Oxv_MXQMHRWKvdH3ECtDd9AMHcARI0P36QsQ56fwWTxy6z--iL0-qYm9-Ftn6HizaX_mUvJ9mpmS56vP5TPW_3z_sPgbAAD__0HTWlU). Critics of VPPs contend they are inherently volatile and unpredictable. In the spring, Renew Home will provide free smart Nest and Vivint thermostats to NRG customers who enroll in the program.
## Southwest Airlines Plane Hit by Gunfire
A Southwest Airlines plane was [hit by gunfire Friday night](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2uqzAQhJ8GOkfexY7twsVt0uW2p0QLXoKlDSDs_L39EelPOTOa0ej7ufZXypKX23-6c6zvae1Ro1EACnyfKMunN22Kg04BWo7gOggYrLHtHHWwfiKGzgfH2IHRaMkO3pB1aWTX5niMAYAHQN_Zk9POBD0iJeOnIZjGaE65rvupzlz5TWWSz_rk_TSu91biXOtWmu5fg5cGL7Qt_CpHdIi95lG4wUsiESrqW1fDQ4SrmnMtivK-CS2syvqo84tLPSzJCxcFYeLhrI0Fjxp5ssaMrEEjd0w4du0e0_bKIrmcXWP07U5Zvq_qn5ieEX8DAAD__8snaYY) at Dallas Love Field Airport as it prepared for takeoff, prompting authorities to ground the aircraft and briefly close one of the airport's runways. After a bullet entered the cockpit, the flight’s 99 passengers disembarked and boarded another plane. No one was injured, and the aircraft was removed from service until repairs could be completed. According to a passenger who spoke to the media, the pilot said there was “a rattle outside of the plane” and that they needed to return to the gate to [ensure the aircraft was safe to fly](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDHP2yAUAH8N3rDgAbEZGLp4S9eOFoFHjPpiLCBx8u-rdP_mk06n-3Ndrz5T3u-__QNdf6eyggDNpeRyXqPP9Fn1EN1NRCsHdHJS0oI12gybi8YgzAmDURewEyYllfFSBi_QxjAN2X1lUspZSpiVGScxaSsC-KjndLOaaYEx91LHvmHHt2-JPuWFdQzlMZDbej8aU78YLAyW8zzH_RZiOr-YwbLj2RgsVIInBsv9ufO2ld54yhUj39FXHj2Rb5zKC3nKSJH7XI9SOz_I78hbr8_wl8GiLtYKoxgsQ3XxODNRbpeJaXF_-Ez_i_qPi14O_gUAAP__swZpLA). Police believe the bullet that hit the aircraft was [fired randomly](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGvozAQBOBfYzpH9rLEduHiGrp37ZXRwtrB0gYi7Bce__7E9VfP6NNo_nw9vqhIWZ-_6ZVi-8nbAwygtlZb_2Aqcj6w4zgZDrZL0breBggDDt0SGfjuHQ3mDmxzYDYDc54cUgoZCLoSL8xa660F3w83ZxwGMwMx-jwFVGgSl7btt7akln6oZjm3T9pv8_bqJC6tvavqfykYFYzHcdyOTHSFCkbaW5klKRjXdFQFo2wziYKxbt9tOVJtmsr-FlqTXkrT06mf32sue9JMIlS1bJ-kc0nCV1PKmnSl86LAO21m44jI6gGd0egQ9eT7rGmigD1Ongm7PfL7KCKl3p1C83xRkX_j23_f_ET4GwAA___hh3Z1). An investigation is ongoing.
## Lawmakers File Nearly 1,700 Bills
New and returning members of the Texas House and Senate have filed nearly 1,700 bills as of Sunday ahead of next year’s session, which begins on Jan. 14. Legislators have filed bills to establish a universal school choice program, [increase funding for public schools](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2SqzAMhZ_GdM5gYQIULm5Dl9tuyQhbBM0anMEiP2-_Q4pstY0KzTefdM7XZbggR16v_3EhJ88pDVCC1cZo0w4BOb4GWwQ3lqEzBTnTVKaDrrZ1MTsM3RhG8iM0LdkaOt-eG3P2TVsT4oQFu0NmjGmNgbaqT03Z2K70gMG209hZZUsKLGk7yUxCT8xTfKU7bSefliK6WeSWVfVPQa-g92lZ9pXlxcsNvRyMgh73LLwq6HPaZdaeVtkw6s_6rdWRrpwjyr6Rgv54S0FvzDGqXwgfC37TlvXEkfTEWxY9coxZp0lDCfXHw3fSmXLmdNwoNhduD46R87lRtrwuyPGdQf4s9e7gJwAA__9VCnux), ban abortion-inducing drugs, lower property taxes, and prohibit foreign ownership of Texas land. Bills can be filed until the 60th day of the session. | [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAUheGngS3WvYBjPDBUar206VSp3RCB6xgJhwhInLx9le7dP52j__tgDy6meD59upVMu8_ZChBqh7hDbYOL6WEVD-YIYUROBgeJoxh71fPFuBlAE_YgJeyDlnrQegZFqOQRnAMezXMMETWi0LLvBhjUCF64oPR8HBVTQCG2XLq2UKO7q3N65BuVzueVJ7O0dqlMvjAxMTFt29ZdqFTy1xbz-WmYmPxSYm2rq94VekI52ZqvxZP1ORCTr28fuNfvQn398GLCZYspxbofmILT6mL6-2r_xt-M-A0AAP__CBlbAw) Christian children in hostile areas and restricted nations around the world are often mistreated within their communities and face great challenges because of their faith. In some countries, they are specifically targeted for persecution or forced conversion, and they quickly learn the cost of following Christ. [The Voice of the Martyrs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAUheGngS3WvYBjPDBUar206VSp3RCB6xgJhwhInLx9le7dP52j__tgDy6meD59upVMu8_ZChBqh7hDbYOL6WEVD-YIYUROBgeJoxh71fPFuBlAE_YgJeyDlnrQegZFqOQRnAMezXMMETWi0LLvBhjUCF64oPR8HBVTQCG2XLq2UKO7q3N65BuVzueVJ7O0dqlMvjAxMTFt29ZdqFTy1xbz-WmYmPxSYm2rq94VekI52ZqvxZP1ORCTr28fuNfvQn398GLCZYspxbofmILT6mL6-2r_xt-M-A0AAP__CBlbAw) works through its global network of front-line workers to bring [Christmas Care Packs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAUheGngS3WvYBjPDBUar206VSp3RCB6xgJhwhInLx9le7dP52j__tgDy6meD59upVMu8_ZChBqh7hDbYOL6WEVD-YIYUROBgeJoxh71fPFuBlAE_YgJeyDlnrQegZFqOQRnAMezXMMETWi0LLvBhjUCF64oPR8HBVTQCG2XLq2UKO7q3N65BuVzueVJ7O0dqlMvjAxMTFt29ZdqFTy1xbz-WmYmPxSYm2rq94VekI52ZqvxZP1ORCTr28fuNfvQn398GLCZYspxbofmILT6mL6-2r_xt-M-A0AAP__CBlbAw) to children in hostile areas and restricted nations. [Christmas Care Packs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAUheGngS3WvYBjPDBUar206VSp3RCB6xgJhwhInLx9le7dP52j__tgDy6meD59upVMu8_ZChBqh7hDbYOL6WEVD-YIYUROBgeJoxh71fPFuBlAE_YgJeyDlnrQegZFqOQRnAMezXMMETWi0LLvBhjUCF64oPR8HBVTQCG2XLq2UKO7q3N65BuVzueVJ7O0dqlMvjAxMTFt29ZdqFTy1xbz-WmYmPxSYm2rq94VekI52ZqvxZP1ORCTr28fuNfvQn398GLCZYspxbofmILT6mL6-2r_xt-M-A0AAP__CBlbAw) are tailored to the specific needs of children in the different regions where they are delivered. The packs include items like school supplies, clothing, hygiene items, a toy, and Christian literature. Every child also receives a full-color, illustrated children’s Bible in the appropriate language. For most of these children, it is the first Bible they have ever received! Sponsor a [Christmas Care Pack](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAUheGngS3WvYBjPDBUar206VSp3RCB6xgJhwhInLx9le7dP52j__tgDy6meD59upVMu8_ZChBqh7hDbYOL6WEVD-YIYUROBgeJoxh71fPFuBlAE_YgJeyDlnrQegZFqOQRnAMezXMMETWi0LLvBhjUCF64oPR8HBVTQCG2XLq2UKO7q3N65BuVzueVJ7O0dqlMvjAxMTFt29ZdqFTy1xbz-WmYmPxSYm2rq94VekI52ZqvxZP1ORCTr28fuNfvQn398GLCZYspxbofmILT6mL6-2r_xt-M-A0AAP__CBlbAw) today and bless the youngest members of our persecuted Christian family this Christmas.

clean_body: A Southwest Airlines plane was hit by gunfire Friday night at Dallas Love Field Airport as it prepared for takeoff, prompting authorities to ground the aircraft and briefly close one of the airport's runways. | | | | | | Monday, November 18, 2024 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1977, the began in Houston. Organized at the behest of President Gerald Ford, the conference submitted A National Plan of Action for federal consideration in March 1978. Next spring, a Texas company is by inviting its customers to enroll in a program that promises to save them money if they give up control of their thermostats. Let us know what you think about this idea in today's poll! Today’s sponsor is , supporting children persecuted for following Jesus. Abilene ⛈️ 69/53° | Amarillo 🌧️ 58/42° | Austin 🌧️ 78/55° | Brownsville 🌦️ 89/70° | Corpus Christi 🌧️ 85/62° | DFW 🌧️ 72/57° | El Paso 🌤️ 63/45° | Houston ⛈️ 82/65° | Lubbock 🌧️ 64/49° | San Antonio 🌧️ 77/55° | Texarkana 🌧️ 76/57° | NRG Launching Virtual Power Plant Houston-based NRG Energy is partnering with Renew Home and Google Cloud to in Texas next year. The project aims to address the state’s ongoing grid reliability issues. The VPP will use AI-driven thermostats to optimize energy use and conserve power during peak demand, potentially —enough to power 200,000 homes. The program requires customers to relinquish control of their thermostats but promises potential savings . Critics of VPPs contend they are inherently volatile and unpredictable. In the spring, Renew Home will provide free smart Nest and Vivint thermostats to NRG customers who enroll in the program. Southwest Airlines Plane Hit by Gunfire A Southwest Airlines plane was at Dallas Love Field Airport as it prepared for takeoff, prompting authorities to ground the aircraft and briefly close one of the airport's runways. After a bullet entered the cockpit, the flight’s 99 passengers disembarked and boarded another plane. No one was injured, and the aircraft was removed from service until repairs could be completed. According to a passenger who spoke to the media, the pilot said there was “a rattle outside of the plane” and that they needed to return to the gate to . Police believe the bullet that hit the aircraft was . An investigation is ongoing. Lawmakers File Nearly 1,700 Bills New and returning members of the Texas House and Senate have filed nearly 1,700 bills as of Sunday ahead of next year’s session, which begins on Jan. 14. Legislators have filed bills to establish a universal school choice program, , ban abortion-inducing drugs, lower property taxes, and prohibit foreign ownership of Texas land. Bills can be filed until the 60th day of the session. In 2023, 8,616 measures were filed during the regular session and four called special sessions, , a rate of less than 15%. A list of filed House bills can be , while a list of filed Senate bills can be . # Monday, November 18, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this day in 1963, the Bell Telephone Company introduced[ the first push-button telephone](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFvhCAYxvFPA9sZXkCBgaFJ69TrLU2bdDEIrycNHhcPNfbTN3bv-jzJL_l_nruziynerm9uQluG3HHG5QngBLoLLqa9kzTYAZGjoGhBCTDcaGB0tOhRKlMP2vOgpDBoGh9kkLrXBlANNNpDAwANIKSEijc1c0whE76vmeqJZBhiyXP1neOtjDikPa84Vz5PNNmxlPuDiCfCW8LbbduqPS9l6fH4j8UVPxLRrkQ8X95_Xi7Lx2v8knS24b7FlOKjUUSy6-Ri-iPLf4mr5b8BAAD__0GFUjw), revolutionizing how people connected by replacing the rotary dial with a more efficient keypad. Alert readers will notice we've introduced a new daily feature in today's edition: _The Holiday Section_. From now until the end of the year, we'll bring you stories about holiday shopping, travel, entertainment, and traditions. Check out this doozy about an extreme example of [holiday decorating](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQgOGnwVsi7nz4YGDo4i1dO1rEHDEVtiND0-btq3Tv-g-f9H9cpkvIJW-397CKb2mfUCOdAE5gpxhyeU7URZ9EUPpOPHAPDp0F3S2ewzWyGQJwpChMwc3MlNzsOA2pN132Lw0ALEBPBGccjA6aRffz1Wi-KtISc9uP8-eet7ZIKs_9Icd53teu-KW1e1X9m8JR4fjzqgrHVY5ca1jCVmUDVjjWFtpXVTiCNcxuYLA0IBljHXWHj_fvXEquAyvStzXk8ue3_34fHn8DAAD___QTVDY)! We're also thrilled to announce tomorrow's launch of our newest state publication, **_The Tennessee Flyover_**. You can follow all the news of the Volunteer State by [signing up with one click here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1PwzAYhH-NvbV6P5y4GTwgVVlQOyEhpsiJ37QGp64SU9R_jyIYOsB4p-e54V4P3cHHFC-no5_ElTF3BGQ2iBvcdcHHdO-MDm4UIWEtDi1jQ80OQZ8dGWJroUeg0GPTVOL7keswAgOEhnV06xoi7hDZGNxSXYEHK8BDX4HtlQEJseR5-57jpZxlTPd8k3k75Ekndy7luih-UtQqaqf0B6Wo_U0r4U9xSPHyobiVycekeB-uXzGluNRWUWXgtNY_Yr0UX6QbchDF-5ejovqzTIr3z296dg_eg6XLfyfdHH0HAAD__0caaCY). It's your turn to disrupt the lucrative world of casinos with an investment opportunity from today's sponsor, [Acres Manufacturing](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80D2P4yAQxvFPg7tYzIBfUlCcFKXLtVciDGObEy8WkKzy7VdOv1vPTyP9n38P_TA--LT9NZFUW7NGjvICcIFZO-PDW8vOqZUISXSkYBJwxesMvNvVMgoxTNO4rjhMFsxopAOEeZCLlesiO6_ObwAwAwgpocdx4IZPxIVdBj4tTHJyvuXS_88-tZ3W8M4vKr3NsQtqb-2oTPxheGd49-lFtfXGFqqN7J5yyNv7pOdd3J8t6pqfxRITNxfLBwaTnE_bYTZiOJ4kkvPPyMTtMKUlKnX3B8z8IgahP90Mx5ZMpPqL0QicC5ivs8SuKHd8-RB8HScm-RaND5-C9tOiL4XfAQAA__-eQXZd).

## Biden OKs Ukraine Missile Attacks Into Russia
President Joe Biden on Sunday authorized Ukraine to use long-range U.S. missiles for strikes [deep inside Russia](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O4yAURp_G7oi4F2yTgmKbdNl2S4ufi3N3CFiYJMrbjzL9lJ8-6ejo_LuuV8eZy_bX3cn2VFeUqAWAALNGx_m96jHaRISkRrKwKDjj2YAcb1Zp741LUs6T8d77OSYZaVYzkU4IZmT7oQGAAVBawwnnSTq5kFTBT3Lxg5YUudd2-l-59Bul_K5PaqdQ72O2t973Y1B_BrwMeHF7odfxuT6jdQ6ZBrx4jlTE46s5LiRyLZtormwkXuT2Wg7RHsfBTkwYNWqYDBiMhFJrCsH4FJIESOcwNhv3F-fMx7wMWm53x_lHpP8W5mnxOwAA__8WH2Rh), marking a significant policy reversal. The shift comes partly in response to reports that North Korean troops are aiding Russia's invasion of Ukraine, according to a U.S. official. Late Saturday night, Russia launched a large-scale [missile and drone attack](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDHvmzAQRz-N2Yx8ZwNh8FCpQurw79oRHXCBa4wd2U6ifPsq7dz599PT0_v1NX-RBIn7TzrZ12ua0aDTABou80YS3rNrNn9lRrYNexgsjDhewDSH78beLcTQ4eZ6Jru4fsV-HNAsKyAOjfgPDQAuANY5aLHvDJmBjV2XzgyLcoY3qSm3v5PEevA1vNOTc7umswn-qPVelP2mcFI40bJGfpV2T59Z4fQjVs6RqqRIQeGUH6UI6UCPuB5c9EmlyJP1v8tLNtanlCKBNdVK601XyjtXibt-3DJJ5KJwKjXlt7KTbMp-B-hGZwYDTfbb_SUhSOkH5cx-koS_nvV_3Z4e_wQAAP__fhJwxw) on Ukraine’s energy infrastructure, aiming to cripple its power grid ahead of winter. The attack was the largest on Ukraine since late August and the third largest this year, with missiles and drones targeting several cities, including the capital, Kyiv.
## Critical ISS Leak Sparks NASA-Russia Dispute
Tensions between NASA and Russia's Roscosmos have escalated after NASA warned of a [potential "catastrophic failure"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1u4zAQhJ9G6lbgj_5YsLhGna-9UlhZS2kvNCmQjGW_fWAHKdPN4BsMBvPvMl-QPYftL97IFhdnJVQLUoIc5xXZP-e2Xq0jUqRrsnLQ0igzSlHvVvdGdEopN6JZhHaj0uMymHE1Rmhj-prtq01KOUqp21Y2qu8EioGEvi6dGJaqFbRyian5HzmUnZx_xjul5hpvtbd7KUeu9J9KTZWazvNs8oFXetFKTW8N9Dh8TFg4hkpNHAql8Hbo4TuRyw8tOwHnDDtmWIgCeMIPDhu4mKCDJ2HKEDAjYFghfebMCCtn3BIRxAB7PKFEcPwALnWy63Gy95z7oWrFdkP27-XltyfvVn0FAAD__2Acd_g) due to an air leak in the Russian module of the International Space Station (ISS). At last week's meeting, NASA attributed the leak to multiple stress factors, while Roscosmos dismissed these concerns as "unrealistic," blaming [micro-vibrations instead](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OgzAQhJ8GOqNd2_y4cHFNulx7JVrwEvZkcIStoLz9ifRXjUYjzSd9P_fxThJlf3zTxr4sadSgrUJUOIyBJL5HWwe_MGs2NXvsDTrtBoR69XYaoDPGhnYOTjvUi-k6CuygRRdoqcVfb4g4IBprsdFdCwQ9g5mnFvqpssBBSjqa3yR7WXmJ7_Tio5nTVke_lvLMlfmq9K3St_M8mzetKV1rpW87n_kKyqQmjsIvzkr2wsdORdJOUeUnzaxy-XQFrbUtuAGbtWyxPnx4nhKj5K6vLDw2kvgBl_9EvLz-CwAA__-W1F-x). The leak, which has persisted for five years, has become more severe, now losing 1.7 kg of air daily. Watch [a space analyst discuss](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GKhDAUheGnSbqR3Js4xiLFwCJsMdstW0pMriZDnAyaUXz7xe23PQc--H_u_d3GFJ_Tl53JlDH3KFBdAC6ge29jOnrFvRmJkCQnA42EFlsNggeD4Gw9WEVaezeKUSqnPehWQe2HBiWP5tQAQANIpaDCay2saEhIN9SiGZgS5GPJS_XI8VkCjenIGy2VyzNPJpTyWpm8MewYdvu-V0d-l_dA538utrjAZLcx-RGu4vF927p1-uSL8a89phTXa8OUmGYb0x9Z_kvcDP4GAAD__yDQUgA) the leak. While both agencies work on a resolution, the affected module remains closed except during cargo operations.
## List: 2024’s Most-Used Passwords
A new global list of the [most-used passwords](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHO4yAQBp8Gd0TsGtu4oLjGXa690tqEJXDCJgISn9_-lPR__UnfaObPdb1STHF__KaNbfN5RYVaAkgwq6OYzlV3znpm5L5jC1MPM84GVBcsmH5U4GnwrD0CeEV6JmUYb6DnwXTRft4AwAD0WsMFx0GRmlj199ugppvQil1suVz-5ri3wD6d-c3lcs9bl2xo7VlF_0vgInBpgUNM6bMJXELeeOejClx2_lcblXVjF2k9YmGBi55nbYZRtsDyyKU2-aRaj1xclWd-yXt-JScDvVnGXX6tc5G0n_JkKgKXrlj3PGJKsY6T0OqxUfzCu_ZTqLfF_wEAAP__LjxqWg) shows that people still tend to use simple passwords that are all too easy to crack. For the fifth consecutive year, "_123456_ " claimed the top spot, used over 3 million times in 2024, according to the 6th annual survey by password management app NordPass. _"Password_ ," "_qwerty_ ," and "_abc123"_ also made appearances in the top 15, with "_password"_ being the [most-used password](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2ypCAUhJ8GMywO4s8EBJNYm8xuuKHFyEHPLooXcKh5-1tOfqMOuuur7v77mB6GPO3Lb7Ohzi5MUkjFATgMkzXk35OqrHaIEpsKNfQN3ORtAFGteuiNsiiwMW0nlOvcDKqFViqpOqucqEhfNAAYABqloJZdK4zoUTTzsxX9kymBlnKI9b9Ae17R-Xd4YaznsFVerzkfiTV3Jkcmx1JKvaX98pgccednYnLcsVyScV734MPyvpIhpswPk1IJ0SYeHP_MOmJ4IS_IUybveTrn_9xkbmmhbDxPOJ-R8kUwkd_vcA5ff35VUdujkPeUup4psWyG_Kdg_umwl5bfAQAA__-pKG2K) in corporate America. Most of the passwords on the list of 200 can be cracked in under a second, the study found. You can see the top [15 most common passwords](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHO4yAQBp8Gd0TsGtu4oLjGXa690tqEJXDCJgISn9_-lPR__UnfaObPdb1STHF__KaNbfN5RYVaAkgwq6OYzlV3znpm5L5jC1MPM84GVBcsmH5U4GnwrD0CeEV6JmUYb6DnwXTRft4AwAD0WsMFx0GRmlj199ugppvQil1suVz-5ri3wD6d-c3lcs9bl2xo7VlF_0vgInBpgUNM6bMJXELeeOejClx2_lcblXVjF2k9YmGBi55nbYZRtsDyyKU2-aRaj1xclWd-yXt-JScDvVnGXX6tc5G0n_JkKgKXrlj3PGJKsY6T0OqxUfzCu_ZTqLfF_wEAAP__LjxqWg) here.

clean_body: President Joe Biden on Sunday authorized Ukraine to use long-range U.S. missiles for strikes , marking a significant policy reversal. | | | | | | Monday, November 18, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1963, the Bell Telephone Company introduced, revolutionizing how people connected by replacing the rotary dial with a more efficient keypad. Alert readers will notice we've introduced a new daily feature in today's edition: The Holiday Section. From now until the end of the year, we'll bring you stories about holiday shopping, travel, entertainment, and traditions. Check out this doozy about an extreme example of ! We're also thrilled to announce tomorrow's launch of our newest state publication, The Tennessee Flyover. You can follow all the news of the Volunteer State by . It's your turn to disrupt the lucrative world of casinos with an investment opportunity from today's sponsor, . | Biden OKs Ukraine Missile Attacks Into Russia President Joe Biden on Sunday authorized Ukraine to use long-range U.S. missiles for strikes , marking a significant policy reversal. The shift comes partly in response to reports that North Korean troops are aiding Russia's invasion of Ukraine, according to a U.S. official. Late Saturday night, Russia launched a large-scale on Ukraine’s energy infrastructure, aiming to cripple its power grid ahead of winter. The attack was the largest on Ukraine since late August and the third largest this year, with missiles and drones targeting several cities, including the capital, Kyiv. Critical ISS Leak Sparks NASA-Russia Dispute Tensions between NASA and Russia's Roscosmos have escalated after NASA warned of a due to an air leak in the Russian module of the International Space Station (ISS). At last week's meeting, NASA attributed the leak to multiple stress factors, while Roscosmos dismissed these concerns as "unrealistic," blaming . The leak, which has persisted for five years, has become more severe, now losing 1.7 kg of air daily. Watch the leak. While both agencies work on a resolution, the affected module remains closed except during cargo operations. List: 2024’s Most-Used Passwords A new global list of the shows that people still tend to use simple passwords that are all too easy to crack. For the fifth consecutive year, "123456 " claimed the top spot, used over 3 million times in 2024, according to the 6th annual survey by password management app NordPass. "Password ," "qwerty ," and "abc123" also made appearances in the top 15, with "password" being the in corporate America. Most of the passwords on the list of 200 can be cracked in under a second, the study found. You can see the top here. name: History Facts
subject: These 9 cities served as America's capital
body:
From 1776 to 1800, the United States capital bounced around between nine different cities. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68bfoiuwue608ouj8b3hwqvpd1m87dpobsr143zh9mm3tu52ohge4umgcmg5zjsnnargnkzyqy794sekc23eniw53tof034wl01g2lqorcy7e0qntfq6d6k4s6j050ueq84z7cf8tx4mvb0f8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn5b0a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Nine cities have served as America’s capital.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn5b0a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn5b0a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn5b0a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| F rom 1776 to 1800, the United States capital bounced around between [nine different cities](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn5b0a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). This frequent relocation was due to a mix of safety concerns amid the American Revolutionary War and a lack of a bureaucratic infrastructure in one centralized place. Philadelphia served as the nation’s first capital (at the time, the capital was considered to be the city where Congress met and enacted legislation) after the adoption of the Declaration of Independence on July 4, 1776. But due to safety concerns regarding a potential British attack on the city, Congress relocated to Baltimore, Maryland, on December 20, 1776, and the seat of government remained there for just over two months.
---
Congress returned to Philadelphia in March 1777, but fled once again due to the British occupation of the city that September. Delegates retreated further into Pennsylvania, settling in Lancaster for a single day on September 27, 1777, and then moving to York. After the British army departed Philadelphia in June 1778, the capital returned to the city for roughly five years. But during the Pennsylvania Mutiny of 1783 (an uprising of soldiers over unpaid wages), Congress vacated Philly in June and headed to Princeton, New Jersey. Future relocations took Congress into the Maryland State House in Annapolis, then to Trenton, New Jersey, followed by New York City. In July 1790, the [Residence Act](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=uogjbh1wjaern1lmchkw2nzlg372cf0e4b79vlrazplxs2mcbzden2cfphkirrbu1lt3n34jj9m515tssz0fyxfgh3c11j8hmzsqekv7jk7gozx7g0dq5gi5adc4yc3ezpdztyfdr47wxgtgo7wmxoojh5l2dwifne144ijw6kso9895vomcg2jqwpcl2aewlo085mq496xwam4s5jv1lj2lss4ffkjm22ifntjmw5yuuxq9tzioa54xq7k3udqmcs3aofc55nxi3e0w0zjihfquiak0wff&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn5b0a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) was signed into law, establishing Washington, D.C., as the nation’s official capital. It also reestablished Philadelphia as a temporary capital until the city of D.C. was further developed and the proposed Capitol building was complete. Congress returned to its original home for 10 years until November 1800, when the capital was finally moved to Washington, D.C., where it remains.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn5b0a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn5b0a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## The first presidential inauguration took place in New York City.
When George Washington was elected president in 1789, Washington, D.C., was just a nascent concept, and the U.S. capital was still in New York City. So, on April 30 of that year, Washington traveled to Federal Hall in downtown Manhattan to deliver the first-ever presidential oath of office. After a brief ceremonial processional, Washington arrived at what was then the Capitol building and took the presidential oath [around 2 p.m](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn5b0a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). on a balcony in front of hundreds of onlookers. Afterward, he attended a service at nearby St. Paul’s Chapel, enjoyed dinner alone, and then watched an evening fireworks show to cap off the festivities. On his way home, the streets were so full of people, the president left his carriage and decided to walk instead, since it was quicker. Though Federal Hall was demolished in 1812, the stone balcony that Washington stood on that day was salvaged, and is on exhibit at the Federal Hall National Memorial.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queens don’t belong in libraries
body:
Our mission is simple: reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.

| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.
---
| |
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0qul8sbondan45j89thig95b5po09ieav5va64g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjgm9oj4c1h2bs)
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.

Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. **[**Will you sponsor a Story Hour Kit with a gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4pdj8hiv04fpvj3758a287ttgr4m7o12577couo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjgm9oj4c1h2bs)** A gift of **$175** sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America,

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zstr8gn6ca4qvgmr2sbp7lukcho7is5f68ass24g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjim0p34clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zviqo7k6i57kp3bm7uhbrpmfroh88rnde18fjud8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjim0p34clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z75mn8k6rh9fl7v0j0q1pfkuhtq3lmr9dr5856s8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjim0p34clh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsbv0b4j6adp4lrc2pnp9ldskgd1fjg2up931u6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjim0p34clh2bs)**
---

name: Matt, Team McCormick

body:
The dirty tricks keep coming from the Left.

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1914rfg9kh7t88q02jedhfm3ppa313j4hq52afo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjim2or6cph2bs)

Friend,

_" People violate laws any time they want."_

That's a direct quote from a Democrat County Commissioners in Bucks County, Pennsylvania right before she voted to approve counting ILLEGAL ballots in PA's Senate race in favor of the Democrat, Bob Casey.

You can't make this up. Democrats are literally trying to STEAL the Senate seat away from Dave McCormick, who WON the election fair and square.

Multiple news organizations have called the PA Senate race and named Dave the winner. He fought for every vote as he traveled to all of PA's 67 counties, holding hundreds of campaign events and meeting with countless voters who all said one thing: WE WANT CHANGE.

Dave is committed to working with other political outsiders like President Trump and Elon Musk to shake up DC. _**As Dave has said multiple times, people didn 't vote for incremental change, they voted for a complete overhaul of business as usual in DC.**_

We have lawyers and election count observers spread out across the state and we're fighting back each and every minute of the day to stop the Democrats from stealing this election. But we can't do it alone. I'm asking for your support.

**[Can I count on you to chip in $25 today to help us keep up our fight?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8jd2jvau9ivn67iuljjnqpucmgq04rluct9h42o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjim2or6cph2bs)**

We knew the Democrats were up to dirty tricks when shady lawyer Marc Elias, the man responsible for the Steele Dossier, descended on PA in a _**brazen attempt to overturn the election results in favor of the Democrats!**_

Make no mistake, Dave McCormick WON this race. But the Democrats are throwing EVERYTHING at him because he is a political outsider who ran on a message of bringing CHANGE to Washington.

You've been such a strong supporter of Dave's campaign and we need you now more than ever. [Can we count on you to chip in whatever you can give to help us fight this recount?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zr5nvai5c93htu7ae82bh9fodrbtdhj0g04ftoe0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjim2or6cph2bs)

name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Sign: Demand Trump appointees have proper FBI background checks, and not skip them
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't let Trump appointees skip FBI background checks, and endanger America](https://default.salsalabs.org/T85d9a1fc-294f-4ec8-a1dd-c39d34f9d159/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T30735dda-f584-4889-b0f4-b382a9c1ea0a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | This is absolutely crazy, and incredibly dangerous. Trump is [skipping](https://default.salsalabs.org/T30bf1970-a04c-4f15-b514-fbe17093f3e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ FBI background checks](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d1a15c7-c368-4fd3-b56a-e51ef517ba16/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) for a number of his appointees -- including ones who have been credibly accused of working with American adversaries, and being national security risks. **This is nuts, and we can't let them take these jobs and gain access to highly classified information without proper checks.** The FBI has long been the gold standard for background checks, and has vetted appointees for both Republican and Democratic administrations. The idea that Trump would skip them should be a warning signal heard across America. [**Add your name: Don't let Trump appointees skip FBI background checks and endanger America.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf59488d0-5cdb-4373-9244-dd21e6be04ff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**No FBI background checks = no confirmation.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T602868e4-f3b8-4c4d-8c5a-6ca90cd9ed48/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2158ceb8-b9e7-4d54-8824-74eeae2cf4e7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action

|

Hey, it's Matt, Dave McCormick's Campaign Manager. Sorry to bother you, but I wanted to make sure you saw the headline from the New York Post.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs8g7lds4eud0gubeulac236e32ndqib58ti4kr0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjim6ob2c9h2bs)

The AP declared Dave McCormick the winner of Pennsylvania's senate seat, but now the Dems refuse to concede the race. **[Will you join our fight to support Dave against the Dems' dirty tricks?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z91ds08j71cr96ja1ksirk3hjjvpnltdf5rqcfcg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjim6ob2c9h2bs)**

******************************************************[DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv0u6l83c7l3lp1peefid08djcltc8oupfdf4h58_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjim6ob2c9h2bs)******************************************************

As the New York Post reported, "A shady Democratic attorney...is now at the heart of a desperate legal effort to snatch Pennsylvania's Senate race away from its rightful winner -- Republican Dave McCormick...Marc Elias, a longtime Democratic election attorney and dirty trickster, is attempting to force the Pennsylvania Senate race into a recount, even though it was called for McCormick by the Associated Press on Thursday, with even the state's most liberal news outlets echoing the call since."

The fact is, Dave McCormick won! We need to make sure we have the resources to fight against whatever dirty tricks are played. **[Will you chip in $25 now?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z99i8epokglidivjjo815lpaj9efalcubu4kohd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjim6ob2c9h2bs)**

Dave was able to win because of your support. We truly appreciate everything that you did to push Dave over the finish line. **[Anything you are able to chip in to help us battle back is very appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3k8j27muno7fp10fj2o591htodheejs3570ls7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjim6ob2c9h2bs)**

Thank you!
Matt

name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: On the brink of mass starvation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

70% of the people slaughtered in Gaza have been women and children. The
biggest single category of victims is kids between the ages of five to
nine years old. And now, aid groups are sounding the alarm that mass
starvation is imminent.

36 days ago, the U.S. government told Israel it had 30 days to increase
the flow of humanitarian aid into Gaza, or risk losing military aid. And
Israel ignored it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20465?t=1016&akid=7224%2E5885482%2EtR9x5A ][IMG]

Then the Biden administration announced that Israel will face no
consequences. If they’re not going to do anything, we will.

Bernie has introduced a resolution to halt $20 billion of U.S. weapons
sales to Israel and finally force the Israeli government to stop the
slaughter. The vote is just days away and will be the first time Congress
votes directly on blocking an arms sales to Israel.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20465?source=email-111824&t=1017&akid=7224%2E5885482%2EtR9x5A ]Will you stand with Bernie and help rally as much support in Congress
as possible?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20465?source=email-111824&t=1018&akid=7224%2E5885482%2EtR9x5A ]ADD YOUR NAME

A coalition of humanitarian groups warned this week that “Israel not only
failed to meet the U.S. criteria that would indicate support to the
humanitarian response, but concurrently took actions that dramatically
worsened the situation on the ground.”

Despite the aid groups’ assessment, the U.S. government held a press
conference announcing that it would not limit arms transfers to Israel.
It’s a moral outrage. And the terrifying thing is that it may only get
worse.

Netanyahu and his cabinet have made it no secret that they’re thrilled
with Trump’s victory. In his last term, Trump supported the expansion of
settlements and turned his back on a two state solution. And this week,
Israel’s far-right Finance Minister ordered preparations for the
annexation of the occupied West Bank, hoping that the incoming Trump
administration will let them get away with it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20465?t=1019&akid=7224%2E5885482%2EtR9x5A ][IMG]

We have to do something NOW. And Bernie is leading the way with a path
forward to end our government’s backing of Netanyahu’s devastating,
immoral war.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20465?source=email-111824&t=1020&akid=7224%2E5885482%2EtR9x5A ]Together we can show Congress that the public will not rest until it
does something to finally stop Netanyahu. But it’s going to take ALL of us
standing with Bernie to finally stop the U.S. from enabling Israel’s wars.
Will you add your name?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7224%2E5885482%2EtR9x5A ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7224%2E5885482%2EtR9x5A ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7224%2E5885482%2EtR9x5A ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7224%2E5885482%2EtR9x5A ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7224%2E5885482%2EtR9x5A ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-111824.fNlH3k&t=1008&akid=7224%2E5885482%2EtR9x5A ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
