name: Matt, Team McCormick
subject: “People violate laws any time theywant”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
The dirty tricks keep coming from the Left.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsel8tpbvjc1ea4qj25cnauuf7udbhvh7i23dnc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjim1oj2clh2bs)

Friend,

_" People violate laws any time they want."_

That's a direct quote from a Democrat County Commissioners in Bucks County, Pennsylvania right before she voted to approve counting ILLEGAL ballots in PA's Senate race in favor of the Democrat, Bob Casey.

You can't make this up. Democrats are literally trying to STEAL the Senate seat away from Dave McCormick, who WON the election fair and square.

Multiple news organizations have called the PA Senate race and named Dave the winner. He fought for every vote as he traveled to all of PA's 67 counties, holding hundreds of campaign events and meeting with countless voters who all said one thing: WE WANT CHANGE.

Dave is committed to working with other political outsiders like President Trump and Elon Musk to shake up DC. _**As Dave has said multiple times, people didn 't vote for incremental change, they voted for a complete overhaul of business as usual in DC.**_

We have lawyers and election count observers spread out across the state and we're fighting back each and every minute of the day to stop the Democrats from stealing this election. But we can't do it alone. I'm asking for your support.

**[Can I count on you to chip in $25 today to help us keep up our fight?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zegdbctucfmptddm1vbe5pdvot38ol314bcq94fo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjim1oj2clh2bs)**

We knew the Democrats were up to dirty tricks when shady lawyer Marc Elias, the man responsible for the Steele Dossier, descended on PA in a _**brazen attempt to overturn the election results in favor of the Democrats!**_

Make no mistake, Dave McCormick WON this race. But the Democrats are throwing EVERYTHING at him because he is a political outsider who ran on a message of bringing CHANGE to Washington.

You've been such a strong supporter of Dave's campaign and we need you now more than ever. [Can we count on you to chip in whatever you can give to help us fight this recount?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi8ep08bmpnl5l0i9qt8p94hbv5vopqk2p53ckgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjim1oj2clh2bs)

Thanks in advance for your help!

Matt
Campaign Manager, Friends of Dave McCormick

clean_body: The dirty tricks keep coming from the Left. Friend, " People violate laws any time they want." That's a direct quote from a Democrat County Commissioners in Bucks County, Pennsylvania right before she voted to approve counting ILLEGAL ballots in PA's Senate race in favor of the Democrat, Bob Casey. You can't make this up. Democrats are literally trying to STEAL the Senate seat away from Dave McCormick, who WON the election fair and square. Multiple news organizations have called the PA Senate race and named Dave the winner. He fought for every vote as he traveled to all of PA's 67 counties, holding hundreds of campaign events and meeting with countless voters who all said one thing: WE WANT CHANGE. Dave is committed to working with other political outsiders like President Trump and Elon Musk to shake up DC. As Dave has said multiple times, people didn 't vote for incremental change, they voted for a complete overhaul of business as usual in DC. We have lawyers and election count observers spread out across the state and we're fighting back each and every minute of the day to stop the Democrats from stealing this election. But we can't do it alone. I'm asking for your support. We knew the Democrats were up to dirty tricks when shady lawyer Marc Elias, the man responsible for the Steele Dossier, descended on PA in a brazen attempt to overturn the election results in favor of the Democrats! Make no mistake, Dave McCormick WON this race. But the Democrats are throwing EVERYTHING at him because he is a political outsider who ran on a message of bringing CHANGE to Washington. You've been such a strong supporter of Dave's campaign and we need you now more than ever. Thanks in advance for your help! Matt Campaign Manager, Friends of Dave McCormick Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick. Our mailing address is: PO BOX 23537 PITTSBURGH, PA 15222 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Diogo Costa
subject: Government: The Great Fiction
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0d680e2b40ce4cb1a485b7805a150fd7&_e=RQjuPXKNdPrtjBYWVQ2W9BI_NHYJpNZjJuN26zPcdqjneMD6Ef5dcJM5Gc8q9FwyxEz9OUWt1VPVRa3Kifse-EE8UKo3ZHhPVNOwur79L_RprReQPVK93nUV9pZHLRY-q9J1uVygCixC2BT9GjHjlbzxBnOQXGi055QeXNsnFsJVA1OzVmZ4c-KTOzKNi4COhOFV6mlx_ATbO3cTv9MuUfWHmSSPMzxiwpxxYQbiDer8kJY32jVXuF4nvhxbWUlCkZhSbFFvR2Y08FOpOp9iPI_JV1-cRAeTqT3myljpUieK-UFuswPQkx-mbVZBrX4ZPqWrgMpRkCw5Mk56sNau3oGROJDADb-4jgaZawAqB1xHOq8i0NMdFcKrhvW20_7cS3sQGeez3fJ4xZhY1kUFut4eKc05H5HM3zMoxzGb6E9zEr9dzbxBi8z6lo4ypKJ1)
Peter,

Right now, powerful corporations are using government agencies to rig the system in their favor, exploiting regulations and public institutions to advance their profits -- not your freedom.

It's a modern version of what Frederic Bastiat warned us about in his timeless classic _The Law_ , where the law, instead of defending liberty, is being used to plunder it.

There's a growing number of those who use the power of government to take from the productive and stifle true competition.

They benefit from subsidies, special regulations, and cozy deals with the government, all at your expense.

The Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) is fighting back against this crony corporate capture. We believe in free markets and individual liberty, where producers -- entrepreneurs, small businesses, and hardworking individuals -- can thrive without government interference.

**FEE is committed to educating the next generation about the dangers of cronyism and the principles of economic freedom that can restore justice. **

But we can't do it without your support.

**To thank you for your contribution of $30 or more, we'll send you a FREE copy of _The Law_ by Frederic Bastiat -- a powerful reminder of why liberty matters and how we can defend it from those who would use the law to plunder.**

clean_body: Peter, Right now, powerful corporations are using government agencies to rig the system in their favor, exploiting regulations and public institutions to advance their profits -- not your freedom. It's a modern version of what Frederic Bastiat warned us about in his timeless classic The Law , where the law, instead of defending liberty, is being used to plunder it. There's a growing number of those who use the power of government to take from the productive and stifle true competition. They benefit from subsidies, special regulations, and cozy deals with the government, all at your expense. The Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) is fighting back against this crony corporate capture. We believe in free markets and individual liberty, where producers -- entrepreneurs, small businesses, and hardworking individuals -- can thrive without government interference. FEE is committed to educating the next generation about the dangers of cronyism and the principles of economic freedom that can restore justice. But we can't do it without your support. To thank you for your contribution of $30 or more, we'll send you a FREE copy of The Law by Frederic Bastiat -- a powerful reminder of why liberty matters and how we can defend it from those who would use the law to plunder. As Frederic Bastiat says in The Law, " The state is the great fictitious entity by which everyone seeks to live at the expense of everyone else." If we want to reduce the likelihood of destructive government agencies abusing the law to plunder American citizens, then we need a more widespread understanding of basic economics. FEE is on the frontlines of this battle, ensuring that the timeless principles of free markets and a free society are not just preserved but championed by the next generation. We are reaching the next generation through a variety of channels. Our flagship program, FEE in the Classroom , is held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country, where skilled educators teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government. Through a host of more than 20 social media platforms , FEE ties timeless ideas to trending topics. In 2023, people engaged with FEE's content more than 30 MILLION times through social media, YouTube, and our website. We believe it is critical to reach young people where they get their information with our message of liberty, free markets, and free speech. With your support, we can reach even more young minds and equip them with the knowledge and tools they need to stand up for their rights. Plus, as a token of our appreciation, you'll receive your free copy of The Law when you donate $30 or more today. FEE is also building the new "liberty pipeline," which will offer young people more opportunities for deeper learning to help ensure they adopt and implement the freedom philosophy in their lives, communities, and the greater world. Our new pipeline will include: Multi-day summer seminars relaunched as bootcamps Hackathons and other student competitions Fellowship programs to cultivate the next generation of liberty influencers The Freeman brought back to life as an online magazine AND MORE! Your contribution to FEE is not just an investment in education; it's an investment in the future of freedom and resisting the encroachment of government overreach.** By donating today, you help us provide resources, experiences, and inspiration that empower young people to be the champions of liberty our world so desperately needs. Thank you for standing with FEE in defense of liberty, truth, and the producers who create a better world for us all. clean_body: | | | Peter, I’m going to be real with you: Bob Casey needs our help right now. His race with Connecticut Dave is still too close to call 😬 and we need your help to make sure every ballot is counted. Bob’s team is working hard to make all Pennsylvanians have their voice heard, but they need the resources to make that happen. Pennsylvania is now the frontline for standing up to Senate Republicans 🛑 and I need Bob in the Senate with me to keep up the fight. 💪 If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** Thank you so much ❤️ John John Fetterman U.S. Senator for Pennsylvania ** Paid for by Defeat Boebert PAC

**On this week 's episode of The Qasim Rashid Show we discuss:**
* We need to talk about anti-Muslim hate from the left and debunk disinformation

* My guest is former Congresswoman [Marie Newman](https://open.substack.com/users/108375358-marie-newman?utm_source=mentions) who joins to discuss the state of American politics and what must happen to counter right wing extremism
* Even though he's now a lame duck President, Joe Biden can still slow fascism in America--but will he have the courage to act?

First if you act fast you can [**download the nation’s best Concealed Carry Certification available today**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19143/6374453/d713df0f14ffbe66aad8a834fa7da9ea06669c5c/3b86d94284a437d2bdba2444b6519c3ccc7d042c).

It’s important you download it ASAP as anti-gun groups are trying to get rid of it.

Fortunately, because you can still download a certification for America’s top CCW gun certification from this website. (And you don’t have to leave your house to do it).

Downloading this certification online ensures you encounter:
* **Zero** government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* **Zero** lines, classroom time or books to read...
* **Zero** gun range time (You don’t even need to fire a gun to [**get this certification**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19143/6374453/d713df0f14ffbe66aad8a834fa7da9ea06669c5c/3b86d94284a437d2bdba2444b6519c3ccc7d042c)).

It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple). Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

You don’t even need to own a gun to get this certificate...
that’s why it’s been named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Certificate.

31 states have agreed to accept this certificate so far (it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized certificate that’s available right now).

This certification permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry certification permit either. It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.

→ But there is one thing you need to know...

Since it is so easy to get this certificate, pro-gun-control lawmakers are aggressively searching for ways to ban access to it.

As such, you’ll need to download your online certificate today... especially since tomorrow this fast-track site could be shut down for good.

If you ever thought about getting a concealed carry certificate here is your chance to carry legally. If you think you know some “gun basics” [**click here and download the certification today**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19143/6374453/d713df0f14ffbe66aad8a834fa7da9ea06669c5c/3b86d94284a437d2bdba2444b6519c3ccc7d042c).

name: Tim Sheehy
subject: Major update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
let’s keep winning into next year

This is Senator-elect Tim Sheehy, Friend.

I wanted to personally thank you for everything you did to help Republicans take back the Senate. With your support, we won in Montana and across the country.

_We 've ensured that President Trump will have an America First Senate Majority -- and I'm ready to get to work when it comes to passing his agenda._

**[But there's a hitch, Friend. Before we can do that, we have one more fight we need to win.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn588fg0dkhcr9ec7vfs7lm5om2iiee3e7nsquv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm0p74cjh2bs)**

In Pennsylvania, the Senate race is going to a recount.
[Senate Republicans are sending field teams to Pennsylvania to help with recounts and legal challenges.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfsko5cfq2ioa2k2kgrv9pj8o4dg5h28ttutjmmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm0p74cjh2bs) Democrats are doing the same. We all know how much they will raise and spend to stop us from winning more Senate seats.

**[So, Friend, I'm asking you to donate $50, $35, or even just $5 to the NRSC's Emergency Legal Fund as soon as you can >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4316djsobdq8f96i54jjt2dnuutigng6jrfquv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm0p74cjh2bs)**

******************************************************[GROW THE MAJORITY: RUSH SUPPORT](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlrmb933m4tcujji0beb0hbe64jh1t7gh74s9vf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm0p74cjh2bs)******************************************************

**[This Fund needs to raise as much as it can as quickly as it can. By supporting it, you're supporting legal and field teams in this crucial recount effort.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs0jt3fk1gjl7prgl716js2q8e7h3gvo1o0ncroo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm0p74cjh2bs)**

**[In the face of recounts and legal fights, this is the most important way to show your support.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd3vl92qlfr5dm7m73u9bte4gci9ntjh5plnen48_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm0p74cjh2bs)**

We won on Election Day. Let's keep winning into next year. And let's put America First.

Thank you,

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8fc0ftn1ko68lgpec9n8ocno59v9ftm7ts6ejpg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm0p74cjh2bs)
Senator-elect Tim Sheehy

******************************************************[SUPPORT THE EMERGENCY LEGAL FUND](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1dg3ndoaiv7fhdi9b774rcldd62p56krq7frqrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm0p74cjh2bs)******************************************************

| | | Hi - it's Senator Marsha Blackburn.

clean_body: Please read every word of this message. It’s important! | | | | | Hi - it's Senator Marsha Blackburn. Please read every word of this message - it's important! I wanted to drop you a note now that the election is in the rearview mirror with a couple of points: 1. "To say THANK YOU for your support." Because of you, not only did I win my campaign for re-election, but President Trump soared to victory, we took the Senate Majority back from the hands of the Radical Left, and we kept the House of Representatives. 2. "To check in with you one-on-one." I'm eager to hit the ground running on day one of our Senate Majority and Trump Administration. But I want to make sure we're prioritizing the issues that matter most to you. "So, could you spare just one or two minutes to share what you think should be our NUMBER ONE priority?" name: Confirm your vote ASAP
subject: We were going through our voting records and can’t seem to find your results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
By confirming your voting status, it’ll help solidify the results to ensure there weren’t any irregularities

This is odd, friend.

We were going through our voting records and can't seem to find your results.

Did you vote for President Trump and Republicans?

If you could, do us a quick favor and help us correct our records.

By confirming your voting status, it'll help solidify the results to ensure there weren't any irregularities.

name: Senator-elect Tim Sheehy
subject: Major update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
let’s keep winning into next year

This is Senator-elect Tim Sheehy, Friend.

I wanted to personally thank you for everything you did to help Republicans take back the Senate. With your support, we won in Montana and across the country.

_We 've ensured that President Trump will have an America First Senate Majority -- and I'm ready to get to work when it comes to passing his agenda._

**[But there's a hitch, Friend. Before we can do that, we have one more fight we need to win.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9oc5vjmsholom3l4p2aoccmudta3v5ptk5he0s8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm8o72cdh2bs)**

In Pennsylvania, the Senate race is going to a recount.
[Senate Republicans are sending field teams to Pennsylvania to help with recounts and legal challenges.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zalv6qqds3272uhiijl6k0qrk0cj7hm14m9d9sig_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm8o72cdh2bs) Democrats are doing the same. We all know how much they will raise and spend to stop us from winning more Senate seats.

**[So, Friend, I'm asking you to donate $50, $35, or even just $5 to the NRSC's Emergency Legal Fund as soon as you can >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0o1fpu8d6omk4clra8vg0ti7ph3a0u579146lpo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm8o72cdh2bs)**

******************************************************[GROW THE MAJORITY: RUSH SUPPORT](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkc268lg5sgigih5vuk8bmlppnh6h06eo2tsucio_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm8o72cdh2bs)******************************************************

**[This Fund needs to raise as much as it can as quickly as it can. By supporting it, you're supporting legal and field teams in this crucial recount effort.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl0cnm72ct6od227qsa0f63uvtggmlnvgm54jmd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm8o72cdh2bs)**

**[In the face of recounts and legal fights, this is the most important way to show your support.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zetmaivu6agbde094p57dug5p6a5u75n6il4aph0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm8o72cdh2bs)**

We won on Election Day. Let's keep winning into next year. And let's put America First.

Thank you,

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6og9cltfn9kppt2719f7ac0cftkovu0c5jh21kg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm8o72cdh2bs)
Senator-elect Tim Sheehy

******************************************************[SUPPORT THE EMERGENCY LEGAL FUND](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5dgtrtk30tj121couhdl8j3g0dbtv5jp1sepdbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm8o72cdh2bs)******************************************************

name: Michelle Steel [iPhone]
subject: We’re not in the clear yet, friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Sorry to reach out like this...

| |
---
| | | Friend, Election Day may be in the books, _but my race isn 't done yet._

_**[I'm neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0jt2b5t9aju052qfrp1d24rs9b67hp3e62k99lo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm8o72cdh2bs "I’m neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.")**_

If we're going to pull this out and keep my seat, then I'm going to need all hands on deck.

I spent every dime I had just to get through Election Day, and now I'm running on fumes. I NEED your urgent support to help me keep this fight going before the ballots are all counted.

_**[Please, can I count on you, Friend?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv0alo7h3dq21bfd52vroi4ol9f0410n3u7oping_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm8o72cdh2bs "Please, can I count on you, Friend?")**_

Thank you,

Michelle Steel
_Sent from my iPhone_

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWJZv59WNu

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Your participation in Hillsdale
College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is
requested.

Your response will only take a few
minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and
the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the
proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court
differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the
bench.

Do you agree that the role of the
Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and
NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?

YES

NO

Even worse, progressives dismayed by
recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with
additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put
it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to
a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by
four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you
today...

What is your opinion about the Supreme
Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me
using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme
Court right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form
effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the
importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the proper
role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution
instead of legislating from the bench.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

name: Bob Casey
subject: American democracy was born in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Pennsylvania Senate Victory Fund 2024
body:
We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4867%2E552475%2E3v13MT)
Peter, my priority has always been standing up for the people of Pennsylvania.
Across our Commonwealth, close to 7 million people cast their votes in a free and fair election. Our county election officials will finish counting those votes, just like they do in every election.
We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard. The American democratic process was born in Pennsylvania, and that process must and will play out.
[**I’m here to tell you that the process is _not_ done, and this race is _not_ over. Can you fund our fight to have all voices heard with a donation of $5 or more right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241118-1?refcode=em20241118-1&refcode2=4867_552475_3v13MT&akid=4867%2E552475%2E3v13MT)

name: Ben Samuels
subject: What to feel good about right now
body:
I wrote two weeks ago about the positive news from an otherwise drab election night. There's other good news in the U.S., building for decades, that shouldn't be ignored either.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5zYW11ZWxzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_._Jf5ZXBqQ91iDt9GuNrUWW7ZpOapepZDHQEOx0tnBHA?) for more
---
# [What to feel good about right now](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2440398&post_id=151667080&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjY3MDgwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzE5NDUwNzEsImV4cCI6MTczNDUzNzA3MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI0NDAzOTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.sY5cCamHnj-v-JFL5mKQRptmcP5wXnSfDvRApwXOWT0)
### I wrote two weeks ago about the positive news from an otherwise drab election night. There's other good news in the U.S., building for decades, that shouldn't be ignored either.
| | [Ben Samuels](https://substack.com/@bensamuels) and [Julie Roland](https://substack.com/@jyrola)
---
| Nov 18
---
| [](https://substack.com/@bensamuels)| | [](https://substack.com/@jyrola)
---|---|---
---
| | | [](https://substack..DCm6pEQvlFD_I9-p7cyXqSZpGHxZyZAFDSXt3rujoV8?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/bensamuels/p/what-to-feel-good-about-right-now?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---
_LT[Julie "Jinx" Roland](https://substack.com/redirect/0d213c6c-c769-41d3-9d01-f163306fc69f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is a Naval Aviator who has deployed to the South China Sea and the Persian Gulf flying helicopters. She is also a 3L at the University of San Diego School of Law and the director of the San Diego Chapter of the [Truman National Security Project](https://substack.com/redirect/a6e094d6-73b6-4cd2-b8f7-6b973045c600?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)._
* * *
Since the election--as I [wrote about last time](https://substack.com/redirect/46a93056-b2c8-4f8f-824c-0bddd9a3e18d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--the tenor of many of our conversations has trended toward either the negative or the nihilist.
It's not that we aren't concerned about the state of politics in the U.S. and in the world. We are. But it's neither healthy nor productive to focus only on what's bad in the world.
For those of you who read the news regularly--and particularly those of you who get your news from Twitter or TikTok or wherever--coverage slants almost entirely negative. Why?1
* Bad news generally happens fast, whether it's a tragedy or a natural disaster or a political scandal.
* Good news generally happens slowly. When things improve in public health or economic development or education, it usually happens over a period of years, and often can only be measured in hindsight.

A lot feels pretty gloomy right now. We wanted to focus on what's good.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5zYW11ZWxzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9hY2NvdW50IiwicCI6MTUxNjY3MDgwLCJzIjoyNDQwMzk4LCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNzMxOTQ1MDcxLCJleHAiOjE3MzQ1MzcwNzEsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.qC21DMTxRQmpkYF_HVbGdOjgmI1XSIMqo_6O7bzFm5E?)
## **Remarkable accomplishments in public health**
#### Cancer
For the past 25 years or so, the incidence of new cancers has declined slightly. But the [rates of cancer deaths have declined precipitously](https://substack.com/redirect/39b4d4db-f0de-4203-a4e3-7fadc5787494?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/39b4d4db-f0de-4203-a4e3-7fadc5787494?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It's a testament to the miracle that is modern medicine; developments in cancer treatments have saved many, many millions of lives.
#### Smoking
Another reason fewer people are dying of cancer: [fewer people are smoking](https://substack.com/redirect/445521f2-1140-479c-964a-ff4f61115589?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).2
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/445521f2-1140-479c-964a-ff4f61115589?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Cigarette use in America [is at an 80-year low](https://substack.com/redirect/3e1f3202-c7a1-4ef2-b2a0-2b7179177f28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And in 2019, [Congress passed a bipartisan law](https://substack.com/redirect/ace0b01b-a640-46a4-ac3f-d9bd1499e09b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that increased the smoking age from 18 to 21. This will save lives.
#### Polio
We are remarkably close to eradicating polio globally. If and when we're successful in doing so, it is no exaggeration to say that it will be one of the most extraordinary accomplishments in human history.
It's worth reflecting on how pervasive polio once was, and how incredible its near-eradication is:
* Polio has been around for all of recorded human history. There are Ancient Egyptian steles [from 3,500 years ago that reference polio](https://substack.com/redirect/07c05e69-b0de-4823-8551-bbc8805ceb51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* In 1952, [polio killed 3,000 American children](https://substack.com/redirect/65fb2f3d-47e4-4fdd-b3b1-04e0bfec89d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). None have died in decades. In 1988, there were [350,000 polio cases](https://substack.com/redirect/72d9093b-1403-4e54-9d0f-487cd307ffd6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) around the world. In 2024, [there have only been about 60](https://substack.com/redirect/1140ef2f-5906-4dea-8d45-36c990207b73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

Polio was a feature of American childhood for decades, and its impact is long-lasting. I have letters, written to my grandmother in the '40s, telling her to avoid certain swimming pools because of polio outbreaks. I have a cousin who died last year, in part because polio he contracted in [New Guinea during World War II](https://substack.com/redirect/87934530-5422-4372-98cb-1ceb23ba478e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) made it impossible for him to swallow towards the end of his life.
[Qui Tran](https://substack.com/redirect/fc696e02-2c1a-458f-961b-cf01b5708a7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is a martial artist and the owner of two great St. Louis restaurants ([Mai Lee](https://substack.com/redirect/d654ec0a-bd04-4589-ac30-e473cf1d720d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [Nudo House](https://substack.com/redirect/77a97914-3a40-45d4-a262-b5ac8fbf64e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). He had to stop competing because of [complications from post-polio](https://substack.com/redirect/f84fb1cd-d667-4c82-8694-798ab360654e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after he contracted the disease in a Vietnamese refugee camp [as a baby](https://substack.com/redirect/c9406ec7-ecc9-489f-85e2-c6c296b6dd41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the '70s.
I bring all of this up to say: in the _very_ recent past, polio was pervasive. The extraordinary progress we've made so far in its eradication is cause for celebration.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2440398&post_id=151667080&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjY3MDgwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzE5NDUwNzEsImV4cCI6MTczNDUzNzA3MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI0NDAzOTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.sY5cCamHnj-v-JFL5mKQRptmcP5wXnSfDvRApwXOWT0)
#### More accomplishments in public health
* Deaths from HIV and AIDS have been declining for decades. With proper care, it is both preventable and treatable. The [death rate has fallen by more than 50% since 2010](https://substack.com/redirect/82d11d4f-c728-49ce-bb5a-6728d2554e17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and it continues to decline.
* Likewise, [continued breakthroughs with the malaria vaccine](https://substack.com/redirect/2368b559-413f-47be-9137-f4583c6b591f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) will save hundreds of thousands of lives per year, and reduce the number of annual cases of malaria--which was, in 2022, a staggering [249 million](https://substack.com/redirect/47775d27-2bd9-4fbc-8dab-c4694e45ecab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* Just a few weeks ago, the FDA approved the first [new treatment for schizophrenia in 70 years](https://substack.com/redirect/2d4f75e1-a1eb-4434-ad59-4924936b86f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). It's been hailed as a "[game changer](https://substack.com/redirect/79c6efec-7374-4049-a90c-4fd264901540?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" drug. Somewhere [between 650,000 and 1.7 million Americans have schizophrenia](https://substack.com/redirect/f9123323-eef6-4caf-8679-42f241b9dfd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg),3 which [costs the government $170 billion per year](https://substack.com/redirect/ef4c54e6-330e-440f-82c4-6c0cc23e9aa9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Not only will new treatment improve lives, but it will also save taxpayers money.

This list is hardly exhaustive. But we're making huge progress in public health in noteworthy ways.
## **Environmental Accomplishments**
#### Ozone
When we were younger, there was a lot of talk about the decay in the earth's [ozone layer](https://substack.com/redirect/bdecb491-f064-4541-9f48-2f1eb93f5b62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). You don't really hear much about that anymore. Why?
[Because we fixed it!](https://substack.com/redirect/f00fe787-ef57-4c5d-83b8-b641999dddf9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) As things stand, the ozone layer is on track to be repaired by 2066, and sooner in certain parts of the world.
#### Other good news
* Despite being one of the cleanest and most reliable sources of energy, nuclear energy, plagued by bad PR and several high-profile incidents, had been in decline for decades. But it's [experiencing a renaissance](https://substack.com/redirect/fa045e5e-39f6-4fd0-871b-2a28257ff5ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and it's a huge part of our efforts to decarbonize energy production.
* As the technologies improve, the [cost of renewable energy continues to decline](https://substack.com/redirect/f3f2be5b-e39b-427d-9bd2-ad3fd2dd8eb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) across all sources. The more that happens, the more decarbonization will happen even without robust government support.
* In 2019, [renewable energy surpassed coal-powered energy production for the first time](https://substack.com/redirect/63374ef1-1957-483c-9c44-ddd8266debac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). That should only continue to accelerate.

## **Gay marriage and social tolerance**
Support for same-sex marriage has been [climbing for 30 years](https://substack.com/redirect/4bee5283-66e7-4f2a-b712-3487652abc80?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Nothing about the recent election cycles has changed that:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4bee5283-66e7-4f2a-b712-3487652abc80?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The same is true for support for interracial marriage, by the way. In 1958, 4% of Americans supported interracial marriage; [today, it's 94%](https://substack.com/redirect/0a986aa9-c9f0-4e56-b838-95713e594c8a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
## **The kids are alright**
* The [teenage pregnancy rate has dropped dramatically](https://substack.com/redirect/ad78e4ff-d539-4a9d-b95d-2aac4c8f1fa6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the past 30 years. That's especially true for 15- to 17-year-olds, for whom the teenage pregnancy rate has dropped by 82%.
* Since its peak in the early '90s, the [youth crime rate has dropped dramatically as well](https://substack.com/redirect/c9d55d99-f45e-4ad2-b25a-40eb4795a9c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Youth arrests for violent crimes have dropped 67% since 2006, and even more dramatically than that since its peak in the mid-'90s.

What does this mean? Fewer children are making decisions as teenagers that could negatively and irreversibly alter the course of their adult lives.
There are other positive trends too:
* Corporal punishment like spanking is [associated with worse physical and mental health, poorer educational outcomes, and increased perpetration of violence](https://substack.com/redirect/76622151-c76c-47c2-8b7a-cbbe21c23464?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). So the [decline in corporal punishment of children](https://substack.com/redirect/3ed903f7-6e79-4971-acb1-4e241a849c40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is a positive development.
* Because of safer cars, seatbelt laws, and car seat laws, [far fewer children under 13 are dying in car accidents](https://substack.com/redirect/f6b898c5-43e5-461e-8b17-d069e30afbc2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) than at the peak in the 1970s.
* [Juvenile diabetes](https://substack.com/redirect/572ab625-3cc4-480d-abbd-c55ba4769bf0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)4--[once a death sentence](https://substack.com/redirect/3e258840-5c98-42a5-81f6-7c36c55a8445?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--is largely treatable with the right interventions. There's still work to do, but [people are living far longer than ever before](https://substack.com/redirect/0c50e18f-4572-47ec-8f97-6adb8d5c07c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5zYW11ZWxzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9hY2NvdW50IiwicCI6MTUxNjY3MDgwLCJzIjoyNDQwMzk4LCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNzMxOTQ1MDcxLCJleHAiOjE3MzQ1MzcwNzEsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.qC21DMTxRQmpkYF_HVbGdOjgmI1XSIMqo_6O7bzFm5E?)

## **Wins on election day**
#### Support for workers
In a powerful show of support for workers, voters in Missouri, Alaska, and Nebraska said "yes" to measures that raise wages and secure paid sick leave.
In Missouri, [Proposition A](https://substack.com/redirect/0b5ea55d-b734-48a5-be8a-a78ae887512e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) establishes a path to a $15 minimum wage by 2026, with built-in paid sick leave. [Alaska's Measure 1](https://substack.com/redirect/369b2bbf-0e04-4d2d-984c-763de2080513?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) will increase the minimum wage to $15 by 2027, plus sick leave and protections for worker's right to avoid mandatory on-the-job political or religious meetings. And Nebraska voters passed [Initiative 436](https://substack.com/redirect/87722b40-0eac-4b8e-a9c4-db63b6b1cca5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), making it a requirement for businesses to provide up to seven days of earned paid sick leave for employees.
This commitment to fair pay and health security is an encouraging sign that voters want fairer labor practices.
#### Abortion access
We've written before about [the importance of abortion access](https://substack.com/redirect/0edf16b5-396a-46d8-89a9-d97b8c276d77?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and Ben recently wrote about the fact that the [abortion access ballot measure did well](https://substack.com/redirect/576d8359-b523-4346-aa2c-6d394a3d5b45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). It's worth digging into that more.
Voters are--on the whole--emphatically protecting abortion on a state level.5 This election, the people of [Arizona](https://substack.com/redirect/c0dc557b-6474-4362-aaa0-235ac45f832f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Colorado](https://substack.com/redirect/43416146-f1a0-4bc2-bbb4-d3d889620832?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Maryland](https://substack.com/redirect/e1b1ea0e-6619-40f3-8d72-356432a5927a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Missouri](https://substack.com/redirect/2a7de62b-b904-43a0-a4bd-87e11b50cfed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Montana](https://substack.com/redirect/6d724df9-7184-463f-b310-6e5b433af697?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Nevada](https://substack.com/redirect/0b435d59-582d-4604-9f60-26dbf1eef330?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [New York](https://substack.com/redirect/e0e4ac72-b3ad-456b-a4bf-6e6d0f42ef54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) all voted to enshrine the right to an abortion in their state constitutions. In doing so, voters in these states have forged a path forward that other states may follow in 2026 and beyond.
#### Other wins
In Nevada, voters approved [Question 4](https://substack.com/redirect/3a4843cd-aeac-4613-95b4-ed903915475a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a ballot measure to abolish slavery and involuntary servitude as criminal punishments. The fact that this was allowed in the first place is problematic, but Nevada voters showed up and did the right thing here.
Maybe these votes feel like little wins, but they're not--in fact, they signify a massive victory for all those who used their collective voice to change policies despite not being in the legislature. When we count on elected officials to solve our problems, sometimes they move too slowly (or not at all, or backward...). Ballot measures and propositions offer a way to return power to the people.
Voters are standing up for their rights and freedoms, and that's worth noting and celebrating.
## Final thoughts
We're not telling you to ignore the negative. But sometimes, in the face of seemingly insurmountable despair, all it takes is a little positivity to change the narrative and remind us that not all is lost.
In fact, acknowledging the good news that comes from good work is critical if we're going to _keep up the good work._ We're not helpless. Progress is underway. There is hope.
_**Feel free to share this post with someone who will enjoy it.** (If you're reading this email because someone sent it to you, [please consider subscribing](https://substack.com/redirect/d32937f0-d1c7-464e-8299-3450211bc68c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).)_
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5zYW11ZWxzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9hY2NvdW50IiwicCI6MTUxNjY3MDgwLCJzIjoyNDQwMzk4LCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNzMxOTQ1MDcxLCJleHAiOjE3MzQ1MzcwNzEsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.qC21DMTxRQmpkYF_HVbGdOjgmI1XSIMqo_6O7bzFm5E?)
P.S. For those of you who are paying attention to [defeating sports gambling in Missouri](https://substack.com/redirect/a5be7dc5-952b-4ac0-937b-cbc31ab7fb21?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), here's [some good potential news](https://substack.com/redirect/6e254842-3e56-4d01-9200-7ac413c6ed05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). It's not over quite yet...
_This article reflects LT Roland 's personal views and does not represent the views of the United States Navy._
1
This, and also: bad news sells. Nothing we can do about that.
2
For good measure: this includes e-cigarettes, which means that traditional cigarette use is in an even more precipitous decline. As of September, [e-cigarette and vaping among youth are at their lowest point in a decade](https://substack.com/redirect/e0af57ad-610b-4ac2-80b0-b33beabc0dc2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
3
This is a back-of-the-envelope calculation: it's not the easiest population to survey since [people with schizophrenia are so much more likely to be homeless](https://substack.com/redirect/98db9820-10b6-4e93-a2a0-544564b91411?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). But the math here: there are [258 million American adults as of the 2020 Census](https://substack.com/redirect/ac804980-20a8-42f4-bb3d-88d04912d108?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--schizophrenia is generally an adult-onset disease--and between [0.25% and 0.64% of the population](https://substack.com/redirect/f9123323-eef6-4caf-8679-42f241b9dfd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is estimated to have schizophrenia.
4
These days, also known as Type 1 diabetes.
5
Trump spent much of his campaign trumpeting his overturning of _Roe_ , saying the [decision should be left to the states](https://substack.com/redirect/3867240b-74a7-4776-9a76-5fafebbb9201?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). So it's a big deal that people in states around the U.S. voted to protect abortion access.

| MassGOP Stands Firm in Support of Legislative Audit
---
---
| Boston, MA- The Massachusetts Republican Party stands in full support of State Auditor Diana DiZoglio's mandated authority to audit the legislature. An overwhelming 72% of Massachusetts voters approved granting the State Auditor this power. Any attempt by the legislature to backpedal or evade an independent audit blatantly disregards the will of the voters.
"Transparency and accountability are non-negotiable," said MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale. "The legislature must honor the clear mandate of the people and ensure this critical audit is conducted by the Auditor herself, as intended by voters. We recognize that some elected Republicans supported the recent rule change as a temporary measure until the law takes effect in January. That does not change the fact that Republicans stand united in their commitment to enacting the law exactly as it was written in the ballot question. We hope that the Democratic supermajority resists any attempt to subvert democracy by challenging the ballot question in the courts. Anything less is a betrayal of public trust." ###
---

clean_body: | | | | | | == | MassGOP Stands Firm in Support of Legislative Audit | Boston, MA- The Massachusetts Republican Party stands in full support of State Auditor Diana DiZoglio's mandated authority to audit the legislature. An overwhelming 72% of Massachusetts voters approved granting the State Auditor this power. Any attempt by the legislature to backpedal or evade an independent audit blatantly disregards the will of the voters. "Transparency and accountability are non-negotiable," said MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale. "The legislature must honor the clear mandate of the people and ensure this critical audit is conducted by the Auditor herself, as intended by voters. We recognize that some elected Republicans supported the recent rule change as a temporary measure until the law takes effect in January. That does not change the fact that Republicans stand united in their commitment to enacting the law exactly as it was written in the ballot question. We hope that the Democratic supermajority resists any attempt to subvert democracy by challenging the ballot question in the courts. Anything less is a betrayal of public trust." ### | MassGOP | == | == == | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street, Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | |

subject: Leg Swelling in Aging: What to Know & What to Do
body:
| | | | [](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
---
| | Groundbreaking studies have revealed a brand-new remedy for improving circulation and relieving occasional swelling.
If your top drawer is full of compression socks...
Or you’ve tried making diet changes recommended by a friend or doctor...
Yet you look down...
And you STILL see swollen, puffy feet and ankles.
You might feel defeated. Ready to give up. And just accept that this is a part of aging and something you must learn to ignore...
But I’ve got GREAT NEWS...

You can improve your circulation and blood flow with [**THIS Antarctic nutrient**](https://link.myamericanpatriot.). These symptoms may point to circulation issues, which cause blood and fluid to pool in the tissue around your feet and ankles.
Fortunately, researchers found that seniors with high levels of a little-known antarctic nutrient had significantly lowered blood-flow risks.
[**⇒ Leg Swelling in Aging: What to Know & What to Do**](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
As always–to being & staying on The Path together, **-Dr. Chad Walding, DPT, ISSA Nutrition Specialist** **Co-Founder NativePath**

subject: FW: We did it! Now it’s time to deliver for America
body:

Last week, after the House majority was secured by Republicans, I sent you a message hoping that you would weigh in and let me know what issues are most important to you and your family. And I was surprised to see that you had not completed the survey. We have a real opportunity to get America back on the right track, and I hope that you will take just a moment and complete our survey. **[Please take my 2025 Legislative Priorities Survey and let me know which issues are most important to you and your family.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQk5wBGIy40Aggm_gdG3ENGi5cF0Z5uNcBE_1rV7PKu8-7c72wziT4tPAB_Ck)**

From: Brad FinstadSent: Friday, November 15, 2024Subject: We did it! Now it's time to deliver for America
---

We did it! Republicans have officially secured the House majority. With a united Congress and President Trump back in the White House, we’re ready to get to work on the issues that matter most to you. My team and I will be laser-focused on tackling inflation, strengthening the economy, fighting for our farmers, and securing the southern border. But to make sure we’re prioritizing the right issues, I need to hear from you directly.
**[Please take my 2025 Legislative Priorities Survey and let me know which issues are most important to you and your family.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQk5wBGIy40Aggm_gdG3ENGi5cF0Z5uNcBE_1rV7PKu8-7c72wziT4tPAB_Ck)**
---
| [ TAKE THE 2025 LEGISLATIVE PRIORITIES SURVEY NOW](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQk5wBGIy40Aggm_gdG3ENGi5cF0Z5uNcBE_1rV7PKu8-7c72wziT4tPAB_Ck)
---
The voices of hard working Americans like you spoke volumes on Election Day. You made clear that you want change, and you want change NOW. We know the challenges you face—from rising costs to concerns over national security due to our open southern border and conflicts abroad—and I can assure you that I’ll work hard to address them. By taking this survey, you’ll help set our agenda and ensure we’re championing policies that reflect your values and most urgent concerns. **[Please take my 2025 Legislative Priorities Survey and let me know which issues are most important to you and your family.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQk5wBGIy40Aggm_gdG3ENGi5cF0Z5uNcBE_1rV7PKu8-7c72wziT4tPAB_Ck)** Thank you again for your commitment and for standing with us in this journey.
---
| [TAKE THE 2025 LEGISLATIVE PRIORITIES SURVEY NOW](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQk5wBGIy40Aggm_gdG3ENGi5cF0Z5uNcBE_1rV7PKu8-7c72wziT4tPAB_Ck)
---
Thank you,

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: President Trump wins. Now what?
body:
| Hi Peter, President Trump has won reelection; what does that mean for investors? Let's discuss. **As of writing, Republicans have won the White House and a Senate majority, and may win a House majority. 1** Markets reacted to the news by rallying to new record highs.2 Does that indicate they see president-elect Trump's promises as favorable for stocks? Or is it simply a reaction to an end to election-related uncertainty? History can offer us some clues.3 On average, stocks tend to rise after an election after a small short-term drop. But you can see in the chart below that the last two elections have resulted in an immediate pop.
---
|
---
Will this year's positivity remain? We'll see. While past performance is a guide, it's not a guarantee. Markets are likely to remain volatile in the weeks ahead as investors digest data and adjust their positions ahead of the new year. **Longer term, what can we expect for the economy?** The Federal Reserve recently voted to cut interest rates again.4 While small rate cuts may not make an immediate impact on the consumer rates you see, they start to add up over time. If the Fed continues on the rate-cutting path, we could expect to see a cumulative impact on mortgage rates, credit cards, and other consumer and business debt next year. President-elect Trump campaigned on major economic issues such as tariffs and tax cuts. Generally speaking, tariffs are considered to be inflationary because they increase the cost of goods.5 However, the economic impact will largely depend on the size and breadth of any tariffs imposed as well as overall economic conditions. Tax cuts generally help spur growth (though they can add to the national deficit), and we can expect that many provisions of the 2017-era cuts will be extended after 2025.5 Overall, we'll see what the new administration chooses to prioritize and how much sway Congress will exert on the agenda. **Bottom line: who wins an election is just one factor affecting markets and investors.** As we approach the final weeks of 2024, we're thinking ahead to 2025 and evaluating moves for our clients. We're optimistic about where markets and the economy are headed and will reach out with updates as we have them. **If you've got big feelings about the election or feel pressured to make some big portfolio changes, please reach out.** We'll schedule a time to chat and talk through your thoughts. Your confidence and comfort are my biggest priorities. Warmly,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6Ik9wYURmTGJCRVQ0cUFZZSIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)

name: Andrew Yang
subject: The Solution in Plain Sight
body:
This week on the podcast, a new front in the democracy reform movement has been opened up. It’s allowing people to vote by phone. | |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=733fe88690&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
|
---
| Hello, I hope that your weekend was great. Trump’s appointments are coming in every hour. Some of them are better than others. Of course, the most unprecedented is to see what Elon Musk can do as one of the co-efficiency czars. I’m in the school of thought that, yes, there are many extraneous expenses and employees in the massive federal government, but you don’t want to take a wrecking ball to it because you might need something or someone and there are a lot of legacy responsibilities, so you have to go in with a scalpel. You also want to give everyone some notice and time to adjust, both within the government and among the many people that are touched by various programs. But we are likely going to see the wrecking ball approach. This regime is going to seriously engage with its stated missions and will let very little stand in its way. That’s how they won, after all. I’m particularly focused on whether they genuinely can deliver a better standard of living for working class voters. The history of the Republican Party under Trump has been measures that exacerbate the plight of the have-nots combined with symbolic gestures that gin up energy. I’ve been trying to improve people’s circumstances since my presidential run started in 2018. Right now Humanity Forward is lobbying for a return of the enhanced child tax credit, which is the biggest anti-poverty opportunity on the table. There is an expressed openness among Republicans to doing something that their base would like; JD Vance for example was very bullish on the CTC during the campaign. There is hope on this front. Bigger picture, I have been working on reforming the political system so that it can respond to people and solve problems. Forward Party got many new members last week and helped elect 25 new office holders, bringing the national total to 65. That’s not bad for a scrappy upstart party. I’ve been a big proponent of ballot initiatives for open primaries and ranked choice voting, most of which had a very tough Election Day. This week on the [podcast](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=11d65fc93b&e=0f227c2ae3), a new front in the democracy reform movement has been opened up. It’s allowing people to vote by phone. “Why are our politics so dysfunctional? It’s because a small proportion of extreme voters vote in our primaries, making our politics more extreme,” says Bradley Tusk the founder of MobileVoting.org. “One way of opening up the electorate is primary reform, which I’m all for. But the other way is to allow people to vote on our phones.” “Fundamentally, how do we make the primary electorate bigger?” Bradley asks. “Make it easier to vote. We all run our lives on our phones – we might be able to triple the number of people who vote in primaries if we can do it on our phones.” That would indeed transform politics.
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=364bf091a2&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| Bradley explains, “We need a solution that can be advanced at the local level, without an act of Congress. Individual towns and cities can decide to use mobile voting technology to complement their existing systems – we can make it so that each digital vote actually prints out a paper ballot and can integrate with existing ballots so no one is nervous about how it gets processed or counted.” Now, I know what you’re thinking. Who’s going to build this? Here’s the phenomenal thing: Bradley already did it. “We got started back in 2020 and I spent $20 million building it. It’s already been used by servicemembers stationed at military bases and piloted in multiple states. Now, any city or town can use it for free.” Yes, free. This is all a philanthropic venture. Why is he doing it? “My family immigrated to this country for a better life, and it happened,” Bradley says. “I spent years working in politics and technology and genuinely think this is the last and best hope we have for democracy.” He may be right about that. Forward is going to be helping to make mobile voting the norm – we already have Forward-affiliated mayors who are interested. I love the idea of voting on your phone; the leaders who make it happen in America will have changed the system for good. Plus, last I checked I’m the candidate from the future, and in the future we definitely vote on our phones, don’t we? Bradley is leading the way to make it happen. For my interview with Bradley Tusk click [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=8a0d83a549&e=0f227c2ae3). To check out [mobilevoting.org](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=ada9268172&e=0f227c2ae3) click [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=04302d1b5a&e=0f227c2ae3). To order Bradley’s new book ‘Vote With Your Phone’ click [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=84befe8c89&e=0f227c2ae3). To fuel the political movement that will be embracing mobile voting head to [Forward](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=7ce04e262f&e=0f227c2ae3) – let’s go build the future.
---
| **
Andrew Yang**
Co-Chair, Forward Party
[forwardparty.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=21e370c568&e=0f227c2ae3)
[andrewyang.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=503e5553bc&e=0f227c2ae3)
---

| Good grief, Peter. The Trump clown show continues to both surprise and scare us. Just look at who Trump picked as the next Director of National Intelligence: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T975dc6e8-6180-44c8-bc35-5891ee7680dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Tulsi Gabbard, a former Democrat who turned her back on fellow Democrats and our country, is now Trump’s right-hand man to support Russia. And that should cause major concerns for the war in Ukraine and the future of NATO. Gabbard will buddy up with Russia, Syria, and other adversaries of the U.S. She doesn’t have the experience to direct or manage our intelligence systems. It’s become obvious that this administration will not protect our best interests over the next four years. [Blue Amp is fighting to stand up against Trump’s extreme agenda – so if you want to protect our democracy, please chip in a few dollars or whatever you can spare to support our mission right now.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfed49871-6c72-4c3c-b930-6bb94bf5bbe9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9dfc7855-5887-4b68-9a8a-41e0cf3cf76c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Matt
subject: Sorry to bother you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
But I wanted to make sure you saw the headline from the New York Post

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7h12iqjtuc07j6mk03ji9g1qi10o2mm05o1pt5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm2pb4cjh2bs)

Friend,

Hey, it's Matt, Dave McCormick's Campaign Manager. Sorry to bother you, but I wanted to make sure you saw the headline from the New York Post.

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zc16ljr5bbro55r80ettohgkb8469kbfn401r4fg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm2pb4cjh2bs)

The AP declared Dave McCormick the winner of Pennsylvania's senate seat, but now the Dems refuse to concede the race. **[Will you join our fight to support Dave against the Dems' dirty tricks?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zng98f559ju2ak5l37mglqgs8f0oi83as4of4pa0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm2pb4cjh2bs)**

******************************************************[DONATE](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8nb8s2k50u56c5jd7p3ub297ql6tbqhkbefdcfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm2pb4cjh2bs)******************************************************

As the New York Post reported, "A shady Democratic attorney...is now at the heart of a desperate legal effort to snatch Pennsylvania's Senate race away from its rightful winner -- Republican Dave McCormick...Marc Elias, a longtime Democratic election attorney and dirty trickster, is attempting to force the Pennsylvania Senate race into a recount, even though it was called for McCormick by the Associated Press on Thursday, with even the state's most liberal news outlets echoing the call since."

The fact is, Dave McCormick won! We need to make sure we have the resources to fight against whatever dirty tricks are played. **[Will you chip in $25 now?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zh7m6q9tch73hlt1fht61fuj5u1hp6ro9op0qe58_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm2pb4cjh2bs)**

Dave was able to win because of your support. We truly appreciate everything that you did to push Dave over the finish line. **[Anything you are able to chip in to help us battle back is very appreciated.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2za41avugotoc14v55l0uqtrm25f150neqi2mfpvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhm2pb4cjh2bs)**

Thank you!
Matt

Sorry to bother you, but I wanted to make sure you saw the headline from the New York Post. The AP declared Dave McCormick the winner of Pennsylvania's senate seat, but now the Dems refuse to concede the race. ****************************************************************************************************** As the New York Post reported, "A shady Democratic attorney...is now at the heart of a desperate legal effort to snatch Pennsylvania's Senate race away from its rightful winner -- Republican Dave McCormick...Marc Elias, a longtime Democratic election attorney and dirty trickster, is attempting to force the Pennsylvania Senate race into a recount, even though it was called for McCormick by the Associated Press on Thursday, with even the state's most liberal news outlets echoing the call since." The fact is, Dave McCormick won! We need to make sure we have the resources to fight against whatever dirty tricks are played. Dave was able to win because of your support. We truly appreciate everything that you did to push Dave over the finish line. Thank you! Matt ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111824_1&amount=25]

| Friend, Our first FEC-mandated Fundraising deadline is approaching fast...
Here at the Team Imer PAC we are committed to building up an infrastructure to help take back our state, and hold our majorities in both houses of congress in 2026.
The 2026 election season will start very soon, and your support today will help us not only crush our end-of-month goal but will show the naysayers in the RINO establishment that we are committed to doing the hard work to save our country.
Will you help us prove the RINO's wrong?

name: Breaking News Alerts
subject: Please don’t cry.. Pete Hegseth will live on in our hearts forever.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson

Here’s the sad news in case you missed it.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8f6229e96f7d42c29daf4ea2da0c5807&_e=j_D9IS89OX3KwTRVhDQlz8Af138tKFHKGuQa3Y6IZW4JzcDJr5h2eWUe-xRUJhv52XB9k4ykrYfM_hNxmX52R00OM58l-A94gPvVJBG1NwE-nPVHova1B_chaAl43OBBuat8lL1gXS4NcsyWwkB-sj_zSfGp0d4rgv1mweKhpmoYeDt-__SAkLzuVVeIgOXWhI2uQlhs96WplxCglsz6Uyz9Nj3-B0adyeJHvsxS0fKQClXzbkp2as0pxEbuakKdoQUFVTWhY9aoY5ylU-0c01w5x5gp9uBAxG3HvWKXXvb0JiKwBsCzlFjWOPVV2Xc4fL9n4GqFtpgKbNpRG10_1N35aKcEQLgcwrM3J2QNiYJ703_EYTNOobjCttdp3CyKp2QwGjUuE5UQ9kzqHF5CBo_Dh2iJfTnvsmG3CQrJ-_hkbq0T08v4BrQkXcqAhi9o) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8f6229e96f7d42c29daf4ea2da0c5807&_e=j_D9IS89OX3KwTRVhDQlz8Af138tKFHKGuQa3Y6IZW4JzcDJr5h2eWUe-xRUJhv52XB9k4ykrYfM_hNxmX52R00OM58l-A94gPvVJBG1NwE-nPVHova1B_chaAl43OBBuat8lL1gXS4NcsyWwkB-sj_zSfGp0d4rgv1mweKhpmoYeDt-__SAkLzuVVeIgOXWhI2uQlhs96WplxCglsz6Uyz9Nj3-B0adyeJHvsxS0fKQClXzbkp2as0pxEbuakKdoQUFVTWhY9aoY5ylU-0c05HaLYeBfgI2-PRqzoU2Pl9OGxYxQl8VoGW6Gie7ZKuOFRJgZuIjtnigrbNQ9gt5h8IEui4h9mClXm5jR8rlEl6IBg_nTiRKul-V10dB3E6TTCrasrgL2-_lt_gZNPjxdub-QzLpmASaBQtxaG2kJT0RHUhLsrNssB074NBQvBFR) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" The Second World Wars"** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8f6229e96f7d42c29daf4ea2da0c5807&_e=j_D9IS89OX3KwTRVhDQlz8Af138tKFHKGuQa3Y6IZW4JzcDJr5h2eWUe-xRUJhv52XB9k4ykrYfM_hNxmX52R00OM58l-A94gPvVJBG1NwE-nPVHova1B_chaAl43OBBuat8lL1gXS4NcsyWwkB-sj_zSfGp0d4rgv1mweKhpmoYeDt-__SAkLzuVVeIgOXWhI2uQlhs96WplxCglsz6Uyz9Nj3-B0adyeJHvsxS0fKQClXzbkp2as0pxEbuakKdoQUFVTWhY9aoY5ylU-0c00fX5-ZFtVUF34jFf8ovqXwvUCse2542GMs9Q4ro93HP3eBCLL31D9Cgf2O1cL1pCIxaDCdPpMkQFyQ7kt5XfLdqzjFo1ZcneYNQpbt-UO8TDq78coNlnx31cAYKDItD81NczlA2Y4BekX7ww5H0jXKR2TD66bE2NHYKHSIOn_3S)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **" The Second World Wars"** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8f6229e96f7d42c29daf4ea2da0c5807&_e=j_D9IS89OX3KwTRVhDQlz8Af138tKFHKGuQa3Y6IZW4JzcDJr5h2eWUe-xRUJhv52XB9k4ykrYfM_hNxmX52R00OM58l-A94gPvVJBG1NwE-nPVHova1B_chaAl43OBBuat8lL1gXS4NcsyWwkB-sj_zSfGp0d4rgv1mweKhpmoYeDt-__SAkLzuVVeIgOXWhI2uQlhs96WplxCglsz6Uyz9Nj3-B0adyeJHvsxS0fKQClXzbkp2as0pxEbuakKdoQUFVTWhY9aoY5ylU-0c02naif-dbiPzBQjvQkQOt-MFiwZljip3Fpgrs1eDVpe46PXpUPRiyNcTzHSTTSM8viFvH0tzxfcr8fzIHj1gMQY3NInGOVXIylB67g3DBWTTi_bYrzRExd_4WMPP7mTf7jbYsEOf57HOwiFLDMzpCiTR4515vBfZeWQrx3-qy44V)**

name: PragerU
subject: Something big is happening in America…
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Dear Fellow American,

Something big is happening in America. Across the country, our
values - freedom, responsibility, patriotism - are making a
comeback. We're seeing a shift, but we're just getting started.

Here's the reality: PragerU has become a movement. In 2024
alone, PragerU videos have been viewed by almost 60 million
people. On YouTube, more than 60% of our video views are from
young Americans under 35. And these videos are not just being
watched; they're changing minds. In fact, in our recent survey,
70% of our viewers reported changing their stance on an important
issue after watching.

Look at our recent reach in some of the most critical states in
the nation:

Texas: 40M views

California: 20.6M views

Arizona: 18.3M views

New York: 10.1M views

Florida: 10M views

Georgia: 5.2M views

Pennsylvania: 5M views

North Carolina: 4.8M views

And so many more…

We're igniting a passion for truth and empowering the next
generation to stand strong in their beliefs. But now is not the
time to sit back. Now is the time to push harder, reach further,
and make a deeper impact.

This is where YOU come in. Your support today is what fuels us
tomorrow. Every dollar you give goes directly toward:

Reaching millions more through social media, schools, and
communities.

Creating powerful new content that cuts through the noise
and stands up for America.

Empowering college students to stand up for truth and
defend Western Civilization.

Equipping parents and teachers with resources to champion
your values.

This moment is critical. We're making strides, but to keep this
momentum going, we need every supporter to dig deep. We can't
take our foot off the gas. We now have the chance we have been
praying for.

Donate now to keep PragerU strong and growing. Every single
gift counts in this fight for a better education in America. For
every child, every student, and every proud patriot who believes
in this country, now is the time to act.

Thank you for standing with us, for believing that what seems
impossible can be done, and for being part of a movement that
puts young Americans first.

With gratitude and resolve,

Marissa Streit

CEO of PragerU

Donate Now

Copyright © 2024 PragerU

All rights reserved.

Privacy Policy

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

TheFederalistWire.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176
Contact Email:
today@thefederalistwire.com

© Copyright
TheFederalistWire.com All Rights Reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system August 17, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://emails.dcdailyjournal.com/p/isIIuU9W-N

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://emails.dcdailyjournal.com/p/osIIuU9W-N

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-76803624114-echo3-53E1407EC49F3E1E6B539E3291EDE680@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: It’s official, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
It’s official, Peter: I watched Mike Johnson spend millions to keep the House by the thinnest of margins. I watched Donald Trump win another term in power. Now, I need your help before midnight. **[_Here’s my plan: If 2,000 Democrats chip in $14 before midnight, it will help us get a head start on this next election cycle, outraise Trump and his extreme Republican allies, and kickstart the process of flipping the House in the next election. Can I count on you? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97276798/512882211/-1810142050?amount=14&refcode=20241118_em_fr_b1_raja_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjA0NzQzMS1jYmE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=60Jbc2ujX07wfcsBvWvyBnWEy3gCagkyCZOfeEo0i8Y=)** Peter, I know it seems early to start planning for the next election. But if we don’t band together in this difficult moment, we could be locked out of power for decades to come. **[_I can’t let that happen, Peter, so I’m asking you to step up with $14 before midnight. Every dollar you give will help us defeat Trump’s Republicans and protect the Democratic progress we’ve made together.
