* **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas can schedule Robert Roberson's execution -- but lawmakers still expect his testimony first,** " Texas Tribune's **Kayla Guo** -- "Texas can proceed with scheduling the execution of death row inmate **Robert Roberson** despite his claims of innocence and calls for a new trial. But a Texas House committee, whose members believe Roberson was convicted based on junk science, still expects him to provide them with testimony about his conviction and appeals.

Roberson was convicted of capital murder in 2003 for the death of his 2-year-old daughter, Nikki, who was diagnosed with shaken baby syndrome.

In October, Roberson's execution was halted at the 11th hour after the Texas House Criminal Jurisprudence Committee subpoenaed him to testify. That set off a [separation of powers conflict](https://substack.com/redirect/ffd4b84b-1946-43a6-a7b9-292c9bcd233e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) between the legislative and executive branches, with the Texas Supreme Court staying Roberson's execution to consider which branch's authority trumped whose in this circumstance.

The [court ruled](https://substack.com/redirect/1200eccc-4aaf-4dce-9dd6-99bb8b8edd25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Nov. 15 that a legislative committee's authority to compel testimony through a subpoena could not be used to override the executive branch's authority to carry out Roberson's death sentence as scheduled.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/1fbde91a-02ea-4e0d-8292-e9621074c66f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
That allows the prosecuting district attorney to now request the scheduling of a new execution date. A new date cannot fall within 90 days of the request. Anderson County District Attorney **Allyson Mitchell** , who sought Roberson's last execution date, did not respond to a message asking if and when she intended to request a new execution warrant.

After the Nov. 15 court ruling, **Gretchen Sween** , Roberson's attorney, asked the state to refrain from requesting a new date.

"The ancillary benefit to Mr. Roberson of staying his execution hopefully gives time for those with power to address a grave wrong to see what is apparent to anyone who gives the medical evidence fair consideration: his daughter Nikki's death was a tragedy not a crime; Robert is innocent," Sween said in a statement.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/1fbde91a-02ea-4e0d-8292-e9621074c66f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Roberson's attorneys have at least three months to file any new appeals in his criminal case. The courts have denied all of his appeals thus far, most recently on procedural grounds -- so it was unclear what remaining legal recourse he had.

Gov. **Greg Abbott** also has the authority to grant a one-time 30-day reprieve. But he had declined to do so leading up to Roberson's scheduled execution in October, and he [excoriated House lawmakers](https://substack.com/redirect/618a7faf-6923-4108-85e6-9f43405774b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for interfering in Roberson's sentence.
Though the Texas Supreme Court cleared the way for Roberson's execution, it also noted that there was now plenty of time for the Texas Department of Criminal Justice to produce Roberson for testimony in response to the legislative subpoena.

"If the committee still wishes to obtain his testimony, we assume that the department can reasonably accommodate a new subpoena," Justice **Evan A. Young** wrote. "To the extent that an accommodation is not forthcoming, so long as a subpoena issues in a way that does not inevitably block a scheduled execution, nothing in our holding prevents the committee from pursuing judicial relief in the ordinary way to compel a witness's testimony."

After the court's decision Nov. 15, State Reps.**Joe Moody** , D-El Paso, and **Jeff Leach** , R-Plano, who have spearheaded the effort to win Roberson a new trial, said in a statement that they would seek to follow through on the committee's subpoena to obtain Roberson's testimony.

"The Supreme Court strongly reinforced our belief that our Committee can indeed obtain Mr. Roberson's testimony and made clear that it expects the Executive Branch of government to accommodate us in doing so," Moody and Leach said in a statement. "That has been our position all along, and we look forward to working with the Executive Branch to do just that."" ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Texas can schedule Robert Roberson's execution -- but lawmakers still expect his testimony first, " Texas Tribune's Kayla Guo -- "Texas can proceed with scheduling the execution of death row inmate Robert Roberson despite his claims of innocence and calls for a new trial. But a Texas House committee, whose members believe Roberson was convicted based on junk science, still expects him to provide them with testimony about his conviction and appeals. Roberson was convicted of capital murder in 2003 for the death of his 2-year-old daughter, Nikki, who was diagnosed with shaken baby syndrome. In October, Roberson's execution was halted at the 11th hour after the Texas House Criminal Jurisprudence Committee subpoenaed him to testify. That set off a between the legislative and executive branches, with the Texas Supreme Court staying Roberson's execution to consider which branch's authority trumped whose in this circumstance. The Nov. 15 that a legislative committee's authority to compel testimony through a subpoena could not be used to override the executive branch's authority to carry out Roberson's death sentence as scheduled. That allows the prosecuting district attorney to now request the scheduling of a new execution date. A new date cannot fall within 90 days of the request. Anderson County District Attorney Allyson Mitchell , who sought Roberson's last execution date, did not respond to a message asking if and when she intended to request a new execution warrant. After the Nov. 15 court ruling, Gretchen Sween , Roberson's attorney, asked the state to refrain from requesting a new date. "The ancillary benefit to Mr. Roberson of staying his execution hopefully gives time for those with power to address a grave wrong to see what is apparent to anyone who gives the medical evidence fair consideration: his daughter Nikki's death was a tragedy not a crime; Robert is innocent," Sween said in a statement. Roberson's attorneys have at least three months to file any new appeals in his criminal case. The courts have denied all of his appeals thus far, most recently on procedural grounds -- so it was unclear what remaining legal recourse he had. Gov. Greg Abbott also has the authority to grant a one-time 30-day reprieve. But he had declined to do so leading up to Roberson's scheduled execution in October, and he for interfering in Roberson's sentence. Though the Texas Supreme Court cleared the way for Roberson's execution, it also noted that there was now plenty of time for the Texas Department of Criminal Justice to produce Roberson for testimony in response to the legislative subpoena. "If the committee still wishes to obtain his testimony, we assume that the department can reasonably accommodate a new subpoena," Justice Evan A. Young wrote. "To the extent that an accommodation is not forthcoming, so long as a subpoena issues in a way that does not inevitably block a scheduled execution, nothing in our holding prevents the committee from pursuing judicial relief in the ordinary way to compel a witness's testimony." After the court's decision Nov. 15, State Reps.Joe Moody , D-El Paso, and Jeff Leach , R-Plano, who have spearheaded the effort to win Roberson a new trial, said in a statement that they would seek to follow through on the committee's subpoena to obtain Roberson's testimony. "The Supreme Court strongly reinforced our belief that our Committee can indeed obtain Mr. Roberson's testimony and made clear that it expects the Executive Branch of government to accommodate us in doing so," Moody and Leach said in a statement. "That has been our position all along, and we look forward to working with the Executive Branch to do just that."" * **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas can schedule Robert Roberson's execution -- but lawmakers still expect his testimony first,** " Texas Tribune's **Kayla Guo** -- "Texas can proceed with scheduling the execution of death row inmate **Robert Roberson** despite his claims of innocence and calls for a new trial. But a Texas House committee, whose members believe Roberson was convicted based on junk science, still expects him to provide them with testimony about his conviction and appeals.

Roberson was convicted of capital murder in 2003 for the death of his 2-year-old daughter, Nikki, who was diagnosed with shaken baby syndrome.

In October, Roberson's execution was halted at the 11th hour after the Texas House Criminal Jurisprudence Committee subpoenaed him to testify. That set off a [separation of powers conflict](https://substack.com/redirect/96b29efd-4ac2-4634-83b5-190bb80320af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) between the legislative and executive branches, with the Texas Supreme Court staying Roberson's execution to consider which branch's authority trumped whose in this circumstance.

The [court ruled](https://substack.com/redirect/30d2912b-cdf6-4527-abac-d77b5f99d801?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Nov. 15 that a legislative committee's authority to compel testimony through a subpoena could not be used to override the executive branch's authority to carry out Roberson's death sentence as scheduled.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/8f2511c1-c18a-4a72-966b-371e352d8d74?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
That allows the prosecuting district attorney to now request the scheduling of a new execution date. A new date cannot fall within 90 days of the request. Anderson County District Attorney **Allyson Mitchell** , who sought Roberson's last execution date, did not respond to a message asking if and when she intended to request a new execution warrant.

After the Nov. 15 court ruling, **Gretchen Sween** , Roberson's attorney, asked the state to refrain from requesting a new date.

"The ancillary benefit to Mr. Roberson of staying his execution hopefully gives time for those with power to address a grave wrong to see what is apparent to anyone who gives the medical evidence fair consideration: his daughter Nikki's death was a tragedy not a crime; Robert is innocent," Sween said in a statement.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/8f2511c1-c18a-4a72-966b-371e352d8d74?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Roberson's attorneys have at least three months to file any new appeals in his criminal case. The courts have denied all of his appeals thus far, most recently on procedural grounds -- so it was unclear what remaining legal recourse he had.

Gov. **Greg Abbott** also has the authority to grant a one-time 30-day reprieve. But he had declined to do so leading up to Roberson's scheduled execution in October, and he [excoriated House lawmakers](https://substack.com/redirect/77ff2163-ca4c-4572-a4bc-80b796332c6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for interfering in Roberson's sentence.
Though the Texas Supreme Court cleared the way for Roberson's execution, it also noted that there was now plenty of time for the Texas Department of Criminal Justice to produce Roberson for testimony in response to the legislative subpoena.

"If the committee still wishes to obtain his testimony, we assume that the department can reasonably accommodate a new subpoena," Justice **Evan A. Young** wrote. "To the extent that an accommodation is not forthcoming, so long as a subpoena issues in a way that does not inevitably block a scheduled execution, nothing in our holding prevents the committee from pursuing judicial relief in the ordinary way to compel a witness's testimony."

After the court's decision Nov. 15, State Reps.**Joe Moody** , D-El Paso, and **Jeff Leach** , R-Plano, who have spearheaded the effort to win Roberson a new trial, said in a statement that they would seek to follow through on the committee's subpoena to obtain Roberson's testimony.

"The Supreme Court strongly reinforced our belief that our Committee can indeed obtain Mr. Roberson's testimony and made clear that it expects the Executive Branch of government to accommodate us in doing so," Moody and Leach said in a statement. "That has been our position all along, and we look forward to working with the Executive Branch to do just that."" ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Texas can schedule Robert Roberson's execution -- but lawmakers still expect his testimony first, " Texas Tribune's Kayla Guo -- "Texas can proceed with scheduling the execution of death row inmate Robert Roberson despite his claims of innocence and calls for a new trial. But a Texas House committee, whose members believe Roberson was convicted based on junk science, still expects him to provide them with testimony about his conviction and appeals. Roberson was convicted of capital murder in 2003 for the death of his 2-year-old daughter, Nikki, who was diagnosed with shaken baby syndrome. In October, Roberson's execution was halted at the 11th hour after the Texas House Criminal Jurisprudence Committee subpoenaed him to testify. That set off a between the legislative and executive branches, with the Texas Supreme Court staying Roberson's execution to consider which branch's authority trumped whose in this circumstance. The Nov. 15 that a legislative committee's authority to compel testimony through a subpoena could not be used to override the executive branch's authority to carry out Roberson's death sentence as scheduled. That allows the prosecuting district attorney to now request the scheduling of a new execution date. A new date cannot fall within 90 days of the request. Anderson County District Attorney Allyson Mitchell , who sought Roberson's last execution date, did not respond to a message asking if and when she intended to request a new execution warrant. After the Nov. 15 court ruling, Gretchen Sween , Roberson's attorney, asked the state to refrain from requesting a new date. "The ancillary benefit to Mr. Roberson of staying his execution hopefully gives time for those with power to address a grave wrong to see what is apparent to anyone who gives the medical evidence fair consideration: his daughter Nikki's death was a tragedy not a crime; Robert is innocent," Sween said in a statement. Roberson's attorneys have at least three months to file any new appeals in his criminal case. The courts have denied all of his appeals thus far, most recently on procedural grounds -- so it was unclear what remaining legal recourse he had. Gov. Greg Abbott also has the authority to grant a one-time 30-day reprieve. But he had declined to do so leading up to Roberson's scheduled execution in October, and he for interfering in Roberson's sentence. Though the Texas Supreme Court cleared the way for Roberson's execution, it also noted that there was now plenty of time for the Texas Department of Criminal Justice to produce Roberson for testimony in response to the legislative subpoena. "If the committee still wishes to obtain his testimony, we assume that the department can reasonably accommodate a new subpoena," Justice Evan A. Young wrote. "To the extent that an accommodation is not forthcoming, so long as a subpoena issues in a way that does not inevitably block a scheduled execution, nothing in our holding prevents the committee from pursuing judicial relief in the ordinary way to compel a witness's testimony." After the court's decision Nov. 15, State Reps.Joe Moody , D-El Paso, and Jeff Leach , R-Plano, who have spearheaded the effort to win Roberson a new trial, said in a statement that they would seek to follow through on the committee's subpoena to obtain Roberson's testimony. "The Supreme Court strongly reinforced our belief that our Committee can indeed obtain Mr. Roberson's testimony and made clear that it expects the Executive Branch of government to accommodate us in doing so," Moody and Leach said in a statement. "That has been our position all along, and we look forward to working with the Executive Branch to do just that."" FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Before they're gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=230bd81364174e2aa08ffef2cdeadeef&_e=aEjA9qBovRLU9ny3HYlIVxSbiEDOeUJZ9tlXWGCQxS-Jh0h-bcbc8m3ERNF5xCs433mOmI3Q90b1JFaAKNl6SkhLeFSY2AtWxkmLrtDEev-53MIl38TGzf0rcU0tU1lkOYHjFcqHTCiMwpFRnmWu3wWTEUT0XnqHGSSjqFJrYRTUgrP5jcZna8TUUOhyROa5rfzweltArOoYcdqVS1LUuzZvrbuX4KNSPDp_VtLvuwr7SjmmKEy1qaNxKUo3vyiaqvrmz1khYUSnElEWI-eis655RIY0L51GEiKq6rnbNtyjKfYljry3lO26ATiyX1Jo_rRzK1C5pa7NAGjb-vFvUnGM1ItHpP4lPU8U33MslBUMY9NHfbq0h4SIPXsRphSuF5MYZaHWLoWB6of9XQCatL5SjDFKOEF8mA-PCgh_Btjd9YMhw-DmJZ6jKH8woh-_) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=230bd81364174e2aa08ffef2cdeadeef&_e=aEjA9qBovRLU9ny3HYlIVxSbiEDOeUJZ9tlXWGCQxS-Jh0h-bcbc8m3ERNF5xCs433mOmI3Q90b1JFaAKNl6SkhLeFSY2AtWxkmLrtDEev-53MIl38TGzf0rcU0tU1lkOYHjFcqHTCiMwpFRnmWu3wWTEUT0XnqHGSSjqFJrYRTUgrP5jcZna8TUUOhyROa5rfzweltArOoYcdqVS1LUuzZvrbuX4KNSPDp_VtLvuwr7SjmmKEy1qaNxKUo3vyiaqvrmz1khYUSnElEWI-eisxYkqLO52WeoBhNLs8_Zc4S5BiBq1W2qGH63l_hCiEZr6YdR_qxcu7ZKFlZNZX562OR_rmzHdkPUBcz5lbRYJox0XfluPOIBPuyADfjqvHYCVEsdX_bObn-r8GasYOXPJ-R-8vc1oY9ak3RB4PiMeE5qKcm4QTTzRILWxUyJTF69) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=230bd81364174e2aa08ffef2cdeadeef&_e=aEjA9qBovRLU9ny3HYlIVxSbiEDOeUJZ9tlXWGCQxS-Jh0h-bcbc8m3ERNF5xCs433mOmI3Q90b1JFaAKNl6SkhLeFSY2AtWxkmLrtDEev-53MIl38TGzf0rcU0tU1lkOYHjFcqHTCiMwpFRnmWu3wWTEUT0XnqHGSSjqFJrYRTUgrP5jcZna8TUUOhyROa5rfzweltArOoYcdqVS1LUuzZvrbuX4KNSPDp_VtLvuwr7SjmmKEy1qaNxKUo3vyiaqvrmz1khYUSnElEWI-eis2vOhskNHta2JrtndpKXXAbhAbPFeB14cC_-Q04IrF1SQiTDm6Fjs3kQ4FS5aBf006bLRCwn9gZfjs2RTboihiDyG_hvF7geoO1yq52FP4HXORHZm7GVk2M9zeGyOW8S42_gUOt-6KkwdNDzjzS8L3SUkIyGU8SKsChd99Zqmr9E)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=230bd81364174e2aa08ffef2cdeadeef&_e=aEjA9qBovRLU9ny3HYlIVxSbiEDOeUJZ9tlXWGCQxS-Jh0h-bcbc8m3ERNF5xCs433mOmI3Q90b1JFaAKNl6SkhLeFSY2AtWxkmLrtDEev-53MIl38TGzf0rcU0tU1lkOYHjFcqHTCiMwpFRnmWu3wWTEUT0XnqHGSSjqFJrYRTUgrP5jcZna8TUUOhyROa5rfzweltArOoYcdqVS1LUuzZvrbuX4KNSPDp_VtLvuwr7SjmmKEy1qaNxKUo3vyiaqvrmz1khYUSnElEWI-eis4OtC1QiG7qCZPPDse7_0vo393689tbRGdXP4C72WCCuO24UKbL6xj72c_xojmOEKhz6lwpH0XBpmgqkk6l-43RB0gQjjshY7Ju0wvIKwMK7ENJmB8dOpi5V1ON4mD6F5dnsGd7Xlbw4VgOq6UErCIvAyzTfU2iGZg8kNFyxpRTd)**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Take back the libraries
body:
Well... Times have certainly changed.

| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3f352e608fcd496ebfc2834781ae8c41&_e=J2hy7sIZol8F9LqQeWplICw5qCq3UiWtfaSjMYBwJOC4uu-HshvWvZ9iYCFtovTGQtKq8df0FprbSukYT2EZRam-Z6bVJshJOHqemgbWqiq95UPvrlzYVsE0K5njDJzBsM1hmf2H5uHLVC1WvfxP6pAoB9Vgdd1u_5Dwdll0MgUgqfHDVceE0JBkaF0OYQfI7G4FI2AN1yqWi3hGDQKPGr7TzGJnolHR9Z1QtXDO_55pZWxxvsNQRPMjwWBm7b6pMyI8AedYmt_IWcVNPWZM81mR8J-75UwTTQOBOfXfNOcwsUzcxx3emWSaEBCXQM_4nXLBMWrfMTflZHx4kCf_ba8dOaqkK-utY6bGjXi6LFp_H_FKPpRKcRZIigHDahql_Qyl-aXOyK2zGL6aCSzZKnUNbbWqriRs0fGaMvPRT8g%3D)
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3f352e608fcd496ebfc2834781ae8c41&_e=J2hy7sIZol8F9LqQeWplICw5qCq3UiWtfaSjMYBwJOC4uu-HshvWvZ9iYCFtovTGQtKq8df0FprbSukYT2EZRam-Z6bVJshJOHqemgbWqiq95UPvrlzYVsE0K5njDJzBsM1hmf2H5uHLVC1WvfxP6pAoB9Vgdd1u_5Dwdll0MgUgqfHDVceE0JBkaF0OYQfI7G4FI2AN1yqWi3hGDQKPGr7TzGJnolHR9Z1QtXDO_55pZWxxvsNQRPMjwWBm7b6pnPJiicQxn5fI38eNfsozKoVxmlEN9nq_qM2PX3my5V-w-KN1znuJmJiTDE68ac3S4iY_2ws19tQRI81kJi9-dwsnKhtaDlT8ABwjNl842fo6r6rHNq9pIZx6GbNRHVuzByJDnCTlf1iLwaN8e-2OOmsf694pTsnIP1_nRjMZYBw%3D)
---
| | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. **Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.** That's why we need your help to [**Take Back Our Libraries**.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3f352e608fcd496ebfc2834781ae8c41&_e=J2hy7sIZol8F9LqQeWplICw5qCq3UiWtfaSjMYBwJOC4uu-HshvWvZ9iYCFtovTGQtKq8df0FprbSukYT2EZRam-Z6bVJshJOHqemgbWqiq95UPvrlzYVsE0K5njDJzBsM1hmf2H5uHLVC1WvfxP6pAoB9Vgdd1u_5Dwdll0MgUgqfHDVceE0JBkaF0OYQfI7G4FI2AN1yqWi3hGDQKPGr7TzGJnolHR9Z1QtXDO_55pZWxxvsNQRPMjwWBm7b6pYIX3f4oYJFbUlJicXGmT0AfEKUX9BSDFi7tmK2Ie70EsfSvM_C3wlp1vbOL2j50iuqw14rBD827bB4KRjOTq5zw48Ps5pJzYxdwxZI52cTLrPiNWvPmTl33acZC9n-2rJ__HqJH2fg4Gil2bwqgJ_xDXk26a8mgWdNferMFyFi4%3D) My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created _As You Grow_ , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: **reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.** To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. **[**Will you sponsor a Story Hour Kit with a gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3f352e608fcd496ebfc2834781ae8c41&_e=J2hy7sIZol8F9LqQeWplICw5qCq3UiWtfaSjMYBwJOC4uu-HshvWvZ9iYCFtovTGQtKq8df0FprbSukYT2EZRam-Z6bVJshJOHqemgbWqiq95UPvrlzYVsE0K5njDJzBsM1hmf2H5uHLVC1WvfxP6pAoB9Vgdd1u_5Dwdll0MgUgqfHDVceE0JBkaF0OYQfI7G4FI2AN1yqWi3hGDQKPGr7TzGJnolHR9Z1QtXDO_55pZWxxvsNQRPMjwWBm7b6pKS2Ous64fkK8-yh9M981kD3mlgDCWeK9ligcs5RNyHq4QQF9P5ZYE4HM6Lk1a36PxIQKUL2Y3zFy41ZIXVmTGRc6Jf_Dq0YNMIUHeE9FkHSMt2L2NfzhENTAEIZsd7WUOc9cSinpif39Ci9cM38NQeiBwUoVgakz9PoaMi6tglk%3D)** A gift of **$175** sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America,
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father

clean_body: Well... Times have certainly changed. | | | Well... Times have certainly changed. | | | | Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children. | | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like Woke Baby , A is for Activist , and The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies. | | | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values. That's why we need your help to My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created As You Grow , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values. To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. A gift of $175 sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America, | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:

It was never easy, but it's all thanks to them that we came out on top. I couldn't be more thankful!

name: Michelle Steel [iPhone]
subject: We’re not in the clear yet, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Sorry to reach out like this...

| |
---
| | | Friend, Election Day may be in the books, _but my race isn 't done yet._

_**[I'm neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpo1sfqnnaloea4re1kbp4co38hf1m2kmbrq5p2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhmeoj2c9h2bs "I’m neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.")**_

If we're going to pull this out and keep my seat, then I'm going to need all hands on deck.

I spent every dime I had just to get through Election Day, and now I'm running on fumes. I NEED your urgent support to help me keep this fight going before the ballots are all counted.

_**[Please, can I count on you, Friend?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvufkbhch68r2k7cvs004s2rb2ed8co34mfp9cfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjhmeoj2c9h2bs "Please, can I count on you, Friend?")**_

Thank you,

Michelle Steel
_Sent from my iPhone_

name: Lanon Baccam
subject: Thank you, Peter
body:
www.lanonbaccam.com [www.lanonbaccam.com]
Peter,

I cannot thank each and every one of you enough for your incredible support of this campaign - whether you volunteered, donated, or voted - you helped fight for the kind of state and country we believed would be a better place for all.

While the result was not what we had hoped for, we can be proud of the race we ran. We poured our blood, sweat, and tears into our efforts and focused on the issues.

We still know it is not okay for politicians to tell women what to do with their bodies. Banning abortion before most women even know they’re pregnant is dangerous and wrong. We must continue our fight to restore Roe as the law of the land.

We must make sure Iowans are the focus when it comes to lowering costs in our country — whether it’s groceries, gas, or housing — there is still work to do. We must also make sure that long-term care and retiring with dignity is a priority for everyone.

It’s been the honor of a lifetime to be the Democratic nominee for Iowa’s Third Congressional District. I am humbled by your support and forever grateful for your trust in me. In solidarity for the march ahead, thank you.

Your friend,

Lanon
www.lanonbaccam.com [www.lanonbaccam.com]
Lanon's campaign to flip Iowa's Third Congressional District and take back the House is fueled by grassroots supporters like you, Peter. We want to make sure you're getting our latest updates, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can click here to unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/s5InDMXi8EC0qnjjUXh5Pg2?unsubscribedata=973vZAxmhK8ecA8zi17X3GWnmQOEuxPjYiltBr6PuxRNTrNbBAWJ3qEQ2xu19GoHAiCJ%2FiOaiPy45e2ygzxTTe7hfv5oJjSF9uNiYe50exzoJ%2FbRnhyBxdPPRbhzMf9K2jvKGi1NBbw4qfdY59yCjJWzCDU27FA3leqvnnhyesIisR5JTs0VgHiCA%2BZrEnQelv2xKqwAi0O1C2xgUoNTFz2EUI%2Fi8CYGVZIrxfo1I1Q949nKf4WiTqgvKqqzWKLOiqGpZLcyr9jREoX8%2B5ZZX%2BWJZyS3ZXYdpYAiZ%2BdzRmVFlcgOpTSND7vYdR3Uv8RGqX6Wb1AMDm0SnRIOLnLjWBZ3lFMsv64o4OrLKJ4%2B6AgNauic2YyCgdv1UkcYC9OAzsKh1yIF3xrYUGB05LJW%2FGWtbj2rUrobQ3VNAoYRzI1BYIBbr%2FrtBKImWdOu9vjC .
Baccam for Iowa
PO Box 930
Des Moines, IA 50304
United States

subject: How big was this victory?

body:
This is what comes after the Red Wave. | | | [](http://links.email.ronpac.com/u/click?_t=938667fe7724471fa265fc65a9cd5568&_m=1178efd5825349d781550ee1670bafd8&_e=MA1bmRD37I_lXdXdtpLU_q1bzwSpe28wkB4HbokuSDPPsWWkozAUEn33M10yyHvtjPDStEfHPzXB3V9hUWoC4jn2tNP0hxBOZI-uMgHd5fLkqpKQgRtzgCyCJRawo4EUduAdTlYj5JC9D1cSvYW7mybpI0Of5p8YdhJTOI11_OnSbFKOTUqVXyFEwpSuRPuHDQyPcSyS7UHS8uLhfxizgrL3YkGnwCAy_98R4sD4-Kjw79fwqcb36XMbIcfmQ8kP2azm8J-mDN61sjUCduZtMG1f6KGrXKDcMPkKM-5LNOnqeYLiBDYY_T2jqUEizzLpp4OlHWhNA8bEbABYAZU0x2DJAuEzbqcsT1NqML9aL_WR051H2fMDKWSkwC4DWa3HG8aXiAKb2_UXHfzjr_1OtzfdVcsJ87bvz5VfectbIXuEDwEPQma6X01OEaWxhnYU)

Friend, **_Donald Trump not only earned a sweeping electoral victory on November 5th, he earned a mandate for change._** The scope of the victory — electoral swing state domination, popular vote victory, and a Republican-controlled Senate — represents a **decisive** rejection of the Biden-Harris administration. And President Donald Trump was just one of many RON PAC-supported candidates who won their elections. We’re proud to have contributed to this year’s victories, especially in some of the tightest races, like Senator-Elect Dave McCormick. **Roughly 75% of Americans think the country is on the wrong track. With this November’s results, that is likely to change for the better very soon—and we have patriots like you to thank.**
---
[**LET’S KEEP WINNING**](http://links.email.ronpac.com/u/click?_t=938667fe7724471fa265fc65a9cd5568&_m=1178efd5825349d781550ee1670bafd8&_e=MA1bmRD37I_lXdXdtpLU_q1bzwSpe28wkB4HbokuSDPPsWWkozAUEn33M10yyHvtjPDStEfHPzXB3V9hUWoC4jn2tNP0hxBOZI-uMgHd5fLkqpKQgRtzgCyCJRawo4EUduAdTlYj5JC9D1cSvYW7mybpI0Of5p8YdhJTOI11_OnSbFKOTUqVXyFEwpSuRPuHDQyPcSyS7UHS8uLhfxizgrL3YkGnwCAy_98R4sD4-Kjw79fwqcb36XMbIcfmQ8kP2azm8J-mDN61sjUCduZtMM303JjmK4xSEJq8ylHpWLZ_JpNKXYszd6ciY_CTxGzKEN23Oda211ppDDAket9kXxgl8r1ThyRMyfadedypi_6o7TuxZU4SQqfOVehNrYPVmJOTDPGpV5ULWjOxXXhI-3ndQo4-96T_8CY4JsThM8YjfkSEwzO_iw_bNtOAUvH8)

body:
We can't give up now.

| |

| | | Friend,

We left everything on the table.

We spent every dollar we had keeping our ads on the air and reaching voters in every corner of the district.

We gave it everything we had and now we're running on empty. _**[Can you rush an emergency donation to our Election Fund today to help finish this fight?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1674491a32a44b15ac0ca4785c1e943a&_e=buIi5xztIgR9HWzWMG-iQcb84BuCTP5UfJ69lb7G5oFj-mgDIj2Zi31ZcF8v0i6Pi8QVmrAAngT8G7decgYeCMKn_Ne0OxDjSObwo9coU6q3bHB_1lvwokw0OUM5VbYC2XjVRY5yOZNN1jEAUFRdiXmFt2I_Um9x5KtekIW4rSc20pyQjqxDg_DTOuRY3f_bLQlg4sWSyM9FsqsG5mmKB7aYPPrZwXd30OrVs8it9izUNYMVZ5q5zCPh5w9XX4JLiLxL5osIwSWYVanZFXJMgRYTTJXNWD3whNhita7UjYiZxeuCJHX_aServ7PXj3xxM_USO1b64IH160vOziGFmFGIcXJeV6Kl6baq8zMWeLVGaQqTXt4nQA7vRU95CW91vrPAhoVw7k57JrUO7mrEjw7ajqBOKAO_u4xopVJ-o7ptS-9w5DURyMV6gXDKRWrZI72qyBDfyulUbxIAkbPR3lXHE4qp1b_IHkXRAmpi18A%3D "Can you rush an emergency donation to our Election Fund today to help finish this fight?")**_ We've fought too hard to give up now just inches away from the finish line.

clean_body: We can't give up now. | | | | | Friend, We left everything on the table. We spent every dollar we had keeping our ads on the air and reaching voters in every corner of the district. We gave it everything we had and now we're running on empty. "Can you rush an emergency donation to our Election Fund today to help finish this fight?" We've fought too hard to give up now just inches away from the finish line. | | "RUSH AN EMERGENCY DONATION →" Friend, we're counting on support from grassroots patriots just like you. The Democrats will think they have this race locked up and have an army of lawyers to drag this out. I'm counting on you, Friend. Can you rush an emergency donation today? - Michelle Steel | | Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress PO Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743 | To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add "info@email.michellesteelca.com" to your address book. name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

|
---
| | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zidb957arqleilo47ph0vamhhltc9h0dsdttm65o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjjm0o70c3h2bs) Friend,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven’t heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I’ve never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to “cancel” me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I’ve ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization’s top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. **[Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zjbavbma1t7sg3e9p3f5q47admdlmuedctgv7nso_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjjm0o70c3h2bs)**
[Donate](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zeov8sbnsc4kq65dtl7088cv9aihv653h7lvm75g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjjm0o70c3h2bs)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I’ve EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That’s where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand’s _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand’s role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That’s where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for “ _skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_.” **Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos — every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The “Draw My Life” videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand’s shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like “Morals & Markets.”

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand’s philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt’s Gulch Summit, where I spoke!). Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:
[Donate $10](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zkejpifr79cg4sq614e0enu78roobu2nt8v037hg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjjm0o70c3h2bs)
[Donate $35](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z217bt7sjf2e3ori7ucpj0elvafh8gesv82ccbp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjjm0o70c3h2bs)
[Donate $50](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zcqlrt81sv2jat87sb9kp4hqt0t90l923ajfjva8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjjm0o70c3h2bs)
[Donate $100 ](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zq6ffoqbgu97iqljjdqfcvb65kg154jjg3rir6eo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjjm0o70c3h2bs)
[Donate $250](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zu3ggdqf8v7lkt2uucfpt9j16o9rkfvjdptsiaeg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjjm0o70c3h2bs)
[Donate $500](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zavcgadvdacp76k74ftcg3mpcusd20epbpdajkko_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjjm0o70c3h2bs)
[Donate $1,000](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zpvsv57q3o6g4sml7qjc2dbog8175koambteqm1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjjm0o70c3h2bs)
[Donate Any Amount](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zaip2o7kb0ob87ltrt3cc53a2sklvnbttk248u38_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjjm0o70c3h2bs) Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR:
* Free market capitalism
* Rational self-interest
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST:
* Cancel Culture
* Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism
* Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas
* Big government

I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount.

As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000.

[Here is the link to donate one more time.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2za7mcd8f8dfg7d681pdi5pff2vqu6qrthrojk2v0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjjm0o70c3h2bs)

Thank you for everything,

James O’Keefe

P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society’s top student leaders.
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zmj090jtqf6p2v1ebreep5dpor6i6qc7rn0abvcg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjjm0o70c3h2bs) These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity.

Well, NOT these students.

The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same.

[Please take action by making a donation to The Atlas Society today. You can click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zrh2flmjv0m6dd5g58s67tfr412j9ai6cjfh2e5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjjm0o70c3h2bs)

Thank you,

James

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._
---

Update For America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zrm8mt42jddq75mlg59ga241esmh3q8n3icr7eho_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjjm0o70c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqas3h6gonacpnm9q3bd9ieir38ct66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni6cpb4spi60oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zi5gadlj8vtj9gmu0p9f39d8n0ne9hllceaicjb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cjjm0o70c3h2bs)_

name: Matt, Team McCormick
subject: “People violate laws any time they want”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
The dirty tricks keep coming from the Left.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=09c91cee122248e1a870e793ac80ea51&_e=chC3fe2nmZd5FnevTjv_H09DLh1l7RVy2wjlp3BYJgfacS_ZvmbugX7ZzxVk0ZQMFKFWEDMjKB19qkoPHcl3pV86tO8v0ANYVn71TV8-V-DYBOepsk48NIGRh7ci3sbYTBiUaSpr2PdnQqr1trLbcF53qjXn20Shmj2ddfuMNBHmB6MwaiIGy0QsAU0rZUezle0GEayqXL_OeNWv_zNTaCMgUAH91IjNFSHH4geTh-d2xgEBKtanYBpOgg0_vEEB-CDtJh5xmdcdrd5EXYBkloJVvHD0n88gfaj1SjthM1GxyW8jg8u-ebJ-B62pM-lVEp-AWuBajhRTPBKgweyidRbCAbHEXy0MaThLlfGIrjPk-peVXblEZP1MPNt-UI0D_0N4ei6CYm9Xliu3Roc5yKTDyHG93QnjYj9VrvqCv3D-de25ZmlVc_udwJwzV5AhZbI34bRmfwNby-m0OL9Ntw%3D%3D)

Friend,

_" People violate laws any time they want."_

That's a direct quote from a Democrat County Commissioners in Bucks County, Pennsylvania right before she voted to approve counting ILLEGAL ballots in PA's Senate race in favor of the Democrat, Bob Casey.

You can't make this up. Democrats are literally trying to STEAL the Senate seat away from Dave McCormick, who WON the election fair and square.

Multiple news organizations have called the PA Senate race and named Dave the winner. He fought for every vote as he traveled to all of PA's 67 counties, holding hundreds of campaign events and meeting with countless voters who all said one thing: WE WANT CHANGE.

Dave is committed to working with other political outsiders like President Trump and Elon Musk to shake up DC. _**As Dave has said multiple times, people didn 't vote for incremental change, they voted for a complete overhaul of business as usual in DC.**_

We have lawyers and election count observers spread out across the state and we're fighting back each and every minute of the day to stop the Democrats from stealing this election. But we can't do it alone. I'm asking for your support.

**[Can I count on you to chip in $25 today to help us keep up our fight?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=09c91cee122248e1a870e793ac80ea51&_e=chC3fe2nmZd5FnevTjv_H09DLh1l7RVy2wjlp3BYJgfacS_ZvmbugX7ZzxVk0ZQMFKFWEDMjKB19qkoPHcl3pV86tO8v0ANYVn71TV8-V-DYBOepsk48NIGRh7ci3sbYTBiUaSpr2PdnQqr1trLbcF53qjXn20Shmj2ddfuMNBHmB6MwaiIGy0QsAU0rZUezle0GEayqXL_OeNWv_zNTaCMgUAH91IjNFSHH4geTh-d2xgEBKtanYBpOgg0_vEEB-CDtJh5xmdcdrd5EXYBkloJVvHD0n88gfaj1SjthM1FMOXJb1657t4VoQ-bJytMmzRqJxdfIyYOy6U6UJCMpZ_9u68cJmPfd-VUceiwn34e4eOk0c21AXlcii8KhA-kHR39JAfAkV-yTFOgRrIO3QwuZQ0gssbojn40avK6nbszfASm7ClLUAIHaprryESmitAcZABZOE1Opas3rJjn75A%3D%3D)**

We knew the Democrats were up to dirty tricks when shady lawyer Marc Elias, the man responsible for the Steele Dossier, descended on PA in a _**brazen attempt to overturn the election results in favor of the Democrats!**_

Make no mistake, Dave McCormick WON this race. But the Democrats are throwing EVERYTHING at him because he is a political outsider who ran on a message of bringing CHANGE to Washington.

You've been such a strong supporter of Dave's campaign and we need you now more than ever. name: Edward Byers, Medal of Honor Recipient and Ret. Navy SEAL Master Chief
subject: Fighting for America’s Survival
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=679e1dd286b7471787be845d230f8d84&_e=5TO0Bz9xWoBGEC4lXDLFYCCtfXoZ3TMlOT1XDZEucn1t3z7GWoObvq7E-zAH3Xm-zyzIQhlsWlHkvWx8hBFPCbi5C3r6JVUjikvGNuWMAg_wVm18NxRkRRCsr_3QfMdyaN4MZES0dqXlrqgAWGczraQsnJaeQGwlsRdh1ydibaHvIXTzAWv10tdniARJ7UOGKsBQ3M8-aZ7rjM9iRarIyFZlzNBW9nw8qQ4wSH89r9sNbm-447FdzvzeSmZVC20asX_mODspdwmF0RvHBHhbxbJx3e6fTkXCCNniyd3ERFieBVQDFp5WzzL_ocDqdiRWolx_Md49CFwoYmoM3NLng9RiRs7jlY5ptuhlFqAIx0S2IlEd7fiUb_JwyQVLkqnVASXIhf04G6VauWR712GmWCU__fdHESytLK4o79TsuZE%3D)

Peter,

I am unapologetically American and have a profound love and pride for our Country. For more than two decades, I swore an oath as a Corpsman and SEAL within the Navy to protect the United States of America from all enemies, foreign and domestic.

This is why I am deeply disturbed by what I see happening in our country today - the rapid deterioration of our hard-fought-for way of life and the weaponization of our justice system against those who believe in law and order.

**Mark my words:** The United States of America will only survive if we unite as Americans and root out the destructive and evil forces who want to destroy all God has blessed us with.

The freedom we have been granted as Americans is unlike any place else in the world. We still have economic and civil opportunities because of our liberty. However, that freedom is not guaranteed.

If America continues to fall prey to abuse and we lose our liberties, I am confident that no other country will take up the mantle of defending inalienable rights for all people.

We have a severe problem when our rule of law is perverted to punish political enemies. It's happening in our courts. And it's even happening within the administrative state, colloquially known as the Deep State.

When I served to defend Americans' lives in Afghanistan, Iraq, Africa, and Yemen, I protected all Americans. Not just Americans, I agreed with politically.

_Likewise, our justice system and our government agents must serve all Americans without regard to their politics_.

No one is above the law.

My dear friend Kash Patel created the Kash Foundation. Their mission is to support educational and legal efforts to facilitate government transparency and create a healthier relationship between the US federal government and American citizens.

[I am personally asking for you to support the Kash Foundation and help us restore trust in our institutions by exposing bad actors. Can you donate $10, $35, $50, $250, or any amount today? Click here to give >>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=679e1dd286b7471787be845d230f8d84&_e=5TO0Bz9xWoBGEC4lXDLFYCCtfXoZ3TMlOT1XDZEucn1t3z7GWoObvq7E-zAH3Xm-zyzIQhlsWlHkvWx8hBFPCbi5C3r6JVUjikvGNuWMAg_wVm18NxRkRRCsr_3QfMdyaN4MZES0dqXlrqgAWGczraQsnJaeQGwlsRdh1ydibaHvIXTzAWv10tdniARJ7UOGKsBQ3M8-aZ7rjM9iRarIyFZlzNBW9nw8qQ4wSH89r9swntPGE-rMkb4tKkTb3CDt-39GhcjDSwntLO9bd8BWv0VVpNPBQqyrABo4tMPS56eYfN4kmgEWpqXmhxyK7zRV0F05JuK6MImXOpmq1-pOeb8FoGyM0RUSbm8InJg5gBzrOit12FL5hxVTxqAtTmrusT5nwTG1NEaXdV_pQCmqLbKg8bYpHClEumdRl-Aei9s%3D)
The Kash Foundation works in three main areas:
* Legal funds to support whistleblowers within the federal government and media accountability efforts
* Education of the public in areas the mainstream media refuses to cover
* Veteran and law enforcement financial support

Through their program, they have helped FBI whistleblowers come forward to expose corruption -- such as Kyle Seraphin, Steve Friend, Garrett O'Boyle, and Marcus Allen.

Recently, the Kash Foundation has reached a milestone of distributing half a million dollars to scores of Americans needing assistance. Many of these grants were given out to veterans.

[Please join me in supporting Kash Foundation today. My goal is to help raise $35,000 online in the next 48 hours. Chip in any amount you can generously spare; even $10 goes a long way. clean_body: Peter, I am unapologetically American and have a profound love and pride for our Country. For more than two decades, I swore an oath as a Corpsman and SEAL within the Navy to protect the United States of America from all enemies, foreign and domestic. This is why I am deeply disturbed by what I see happening in our country today - the rapid deterioration of our hard-fought-for way of life and the weaponization of our justice system against those who believe in law and order. Mark my words: The United States of America will only survive if we unite as Americans and root out the destructive and evil forces who want to destroy all God has blessed us with. The freedom we have been granted as Americans is unlike any place else in the world. We still have economic and civil opportunities because of our liberty. However, that freedom is not guaranteed. If America continues to fall prey to abuse and we lose our liberties, I am confident that no other country will take up the mantle of defending inalienable rights for all people. We have a severe problem when our rule of law is perverted to punish political enemies. It's happening in our courts. And it's even happening within the administrative state, colloquially known as the Deep State. When I served to defend Americans' lives in Afghanistan, Iraq, Africa, and Yemen, I protected all Americans. Not just Americans, I agreed with politically. Likewise, our justice system and our government agents must serve all Americans without regard to their politics. No one is above the law. My dear friend Kash Patel created the Kash Foundation. Their mission is to support educational and legal efforts to facilitate government transparency and create a healthier relationship between the US federal government and American citizens. The Kash Foundation works in three main areas: Legal funds to support whistleblowers within the federal government and media accountability efforts Education of the public in areas the mainstream media refuses to cover Veteran and law enforcement financial support Through their program, they have helped FBI whistleblowers come forward to expose corruption -- such as Kyle Seraphin, Steve Friend, Garrett O'Boyle, and Marcus Allen. Recently, the Kash Foundation has reached a milestone of distributing half a million dollars to scores of Americans needing assistance. Many of these grants were given out to veterans. It has been an honor to have been friends with Kash for over a decade now, and I hope you can join me to serve their mission. Now more than ever, our nation needs trust in its institutions, which will only happen by exposing and rooting out bad actors. Thank you, Edward Byers Medal of Honor Recipient and Master Chief Special Warfare Operator (SEAL) USN Ret. Contributions or gifts to The Kash Foundation are deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. No goods or services are given in exchange for any contribution. # We’re Not Going Away: Meet Evangelicals for America
---
| | | |
---
| |
---
| | As our team takes time to reflect and recalibrate after the election, we want to reaffirm our commitment to you, to this nation we love, and most importantly, to Christ and His Church. Today, we proudly announce our rebrand as Evangelicals for America. Supporting a thriving democracy and caring for our neighbors are not just acts of good citizenship—they are enduring acts of faith and love of God's children. [We Are Evangelicals for America ](https://evangelicals4america.com/so/8ePD03qjA/c?w=_NwzbOA9cTZ2k9IZGTMRoDQn5TOFfEPCBV6SkbxrmAs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXZhbmdlbGljYWxzNGFtZXJpY2EuY29tL3Bvc3Qvd2UtYXJlLWV2YW5nZWxpY2Fscy1mb3ItYW1lcmljYSIsInIiOiI5NWU1ZGJiNi0wOGJkLTRkNWYtYjFjNC1jYzdmMjkxZTU0ZTkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyODIzMmVmYy05NTUzLTQ0YzgtODYwYS1iYjE5MDZlYTkyZWYifQ) We will remain vigilant in advocating for policies and practices that reflect Christ’s call to love and serve one another, especially the most vulnerable among us.

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Sources say Rahm Emanuel, former Chicago mayor, DCCC chairman, chief of
staff to President Obama, and current ambassador to Japan, is considering
running for chairman of the Democratic National Committee.

The Party needs new leadership that represents the working class, not the
same corporate Democrats who got us here,
Peter.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20241118-oppose-rahm-emanuel-dnc-chair/?source=em20241118-36160&akid=36160%2E1203867%2E2auy5i ]Agree? Add your name to our petition opposing his run for DNC chair →

As mayor of Chicago, Emanuel tried to cover up the wrongful murder of
17-year-old Laquan McDonald at the hands of police in 2014. He also made
drastic cuts to public education and cozied up to tech companies, big real
estate developers, and the city’s wealthy financial district.

As head of the DCCC and Obama’s chief of staff, Emanuel championed Wall
Street deregulation, opposed a public option for healthcare, and advocated
for an anti-worker agenda.

AOC perfectly explained why a corporate-friendly Democrat like Emanuel is
the opposite of what the Party needs at this moment:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20241118-oppose-rahm-emanuel-dnc-chair/?source=em20241118-36160&akid=36160%2E1203867%2E2auy5i ]Tweet from AOC: There is a disease in Washington of Democrats who spend
more time listening to the donor class than working people. If you want to
know the seed of the party’s political crisis, that’s it. The DNC needs an
organizer who gets people. Not someone who sends fish heads in the mail.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20241118-oppose-rahm-emanuel-dnc-chair/?source=em20241118-36160&akid=36160%2E1203867%2E2auy5i ]Add your name to join us in opposing Rahm Emanuel’s run for this major
Democratic leadership role now!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20241118-oppose-rahm-emanuel-dnc-chair/?source=em20241118-36160&akid=36160%2E1203867%2E2auy5i ]Add Your Name

The Democratic Party needs new leadership, not the same out-of-touch
establishment that will maintain business as usual. Electing Emanuel as
DNC chair would only prove this party’s leaders have learned nothing.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241118-36160-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36160_1203867_2auy5i&akid=36160%2E1203867%2E2auy5i

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36160%2E1203867%2E2auy5i

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: New Mexico is *the* frontline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
I know it’s been a whirlwind, to say the least

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=FBOkQElCg1oSp%2BWbJeS1zfW8JE6j47WoKnz1N3AviYHSZ6%2B2DMQS8RM7F0WGK0YLMvYBKVgR2VKrP45NtL65vptDn86JdpVwYB4XY3XCYnb5WzoCWSQUdbFHO2KD%2FI2WpZoGmXMHq4YC8demYndgJmNLDOoEXQ9scUcE2d8bNp9UoWZfsN8a%2FSm4VzlU%2FcYYWbW1dDuObOMG15OnOsxey8%2FjccRVdTdOUL5qstc8TneSk6b7zvBemTvSRMNnquA%2FMEbmpfsym6BcmpQQI4PJUtSnenWLe%2BOr4KtVQYBtCpuQzeZ5YWNLh%2Fl6CiKGUCta7sadPtJgEARZz7cQE%2BZFO0BoDFApywkA5DD%2F6pvioHnpxqvSet76n%2Bysbm7KwIMhgZ3T8VHFoKMcXeXV4tnuek4S4IeBzDI2DeKyT%2FxlvgE%3D)

Saludos, Gabe Vasquez here. I know the last couple of weeks have been a whirlwind, to say the least. We’re all still processing the results of the presidential election and figuring out what we do next. That’s why I wanted to reach out to you. I won’t lie; the road ahead is going to be difficult. But here’s the good news: Right here in New Mexico, not only did we keep NM-02 blue, but every single U.S. House and Senate seat. In other words, New Mexico stayed blue! New Mexicans all across the state showed out to say YES to democracy and freedom and NO to anti-choice extremism. We made it clear that MAGA extremism has no place in NM-02 and beyond. Right now, strengthening our Democratic coalition is of the utmost importance, and it’s going to start right here in New Mexico. It’s more clear than ever that our state is a frontline for Democrats in our fight against Donald Trump and his extremism. No matter what MAGA Republicans throw our way over the next two years, I’m ready to work with you to fight for New Mexicans, for our freedoms, for our public lands and for our right to choose. Friends, I can’t reiterate this enough — I’m so grateful for your support. Top supporters like you are how we won in 2022 and it’s exactly how we held NM-02 blue this year. And as we move into 2025 and another term under Donald Trump, your support will go a long way. subject: Revenge of the “fly-over” states
body:
Revenge of the “fly-over” states Peter Ohtaki — November 17, 2024 TV media pundits and Democrats are in overdrive to explain the Trump and Republican wins in the Senate and House. Over 2/3rds of voter | | | [](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=673b8ebd9356f81d24e10e62&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mainstreamrevolution.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D673445bd03c5f900234d418a%26ss_email_id%3D673b8ebd9356f81d24e10e62%26ss_campaign_name%3DRevenge%2Bof%2Bthe%2B%25E2%2580%259Cfly-over%25E2%2580%259D%2Bstates%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-11-18T19%253A00%253A27Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_673445bd03c5f900234d418a&l=en-US&s=x9kTt9LZFGDouPve_xaazlFRG7Y%3D)

|
## Revenge of the “fly-over” states
---
Peter Ohtaki — November 17, 2024
---
TV media pundits and Democrats are in overdrive to explain the Trump and Republican wins in the Senate and House. Over 2/3rds of voters said the country is going in the wrong direction, a death knell for the incumbent party. But why?
* Bernie Sanders tweeted “It should come as no surprise that a Democratic Party which has abandoned working class people would find that the working class has abandoned them”
* Chris Cuomo said on NewsNation “Democrats need to focus less on who is woke, and more on who is broke!”

#### **The interior of the country has been passed over by global trade-created affluence of the Coasts**
I’ve said this since the summer, [it came down to Pennsylvania, Michigan and Wisconsin](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=673b8ebd9356f81d24e10e62&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mainstreamrevolution.com%2Fblog%2Fwtf-just-happened%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D673445bd03c5f900234d418a%26ss_email_id%3D673b8ebd9356f81d24e10e62%26ss_campaign_name%3DRevenge%2Bof%2Bthe%2B%25E2%2580%259Cfly-over%25E2%2580%259D%2Bstates%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-11-18T19%253A00%253A27Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_673445bd03c5f900234d418a&l=en-US&s=gTnUrQNsedTODcYdjFF-zfRljmQ%3D) (previous blog). The Rust Belt lost manufacturing jobs for over 25 years as both parties advocated free global trade. Real income and property values haven’t changed much as a consequence. I’ve seen it every July in western Michigan in my in-laws small town. Small towns nationwide have lost jobs and are angry. It led to the Tea Party over bailouts to Wall Street in 2009. Trump listened in 2016 & MAGA capitalized on that anger. And now it’s grown to half of the country between the coasts - _**derisively called the “fly-over states”**_**.**
---
|
---
| Inflation-adjusted real income in Michigan, Wisconsin and Pennsylvania has lagged California, Massachusetts and New York since 1984.
---
#### [**It’s inflation, stupid**](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=673b8ebd9356f81d24e10e62&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mainstreamrevolution.com%2Fblog%2F2024-5-4%2Finflation%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D673445bd03c5f900234d418a%26ss_email_id%3D673b8ebd9356f81d24e10e62%26ss_campaign_name%3DRevenge%2Bof%2Bthe%2B%25E2%2580%259Cfly-over%25E2%2580%259D%2Bstates%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-11-18T19%253A00%253A27Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_673445bd03c5f900234d418a&l=en-US&s=UShjOYJVVSVgchi5wyH6utCvTsQ%3D)**(previous blog)**
Pollster Frank Luntz observed people living paycheck-to-paycheck voted overwhelmingly for Trump and the Republicans. A recent CNBC survey showed 65% of Americans now live paycheck-to-paycheck. _**Groceries, gas, utilities, insurance, housing, medical, tuition, travel – all have jumped at least 20% since the pandemic.**_ Inflation has been harder on these areas of the country, and we’re seeing small businesses like restaurants and retailers fail nationwide. So in addition to the Swing States, Trump won the popular vote nationwide, and significantly higher % in blue states such as 46.3% in New Jersey and 44.2% in New York than in 2020.
#### **It’s not education**
CNN and MSNBC talk about an “education gap” where college-educated voters voted for Harris, implying derisively working class Americans without a college degree aren’t informed or educated. .People in these states watch the same news channels, and are just as informed and concerned as we are on the Coasts.
#### **It’s a cultural rejection**
It’s not white nationalism- these are hard working church-going compassionate Americans fed up with Coastal elites, including Hollywood celebrities, telling them what’s politically correct (DEI), [who’s oppressed or an oppressor](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=673b8ebd9356f81d24e10e62&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mainstreamrevolution.com%2Fblog%2F2019%2F4-27%2Fethnicstudiesgaza%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D673445bd03c5f900234d418a%26ss_email_id%3D673b8ebd9356f81d24e10e62%26ss_campaign_name%3DRevenge%2Bof%2Bthe%2B%25E2%2580%259Cfly-over%25E2%2580%259D%2Bstates%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-11-18T19%253A00%253A27Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_673445bd03c5f900234d418a&l=en-US&s=5-1Ojo6i25lNYYQdicKCAM7AjDY%3D) (previous blog), or what to drive (EVs). They’re not opposed to immigration but are worried about losing the service jobs that remain so want to see the [border controlled](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=673b8ebd9356f81d24e10e62&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mainstreamrevolution.com%2Fblog%2F2024%2F5-11%2Fimmigration%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D673445bd03c5f900234d418a%26ss_email_id%3D673b8ebd9356f81d24e10e62%26ss_campaign_name%3DRevenge%2Bof%2Bthe%2B%25E2%2580%259Cfly-over%25E2%2580%259D%2Bstates%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-11-18T19%253A00%253A27Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_673445bd03c5f900234d418a&l=en-US&s=oOv_llDLaQOCt_7Vnlc7CK4l4TQ%3D).
#### [**Let me know what you think**](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=673b8ebd9356f81d24e10e62&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mainstreamrevolution.com%2Fcontact%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D673445bd03c5f900234d418a%26ss_email_id%3D673b8ebd9356f81d24e10e62%26ss_campaign_name%3DRevenge%2Bof%2Bthe%2B%25E2%2580%259Cfly-over%25E2%2580%259D%2Bstates%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-11-18T19%253A00%253A27Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_673445bd03c5f900234d418a&l=en-US&s=1xmUxxa90krWoABVmq5Goiid2jw%3D)
What I can’t explain is why Harris received 8 million fewer votes (73.8 MM) than Biden in 2020 (81.3 MM). Trump’s 76.4 million votes is 2.2 MM higher than 2020. According to AP, turnout dropped in non-competitive states relative to 2020, such as 500k fewer votes in Illinois and 300K fewer in Ohio, while swing state turnout stayed as high.
---
* _[**Revenge of the Fly-Over States**](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=673b8ebd9356f81d24e10e62&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mainstreamrevolution.com%2Fblog%2Frevenge-of-the-fly-over-states%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D673445bd03c5f900234d418a%26ss_email_id%3D673b8ebd9356f81d24e10e62%26ss_campaign_name%3DRevenge%2Bof%2Bthe%2B%25E2%2580%259Cfly-over%25E2%2580%259D%2Bstates%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-11-18T19%253A00%253A27Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_673445bd03c5f900234d418a&l=en-US&s=bShg5kZ3RSgsRvtoGFq3RmbbayM%3D)_

---
| | **BREAKING: Donald Trump nominates Matt Gaetz as Attorney General**
---
**This is a critical moment, friend. ****Donald Trump just nominated Matt Gaetz to be his Attorney General.**

Matt Gaetz is the same man who was the subject of an ongoing House Ethics Committee investigation until he resigned from his House seat. So make no mistake, friend — **h aving him as Attorney General would not only be disastrous, it would also be _extremely_ _dangerous_ for our democracy. **

He is a Trump loyalist who has continually **ATTACKED** the Department of Justice and called for the FBI to be **DEFUNDED**. **And he'll do everything within his power to do Trump's bidding and****exact revenge and retribution against anyone who opposed or prosecuted him.**

In these unprecedented times, friend, we've launched a flash poll to see where Democrats in 34223 stand — and that includes you. **Please respond immediately:**

name: Voter Action Project
subject: This ruling just got worst
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
AP: Federal appeals court deals a blow to Voting Rights Act, ruling that private plaintiffs can’t sue [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=111824_2&amount=25]
Folks,
We're still assessing the consequences of this election, but this ruling by the federal 8th Circuit stands out like a sore thumb. It's one of the most dangerous anti-voter rulings we’ve seen in years .
If you missed the details, the impact is pretty simple to understand: In the eight states impacted by the ruling, voters and voting rights organizations can no longer sue to overturn unjust laws under the Voting Rights Act. According to the 8th Circuit, only the Department of Justice (DoJ) has the legal standing to sue states over voting laws.
Whether the nomination for former Congressman Matt Gaetz goes through for Attorney General or we get stuck with another anti-voting MAGA acolyte, do any of us really think that the DOJ is going to protect voting rights over the next four years?
Team, we have to fight this ruling and make sure voters and advocacy groups have the right to defend voting rights in court. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can to make every vote count, either at the ballot box or in court >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=111824_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=111824_2&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=111824_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=111824_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=111824_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=111824_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=111824_2&amount=35]
This is all about the legal term "private right of action". The 8th Circuit says it doesn't exist. That means the pro-voting lawsuits we've seen in states like Wisconsin, Georgia, Florida, and others nationwide wouldn't be possible anymore if the Supreme Court backs up this ruling.
We won’t sugarcoat this: This could be a crushing blow to many voting rights organizations across the country, ourselves included. If this ruling is not overturned by a higher court, it could unravel all of the great work pro-voting organizations are doing across the country — and allow dozens of unjust, unconstitutional voter restrictions to stand.
Attacks like this on what remains of the Voting Rights Act are going to get worse over the next few years. As voter suppression laws become increasingly targeted and oppressive , our work to combat them must become smarter, stronger, and more accessible to everyone.
We can't do this alone. Help defend our right to vote with $25 or however much you can today and make every voice heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=111824_2&amount=25]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111824_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111824_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111824_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111824_2&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=QstW3GNNtanMamvXkyTb%2B%2Fc85XYik4QatdafMZps%2BfQWiQ4ewPTyguYQUVm9McVwjxBWipwp5xIYWTYXCAIs0V8yxH%2Fj%2BbnQzdvLO%2FXYPkgxEPkjchR3XjTp66KygqYOhp%2Fl7bv0rRQ%2BGcXVlUS1nd%2FJfWss3sxBfd7uvQIB4iVUKDhNApYcm5ztI6Dx8T7Ayn4ydlWIyiCxOn9uxzARA8pm4RWxJOcSBfx801GsHus1JCDN9u66yTzHq4jFn4cJZJxzCGQiR6BGW1uBGxtChYeCGdZd2gnmVJ87%2BuFH1xzhkjDfpDbJjO3EEado8Z7HECBlY4JsAcU9SwHMylJSC%2BHjNZpmxMaHVGgqlw25rtxVv5MlyoanyBZQ8P0p5d2xwwDQnUUZ%2FzvogLTR9r2dVbBJlH6kLTVILkVMQ275VxA%3D .

Because Jon Ossoff is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and he could be our only hope at taking back the Senate majority and flipping Georgia blue.
And this year’s election showed growing Democratic enthusiasm in the Peach State, but we need to start investing now to maintain this energy through 2026.

name: COURIER
subject: Trump and the far-right have taken over social media – it’s time to fight back
body:
The new information age needs a news organization that can meet the moment.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97287664/512918234/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzUyMmExNDAtZTJhNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VfmsbMKYsDVed3fDcMuu1Ll1uIsCZoWqTXycmoxOLTM=&emci=8a020f16-e2a5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=7522a140-e2a5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=14016711)
Peter **–**
Two weeks after Donald Trump’s win, one thing is clear: the far-right is dominating social media.
**According to _The New York Times_ , on Election Day, Trump’s posts received 10 times as much engagement on Facebook, 4 times as much on Instagram, and 3 times as much on Twitter/X compared to Kamala Harris.**
This isn’t just a numbers game—it’s how Trump and MAGA spread lies and hate while setting the agenda for national conversation around the election. And unless we counter it, the right’s influence will only grow.
[**We’ll share how COURIER is stepping up to challenge the right online, but first—if you believe in the power of progressive media to fight back against right-wing misinformation, can you chip in $25 so we can keep growing?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97287666/512918236/-593472309?refcode=20241118-EM-RightSocial&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzUyMmExNDAtZTJhNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VfmsbMKYsDVed3fDcMuu1Ll1uIsCZoWqTXycmoxOLTM=)
Since Trump’s loss in 2020, Republicans have spent four years building a MAGA media empire. Trump’s Truth Social, platforms like Gab and Parler, and Elon Musk’s MAGA-friendly Twitter/X are now key pillars of the right-wing ecosystem. Even TikTok’s algorithm frequently pushes conservative content to users’ feeds.
Meanwhile, mainstream platforms like Facebook and Instagram have de-emphasized political content entirely—giving MAGA less competition and even more influence online.
**The left can’t afford to sit this out.**
At COURIER, we’ve spent years building a progressive media network that meets people where they are—on TikTok, Facebook, Instagram, X, and Threads. With 4.5 million followers and nearly 2 billion social media impressions in the 90 days leading up to Election Day, we’ve proven that we can counter right-wing disinformation with factual, community-driven reporting.
**But we need to go even further. Trump’s re-election means the right will double down on its propaganda machine. To fight back, we have to grow our reach, expand our impact, and deliver the truth to millions more Americans in every corner of our country.**
[**If you believe in a media that meets people where they are and challenges the lies that threaten our democracy, can you chip in $25 to support COURIER today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97287668/512918238/-593472309?refcode=20241118-EM-RightSocial&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzUyMmExNDAtZTJhNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VfmsbMKYsDVed3fDcMuu1Ll1uIsCZoWqTXycmoxOLTM=)
Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97287670/512918240/-593472309?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20241118-EM-RightSocial&refcode2=7522a140-e2a5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzUyMmExNDAtZTJhNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VfmsbMKYsDVed3fDcMuu1Ll1uIsCZoWqTXycmoxOLTM=) name: BPR daily PM
