name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Finding Jesus In Genesis...
body:
Yesterday at Sheridan.Church, I started a mini-series within our WKND series over the Book of Acts. In Acts 17, the Apostle Paul spent 3 weeks in The
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9477.1.236f4343aeeeb52ebab0345b2a494c78) |
---
Yesterday at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9478.1.0f16acc9c3bdf5fa0c977ad8b863208b), I started a _mini-series_ within our _WKND series_ over the [Book of Acts](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9479.1.db104800c83ae955fee09aed337ad1e0). In **Acts 17** , the **Apostle Paul** spent 3 weeks in Thessalonica **reasoning** , **explaining** and **proving** **Jesus** from the Old Testament Scriptures. Therefore, yesterday I took the **Book of Genesis** and _reasoned_ , _explained_ and _proved_ **Jesus as Messiah** from those 50 chapters in the 1st book of the Bible. Next Sunday, we will find **Jesus** in **Exodus** and **Leviticus** and the following Sunday we will look for Jesus in **Numbers** and **Deuteronomy**. I believe the sermon from yesterday will really teach you some things that maybe you have never seen before from the **Book of Genesis**. Watch "[Jesus In The Torah | Genesis](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9480.1.b8be85dbb4fc2cc57a4ab4b6d1beddc2)" here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=634OIj06ZbU](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9481.1.d12b48cacc4dce001c17c5245b9a00f1) **Upcoming Events At Sheridan.Church** -Sunday, November 24 @10am: **73rd Anniversary Service** -Saturday, December 7 @6pm: **Christmas Gala w/Mayor Giuliani** (11 tickets left) | RSVP: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1453870](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9482.1.e0f5975fce80de2760232d1a904878c3) -Sunday, December 22 @10am: **Sheridan Christmas Concert** -Sunday, January 12 @10am: **Erick Stakelbeck** -Wednesday, February 26 @7pm: **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** Please consider partnering with the mission of [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9483.1.10fc495c2475b77a0720b45b5adfeda2): [https://sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9484.1.f470ba55202e32d363b9d06ff2582b34)
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9485.1.26e7d536bb72c86580bc434c7bebc29c)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9486.1.12a1da5955ec4b8bb29cfaa7467aab12)
---
The response to [Sheridan's 1st Annual Christmas Dinner Gala](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9487.1.17b66927ef3805e7f0a3d5f421efec70) has been **HUGE**! _This event is nearly sold out_. If you have not got your ticket or reserved your table yet, now is the time. Keynote speaker: **Mayor Rudy Giuliani** Comedy Performance: **Brad Stine** Live Auction Items Include: **Signed Donald Trump Painting** and more... Silent Auction as well. I will also be sharing about **Operation 2025 at Sheridan.Church** that evening. This is a black tie event. Please join us for what will be an incredible experience to close out 2024 and to look into 2025. Kindly RSVP here: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1453870](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9488.1.3638fbd9293510a4f661eba1518995f7) **Date** \- Saturday, December 7, 2024 **Time** \- 6:00-8:00pm **Address** \- 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ RSVP: Gala w/Mayor Rudy Giuliani ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9489.1.dbb3f5b6b710d1562634043e71e8feab)
---
---
## 1st Guest Speaker of 2025 @Sheridan.Church
---
|
---
Over the last year at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9490.1.0d2b81c1d29f39bf04ae466d46867e89), we have been BLESSED with so many great guest speakers from preachers to politicians to athletes and beyond. Including: [Perry Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9491.1.dde68c9a8bf5d13ba802792e0f4a36e7), **Tim Tebow** , [Donald Trump Jr](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9492.1.04b0d2bad63455d09b0d22aaced16104)., [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9493.1.a728873fbdca2becf87f1784a1b04d9c), [Lara Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9494.1.5c9b9f644cd58daeff5a38034296a4f8), [Rabbi Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9495.1.c3cfb55b5434264d380711f7cc6526ce), [Darryl Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9496.1.3c5c0214906a9299bd9aa95d4a7805de), **General Michael Flynn** , [Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9497.1.fbd92007d170badb5a94cceb59f26605), [Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9498.1.df67ee1a9c11438e18e0a28aa6ed10ba), [Dr. Randy Caldwell](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9499.1.414a273ffcc75a453b46f8616515e4f4), [Roger Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9500.1.20a654878f2ba332656de513f099261e), Rodney Howard-Browne and so many others...
But our first guest speaker of 2025, I am very excited about!
Mark your calendars for **Erick Stakelbeck** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17469743.9501.1.7a454e85a64a54954d7f2895a5ee6628) on Sunday, January 12 at 10am CT.
Erick's show on **TBN** is _phenomenal_ and that Sunday in January will be just as great!
---

name: Michelle Steel [iPhone]
subject: We’re not in the clear yet, Fellow American.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Election Day may be in the books, but my race isn’t done yet.
Sorry to reach out like this...

| |
---
| | | Friend, Election Day may be in the books, _but my race isn 't done yet._

_**[I'm neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=28d7fd8df1bd45ca8db38887515eee9e&_e=2gvla5tNsqIxpwot5SWTsvPORMnJ4dWe14LgTwGiKvRASqslk6t2ln7UtOD-vZgoIKjrNFAnm3E1HHlduvHRqt4j8L_QmpljvzA7x6FuJt1zVYkNtlrNZYb2RUaIsZYWD--wYhb7oQSbg4hnqKru6H3FSHoyfk_aXSMzqB985sTClilK7nxkaI2TCfXbfhU1s-__D2clEOdhWtsvLtzNGbtP5Upw29cnGPukzLFn1JZgbw8HcAuJWbym8fVIcm07lNjxrogpUO8OvHZ_7rTC_yCuzfmWw7xG4z8YUeTdM78WN7rrv28XYYR50eTC2XCPV4AuTnmF2DHOYkfDtfdtiSK9WCZ8K-Qbljhgx1hwge-HwW0rhA0zK7WNtfEIRoRKusf5BntjwchpMoVGGMhGLIA-FzCIHSE5OmS9GmVxMIo%3D "I’m neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.")**_

If we're going to pull this out and keep my seat and our House Majority RED, then I'm going to need all hands on deck.

I spent every dime I had just to get through Election Day, and now I'm running on fumes. I NEED your urgent support to help me keep this fight going before the ballots are all counted.

_**[Please, can I count on you, Friend?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=28d7fd8df1bd45ca8db38887515eee9e&_e=2gvla5tNsqIxpwot5SWTsvPORMnJ4dWe14LgTwGiKvRASqslk6t2ln7UtOD-vZgoIKjrNFAnm3E1HHlduvHRqt4j8L_QmpljvzA7x6FuJt1zVYkNtlrNZYb2RUaIsZYWD--wYhb7oQSbg4hnqKru6H3FSHoyfk_aXSMzqB985sTClilK7nxkaI2TCfXbfhU1s-__D2clEOdhWtsvLtzNGbtP5Upw29cnGPukzLFn1JZgbw8HcAuJWbym8fVIcm07lNjxrogpUO8OvHZ_7rTC_xrr3qL6CGG7cJ88mCTVtFe0eoQGIAWKbD6Birv-LYaja8nDsYrVcReJQIoaMQJ91P_nURFgakTDDrrb7xEoMrSkZduf4bb3jyGntqmqrWk4cudHTEHj-fKsI_yNb5WalrC-2kGqXMnuGBUtoWUOJsI%3D "Please, can I count on you, Friend?")**_

Thank you,

Michelle Steel
_Sent from my iPhone_

clean_body: Election Day may be in the books, but my race isn’t done yet. Sorry to reach out like this... | | | | | Friend, Election Day may be in the books, but my race isn 't done yet. "I’m neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message." If we're going to pull this out and keep my seat and our House Majority RED, then I'm going to need all hands on deck. I spent every dime I had just to get through Election Day, and now I'm running on fumes. I NEED your urgent support to help me keep this fight going before the ballots are all counted. "Please, can I count on you, Friend?" Thank you, Michelle Steel Sent from my iPhone | | Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress PO Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743

name: Doug Lindner, LCV
subject: (URGENT) Tell the Senate: Fill all judicial vacancies before Trump takes office.
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE3NzkwNDkS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDI4NDEwNQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter: https://links.messages.lcv. Tell the Senate:

Fill ALL Judicial Vacancies

before Trump takes office When Trump last took office, Sen. Mitch McConnell handed him a massive backlog
of judicial vacancies to fill with far-right extremists for lifetime
appointments.

Since then, federal courts dominated by Republican-appointed, far-right judges
have eviscerated environmental safeguards, gutted the Voting Rights Act of 1965,
and devastated the right to reproductive healthcare.

That can’t happen again. The Senate’s pro-environment majority must ensure that
judicial vacancies are filled before January 20, 2025. But it’ll take grassroots
pressure from LCV members to make that happen.

We’ve set a goal to deliver 8,000 petition signatures this week. Please take action right now to help us reach our goal >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_ https://links.messages.lcv. Peter — For environmental laws and democratic safeguards to be effective, we need judges
who will protect them from continuous attacks by the Trump administration.And with a MAGA supermajority in control of the Supreme Court, the stakes for
clean air and clean water, our climate future, and our fundamental rights have
never been higher. For the sake of our environment, our communities’ health, and our democracy, we simply cannot afford to hand more lifetime judicial appointments to Donald
Trump.To protect our environment and democracy, senators must prioritize confirming
the backlog of highly qualified judicial nominees. The future of our nation and planet is at stake. There isn’t much time between now and the end of the pro-environment Senate
majority on January 3, 2025, which means we need senators to spend as much time
as possible in session confirming President Biden’s exceptional judges. Making that happen will depend on grassroots pressure from people like you,
Peter. We’ve set a goal to deliver 8,000 petition signatures today. Take action NOW to tell your senators: they MUST act quickly and prioritize filling all outstanding judicial vacancies before Trump takes office >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/2zZrMN_b_ TAKE ACTION >> https://links.messages.lcv. Judicial appointments are often the longest-lasting legacies of each
presidential administration. Federal judges serve for life — some serve for 50
years or more. When Donald Trump last took office in 2017, then-Senate Majority
Leader Mitch McConnell handed him a vacant Supreme Court seat on top of dozens
of other lifetime appointments he’d blocked President Obama from filling. Two
more Supreme Court seats later followed. Since then, Trump appointees have gone on to eviscerate environmental
safeguards, gut the Voting Rights Act of 1965, and devastate the right to access
abortion. We can’t let that happen again — the Senate’s pro-environment, pro-democracy
majority must fill all judicial vacancies before January 3, 2025. Please, help us reach our 8,000 petition signature goal today. It only takes a moment to add your name and tell your senators to confirm judicial vacancies with pro-environment, pro-democracy judges without delay >> https://links.messages.lcv. These confirmations have a direct impact on the future of climate action, voting
rights, clean water, and the fundamental rights and freedoms of everyone in this
country. Thank you for fighting alongside us on this critical issue, %%FIRST
NAME%%. Onward, Doug Lindner
Senior Director of Judiciary & Democracy
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11779049&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDI4NDEwNQS2&spReportId=MjEwMDI4NDEwNQS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11779049&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDI4NDEwNQS2&spReportId=MjEwMDI4NDEwNQS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/4L4XBdqzq-

name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Tell Trump he needs to dump Matt Gaetz NOW
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Trump he needs to dump Matt Gaetz NOW and withdraw his nomination for attorney general](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted46746a-e54b-4439-869b-d87679ecd892/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ce6c330-6a73-4bf6-b244-6445b96e4353/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump was crazy to nominate Matt Gaetz in the first place, and now it's time to end the whole horrifically embarrassing episode, and withdraw his nomination for Attorney General. [**Trump screwed up, big time, and he needs to admit it.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2281998a-7919-431d-a27c-ebc53a984aa6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) And should apologize to America for putting us through this. Gaetz was spectacularly unqualified for the position, both by experience (or lack thereof) and by moral character (also none). Plus, he was under investigation for about a zillion unsavory and/or illegal things. Hollywood couldn't have scripted a less suitable nominee for the top legal position in the nation. And the reaction has been profoundly negative, with even some Republicans finding their spines, and coming out against Gaetz. It's time for Trump to admit he screwed up, and end this. [**Sign on, and tell Trump to dump Gaetz, and withdraw his nomination for Attorney General.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68800dac-707c-4d1d-a8e9-fa3923be0b48/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ea7bfba-e4a6-4bc8-b19d-63c8d963fe7b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf14e0234-e70c-432e-9f0b-e16e2af277d8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T96492af5-1072-472a-8dcf-933c0f64e174/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e67430f-f0db-4d6c-9541-a5dc7c115717/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf662ef1f-939c-453b-b476-3372e89b4f20/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

As votes are still being counted, I wanted to take a moment to personally thank you. **Thank you for fighting for the American Dream with me.** An America where no one is limited by the neighborhood they grow up in and democracy is protected. **Thank you for standing by me when Michelle Steel and her friends threw everything they had at us.** You’ve stood by me as we went up against a warchest double the size of ours. We kept up with Elon Musk, CLF, and Michelle Steel’s personal bank account. _**Thank you for supporting me.**_ I have a real chance to become the first Vietnamese Congressional representative of Little Saigon. Being a voice for my community means the world to me. [I wouldn’t be here without your support, but I need you to stand by me. We have a chance to win this, but I’m counting on your support to help make sure every vote counts. name: Bill Gray
subject: Help us understand CRT’s influence
body:
Join the fight against Critical Race Theory

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=50a7cf08f404437a9ad520210b90bdc9&_e=Yi_kcK2iT_u72snliCB7K_lLDyRcBmiIxooJX2sOI3qSkQ9fWvZU8dIwNHkD9TcQFWhJqWBsWd98lpN-pr1jaFs0zqv6_kEqq11USo_fB3czUMMQGN2_LjHP6LDizmlbgBRl-yenaJGtDvqDOt4E7kDw_Wsq-jXcI5ogPxMSrsTWN-8dB4Lsn7J_L9se-MMq0HMgRTE0voUw4lA0ROv9_hyTPwSPV4QArCFrOt3LMbYvz4aYv50IKAY-Xv5rbz_9_OP8N7vJkLAiGQHBwBq4GV-3-2E2zZ_KG6T1LOCTLxionFX2v6wJOlSg0relNA8MqLnQaxqPc2Ig5e4pCYYeQ_I_Si-CN4RLWZlhNlZ48xgO5svAaA_jxsnYYY1wKxj4)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=50a7cf08f404437a9ad520210b90bdc9&_e=Yi_kcK2iT_u72snliCB7K_lLDyRcBmiIxooJX2sOI3qSkQ9fWvZU8dIwNHkD9TcQFWhJqWBsWd98lpN-pr1jaFs0zqv6_kEqq11USo_fB3czUMMQGN2_LjHP6LDizmlbgBRl-yenaJGtDvqDOt4E7kDw_Wsq-jXcI5ogPxMSrsTWN-8dB4Lsn7J_L9se-MMq0HMgRTE0voUw4lA0ROv9_hyTPwSPV4QArCFrOt3LMbYwgYl2YcSiMqkP0b85J638vaLHWaEPwfr6tZRVhaygmzziAp_VZ0V485ZRZ_rLXCZeLvejbFjaptrY2kyKtYEytzqM3Spmi0RqEXteUNW4GlNopdYkW_BiNX_mAeiYLVleVCHb9EdasIoirjzlzpxb)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=50a7cf08f404437a9ad520210b90bdc9&_e=Yi_kcK2iT_u72snliCB7K_lLDyRcBmiIxooJX2sOI3qSkQ9fWvZU8dIwNHkD9TcQFWhJqWBsWd98lpN-pr1jaFs0zqv6_kEqq11USo_fB3czUMMQGN2_LjHP6LDizmlbgBRl-yenaJGtDvqDOt4E7kDw_Wsq-jXcI5ogPxMSrsTWN-8dB4Lsn7J_L9se-MMq0HMgRTE0voUw4lA0ROv9_hyTPwSPV4QArCFrOt3LMbagHdBnwZPcqrrBzaXGHOFFsIGmqJqGoltXMRJKSQ7CyZGU8vg9c7mrornXDjSkLckOom0G2D_bS3iENfh9eC-oXnKNRfk98QZ3d_gD8WeNY9GmZyrCVhVtox-i047e8wtl-uTw1Ltw16Vpu75ANgE8)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=50a7cf08f404437a9ad520210b90bdc9&_e=Yi_kcK2iT_u72snliCB7K_lLDyRcBmiIxooJX2sOI3qSkQ9fWvZU8dIwNHkD9TcQFWhJqWBsWd98lpN-pr1jaFs0zqv6_kEqq11USo_fB3czUMMQGN2_LjHP6LDizmlbgBRl-yenaJGtDvqDOt4E7kDw_Wsq-jXcI5ogPxMSrsTWN-8dB4Lsn7J_L9se-MMq0HMgRTE0voUw4lA0ROv9_hyTPwSPV4QArCFrOt3LMbbwMy4iApIlm0Y0vgrj4trBZCAX_imtzFtquOmbne0O03Ht6bkhqv3bhh2v-S1GCD1p0qSVHSUivMkwdBlFBC6Ke2fkmJ4bCqTXJoMHl8lF0-Op9qgzEq9BaJ2J-nfu2lWWe9yOUR57t9DPL8Suy4qo)
---

[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=50a7cf08f404437a9ad520210b90bdc9&_t=cG9Qbrp53HC2MMjv3OpAu_EjuhgEHTcek0UUnbwPu8nWba2mxTIYNmTlrGfUKFrvKcvliiMHtGEzpUia9u4IMEfVBawlnS-FgxubGfM05rZePLyC9gBj593zpdbAs-hQ)

The fact is, Dave McCormick won! clean_body: But I wanted to make sure you saw the headline from the New York Post Friend, Hey, it's Matt, Dave McCormick's Campaign Manager. Sorry to bother you, but I wanted to make sure you saw the headline from the New York Post. The AP declared Dave McCormick the winner of Pennsylvania's senate seat, but now the Dems refuse to concede the race. ****************************************************************************************************** As the New York Post reported, "A shady Democratic attorney...is now at the heart of a desperate legal effort to snatch Pennsylvania's Senate race away from its rightful winner -- Republican Dave McCormick...Marc Elias, a longtime Democratic election attorney and dirty trickster, is attempting to force the Pennsylvania Senate race into a recount, even though it was called for McCormick by the Associated Press on Thursday, with even the state's most liberal news outlets echoing the call since." The fact is, Dave McCormick won! We need to make sure we have the resources to fight against whatever dirty tricks are played. Dave was able to win because of your support. We truly appreciate everything that you did to push Dave over the finish line. Thank you! Matt ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

| | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=ee9bf4da88de48c6b9f349a4e9d0af7c&_e=vZ1ROAkzDF3_jzn0yDG1VmAR67Hk02ZEkMQ8r5dRuvpgKv-PrOYFV1_EaGV6hMdlM9G13Tj4KnmHPiWT0lwxTjacI4WNC5uFJmrcPmxSW21CaW6q9mLOCyUBunez3mpp1aYnbmEGWU0PnRJfVAGKVY6eMr1ZvgIf7SXDl9nOuvcTVD8OvYLPAJWEhYdTH6sAZLaqVv5sE8J0lBtjgtH6QCYkotCxPE4PgeS3ItUUQC-lg2JVccK2BDw48UCFlFYCXOgJW6CgcHXe2xKd4ES02HnWdZxP92qzy1cpzn2la3P--wZO_fv34eo4eTmYllKU-bjqdWhT3Qk5NFfE-RJFzD9Gcjzz4izHjzSZ8OOFTbnQr2xeI2T9a2sWqjpspOyF4W6Zs5j345R-BGPPhg-CQYuf2ICDjuAyw0l3ZYzEPjrXECvf0b_UcrFvjPsynwWnnlKHIra0AoHZ0LqG8b4zKRagi9WqzUSIEgHHpf6bz09sYGg7__eQ47ml8KkmDGWh)

Peter, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on. _That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_[_**DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS >>** _](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=ee9bf4da88de48c6b9f349a4e9d0af7c&_e=vZ1ROAkzDF3_jzn0yDG1VmAR67Hk02ZEkMQ8r5dRuvpgKv-PrOYFV1_EaGV6hMdlM9G13Tj4KnmHPiWT0lwxTjacI4WNC5uFJmrcPmxSW21CaW6q9mLOCyUBunez3mpp1aYnbmEGWU0PnRJfVAGKVY6eMr1ZvgIf7SXDl9nOuvcTVD8OvYLPAJWEhYdTH6sAZLaqVv5sE8J0lBtjgtH6QCYkotCxPE4PgeS3ItUUQC-lg2JVccK2BDw48UCFlFYCXOgJW6CgcHXe2xKd4ES02HnWdZxP92qzy1cpzn2la3P--wZO_fv34eo4eTmYllKU-bjqdWhT3Qk5NFfE-RJFzCmGN1aF76wYj9zcXK12manvW2Dlk5USHWPQdWVTOTl30RpN1pyEBymPVrJpveFq1GswbkOL4AZv0oFSWrwOADtAdXR854rBZf1M1XDLEXP6MFPivBSRAxQU4yJiOCgt3QXMim3I5HtI7kQ6w8e-_Dj1xPdUqzgi3_hD1DOiiiVw)**We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:****#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes – larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race**_**#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_**#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations.**Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring._Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_[_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE_ >>**_](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=ee9bf4da88de48c6b9f349a4e9d0af7c&_e=vZ1ROAkzDF3_jzn0yDG1VmAR67Hk02ZEkMQ8r5dRuvpgKv-PrOYFV1_EaGV6hMdlM9G13Tj4KnmHPiWT0lwxTjacI4WNC5uFJmrcPmxSW21CaW6q9mLOCyUBunez3mpp1aYnbmEGWU0PnRJfVAGKVY6eMr1ZvgIf7SXDl9nOuvcTVD8OvYLPAJWEhYdTH6sAZLaqVv5sE8J0lBtjgtH6QCYkotCxPE4PgeS3ItUUQC-lg2JVccK2BDw48UCFlFYCXOgJW6CgcHXe2xKd4ES02HnWdZxP92qzy1cpzn2la3P--wZO_fv34eo4eTmYllKU-bjqdWhT3Qk5NFfE-RJFzI-ZaNFjnCdxl40JwmzDyrAOAJCnYYUF_CtE8KeDwiJBRg8pnpTGyJ4o2SjvmcaMCtxC7gqWODKgAybQv4cWWLlGGIRIkb61bJeDVDqLDbUDR2tGKUdVAVflk0bYFcZpX_vH5E95WmI5tcf7hIoIshmBwWSeeSD3y9QzLRqkoFTA)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _

name: Team Zoe
subject: We can’t let this happen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
| Team: We knew another Donald Trump presidency would be bad for our democracy. But we didn’t think it would be this bad.

During a meeting last week with House Republicans, Trump called on his enablers to “do something” that would somehow allow him to serve a third term in 2028.

As it stands today, the 22nd Amendment of our Constitution bars any president from serving more than two terms — regardless of whether those terms are consecutive or not.

We know Trump has dreams of being a dictator. And that he’ll stop at nothing to hold onto power this time.

We can’t let that happen. We have to mobilize now and be ready to stand up and fight. And we have to prepare now so win every race we possibly can coming up — including several still uncalled House races here in California and in Alaska.

[**Will you join us in this fight? We need to raise $10,000 today to rush to our team on the ground to ensure every valid ballot is counted.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97288270/512920463/-172684291?source=EM_NBI_ZL_20241114_FR_TBTHPAC_0_Zoe_NA_NA_TBTHPAC&nvep=&hmac=&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWE1ZmM2Zi1lNmE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G-TxoFuYYobbePxtVLcgZnIogidKtNQbjpIfFc533U0=)

Hope you can help.

More soon...

Team Zoe

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: Do you have a second to chat?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=9O8q20r4Kt0kANpNmd6Sk%2BOZhrihIQfCB0YLOtZH4VolGrXow2vE%2BbgjR2xYkmxkte8MNpfPE4P7N%2Bung6MccWDOf6PZd8a8PJQjsEfy2oFQmU0C%2B%2F%2BG0qWhyA8xetn0saL0iy24TlCkiXHcF6eZmAqfPKB0wIY4OI8FJ1Ig2FhhnGllVPbDy%2BTHTmIbyyZ3eImggu3S6YXmGjrNgHKPDfSySXgWhnAJ4YY4MEXKqhOinlWOUXWQCe7Ija%2Fb8cQn%2FtzqRklFENpHI9dv6TxCEmL0HOKxV7HbzdDuNQ19ZqP1c5a8Dmxn1KQt8k03pb1CBy8Otd2cwTQfdTGE9t0y%2B7Ckj4D%2BUFVf7buNAKWfT5UFrmehu4RevD7BqNFCcGHZgIyghWjRg8nvI6s8R73MS6yLGhlQ7npfx40ZfmzPDKgkAEdxnon2lo1rMzwAj9%2Bi]

# [#]
Do you have a second to chat?

Thanks to the hard work and dedication of people all over California’s 25th and beyond, I’m honored to be able to continue my fight for you in Congress.

Now more than ever, I have one question to ask you: What’s on your mind?

As we prepare to close out the year, I want to hear about what issues are most important to you and yours. Will you take just a moment of your time to fill out my Post Election Issues Survey? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dp7rANcA_kSQaC3jzh9iHA2]

TAKE ISSUES SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dp7rANcA_kSQaC3jzh9iHA2]

I won’t lie to you: the road ahead isn’t going to be an easy one. With Republican control over Washington, standing strong in our fight— together —is the only way forward.

But to do that, I need to know where your head is. Will you please take my brief survey and let me know what issues matters most to you at this moment? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dp7rANcA_kSQaC3jzh9iHA2]

TAKE ISSUES SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dp7rANcA_kSQaC3jzh9iHA2]

Thank you.

Sincerely,
Dr. Raul Ruiz
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.

clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] Do you have a second to chat? Thanks to the hard work and dedication of people all over California’s 25th and beyond, I’m honored to be able to continue my fight for you in Congress. Now more than ever, I have one question to ask you: What’s on your mind? As we prepare to close out the year, I want to hear about what issues are most important to you and yours. Will you take just a moment of your time to fill out my Post Election Issues Survey? [] TAKE ISSUES SURVEY [] I won’t lie to you: the road ahead isn’t going to be an easy one. With Republican control over Washington, standing strong in our fight— together —is the only way forward. But to do that, I need to know where your head is. Will you please take my brief survey and let me know what issues matters most to you at this moment? [] TAKE ISSUES SURVEY [] Thank you. Sincerely, Dr. Raul Ruiz [] [] [] [] The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November. [] CONTRIBUTE » [] [] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY » [] [] LEARN MORE » [] PAID FOR BY DR. subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
| [View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kMtOwzAQRb_G2TXKjF_1wotAa1hQqZuCys7YDrFw2pCnwtejltLt1Zm5R9c2bYrVool8IIh19D1BJLQkiONAX-3hsOuW1VbZ1UwxXGKCjzdywjt7cnbe7kdYjOz3UxmP4k1NcKeHpQ139laZh8bGdEnlJvOaoYXKZUGDpKC4WvMiq7VSTlBGoVoLRQUHoNYjL3zBaSWlrLKosUAGAGtQXCLLuRJCcO6UZZY5C4QV16K86kIY6nj6Cp23MS25OzdZ0vUwtP1VzBA0Z_-Rn0aXwtj_XblzQ9DclAmaiaA5Glc-lcdnuSPUXCejm5_5pe_493vWad_OMaXYC0lY8fn_JZs0_gYAAP__d2VsIA)
| | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kcuOmzAUhp_G7Ijw8QW8YJEUiCo1UpR2Uk03yLEPE2u4DVfRpx-BUDZefPrs3-c_umpLVywxCU8E4OlsTwAIOxKAcWB3_fZ26RY_VdqfGeCKCfzYzQlebm30nF5HumRhf52O7l3-VRN92cPS4svdIw9YaVeuNEw8G3PQtDAexjRkVAkVicB7xgggLGgRIGeGWfMIMEIWFUpqDUZSz8UQAKeURlSJEPhBKCmlEEZprrnRlPBgCzoUHeLwdPUndla7cjmYpvLK-DkMbb99LCOQ9WjGDg-6RtsMq0Ege3R6Qv_RNJ89gYzbSFhpjK8CkD4Hxn1FGfcLHjAESxkLHoRl41DlfTN2BglLTsnZv6V3AnLFFVo3VoQl6WUnRletdh81Yck-Dc1PyTk_3Y73NP95Pr9Dnl7yW3rPf_853vz12K8O2K1PFYOlBGRel84SltSXr2xk13nUG9zWypL_86--E1__vC627ezK0vUyJDz42PpZ65hi-A4AAP__m6iezQ)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love.** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kcuOmzAUhp_G7Ijs4wt4wSIpEFVqpFE6kzbdIGObiTXcCoaIPn0FQtl48emzf5__qKavXbUkKDohgIczIwJA9IgAJk9v6uPjMixhJlX4pGBXjODbbs7wclutntnbRJY8Gt_mo7uLX3ImL9svvX25e-TBNsrVK43SwCQMFKl0YBMSUSK5jDkOHklZcq5xjIEzKk1URZG1RmlcggAirQ5cAhgYISQmkkfADlwKITjXUjHFtCKI4S3oUA3W-odrv-xglKuXg-6aoE4e3vfj9rEcQT5aPQ32oFprOr8aCPJyULMNy677GhHkzMTcCK1DiUGEDCgLJaEsrBimFgyhFJeI5pNvirGbBm0RTU_pObxmNwRixY01bmoQTbPLTrRqeuU-W0TTfRpSnNJzcboeb1nx_Xy-Q5Fdimt2K36-H6_heuxXvR3WpypvCAJRtLUziKZe-DK-_xbvywa3tdL03_PHOPC_f4IhMf3T1bUbRYQY_tz6WeuYE_gfAAD__1UHnlw)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kcuOmzAUhp_G7ED28QW8YJEUSCt1pCntpJpukGObiTXcai4RffoKhLLx4tNn_z7_Ue3QuHpNUXxGAHdnRgSA6AkBzBO9qre3F7-GuVThg4LdMIIvh7nA0-20euSvM1mLeHxdTu5d_JYLedrTOtine0RGtlWu2WicBSZloEitA5uSmBLJZcJxcE9lUse4jjmnNNFCAAGLsQQWY6UxFjZwKWBghJCESB4Di7gUQnCupWKKaUUQw3tQVHtrp7vrPq03yjVrpPs2aNL7NA3j_rECQTFaPXsbqc6aftoMBMXNq8WGt77_HBEUzCTcCK1DiUGEDCgLJaEsrBmmFgyhFN8QLeaprcZ-9toimp2zS1jmVwRiw601bm4RzfKXg2jVDsp9dIhmxzSkOmeX6lyernn17XJ5hyp_qcr8Wv38dSrD7TiuTtZvT9WTIQhE1TXOIJqtX394Xyfl4He4r5Vm_x7fR8___gl8aoaHaxo3ihgx_LH3s9WxpPA_AAD__96LnZo)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kU2PmzAQhn-NuYHwjG3iAwcoEFXqStt0N9X2ghzbbKzlq3xF9NdXIJSLD48e-_W8o5q-dtUakyglAHdnRgJAMCEA84RX9f7-Mqx-LpX_QLAbJvDtMBd4uq1Wj_x1pmsRja9L4j7Eb7nQpz2tvX26R2RgG-XqjUaZZ2IGilbaszGNkEouTzz07nGFgmutT9rADSpEobSIuMIoqliorPJcDCEwSumJSh4BC7gUQnCupWKKaUUJC_egoBqsne6u_bKDUa5eA901Xh3fp6kf948VBIrR6nmwgWqt6abNIFDcBrVY_9Z1XyOBgpkTN0JrX4YgfAbIfEmR-RUL0YKhiOGNYDFPTTl286AtwSzNzv4lvxIQG26scXNDMMtfDqJV0yv32RLMjmlomWbnMr0k17z8fj5_QJm_lJf8Wv56Sy7-dhxXJztsT1WToQRE2dbOEMz0T5TpnL0l1Q73tWL27_FjHPjfP94Qm_7h6tqNIiIs_Nz72epYYvgfAAD__8ignmQ) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of**_Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.**** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter.**

| | Kirk Cameron Actor, Author, and Father

clean_body: | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Season One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you** all ten episodes ofAdventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a Founding Supporter. | | Kirk Cameron Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron Actor, Author, and Father | | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304

name: Derek Tran
subject: We have to count every vote.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85115?t=6&akid=18074%2E878179%2E7wo8zX) Friend – it's Derek Tran.

I’m a veteran, consumer rights advocate, and small business owner, and I’m still in the fight to flip California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, Republican-held district in Southern California – from red-to-blue.

I wanted to reach out and give you and update you on our race: **_We just took the lead, but only 36 votes separate us and our opponent._**

Every ballot drop has brought us closer to taking the lead in this toss-up race, but victory is going to come down to counting _every single vote._

[**We need to make sure every vote is counted in order to win, so I have to ask for your support. Will you split a contribution between our legal fund and the Voter Protection Project to help us count every vote? Any contribution would go a long way in making sure every voice is heard.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85115?t=7&akid=18074%2E878179%2E7wo8zX) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Derek Tran - Recount Account and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85116?t=8&akid=18074%2E878179%2E7wo8zX)

Derek

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18074%2E878179%2E7wo8zX). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18074%2E878179%2E7wo8zX).**

| | | | | | | When it comes to gear, only the strongest should make the cut.

That's why we're excited to introduce the [**Skull Crusher – the ultimate hand held sword** – the ultimate hand held sword](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19141/6374453/b235979b6bd0722adbe372e94bf1e458eaa86c0e/f1b275f2626ae2d20a6cf21f577083624639b58f) designed for those who demand power, precision, and performance.
Crafted for those who understand the value of reliability and strength, the Skull Crusher is more than just a tool – it’s your go-to companion for whatever life throws at you.

---
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19141/6374453/b235979b6bd0722adbe372e94bf1e458eaa86c0e/f1b275f2626ae2d20a6cf21f577083624639b58f)

**Tough as Nails:** Engineered for durability, it can handle the harshest conditions without fail. ****
**Designed for Practical Power:** Perfect for everyday carry, camping, emergencies, or tactical needs.
You don’t settle for mediocrity, and neither should your gear. With the Skull Crusher, you get a tool that’s just as rugged and reliable as you are. ****
**Ready to take your gear to the next level?

[Get the Skull Crusher today and experience the strength and durability that sets it apart.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19141/6374453/b235979b6bd0722adbe372e94bf1e458eaa86c0e/f1b275f2626ae2d20a6cf21f577083624639b58f)**

| | | Stay prepared,

~John G.

name: Bob Casey
subject: American democracy was born in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard.

| Peter, my priority has always been standing up for the people of Pennsylvania.

Across our Commonwealth, close to 7 million people cast their votes in a free and fair election. Our county election officials will finish counting those votes, just like they do in every election.

We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard. The American democratic process was born in Pennsylvania, and that process must and will play out.

[_**I’m here to tell you that the process is not done, and this race is not over. clean_body: We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard. | Peter, my priority has always been standing up for the people of Pennsylvania. Across our Commonwealth, close to 7 million people cast their votes in a free and fair election. Our county election officials will finish counting those votes, just like they do in every election. We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard. name: Tim Sheehy
subject: Major update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
let’s keep winning into next year

This is Senator-elect Tim Sheehy, Friend.

I wanted to personally thank you for everything you did to help Republicans take back the Senate. With your support, we won in Montana and across the country.

_We 've ensured that President Trump will have an America First Senate Majority -- and I'm ready to get to work when it comes to passing his agenda._

**[But there's a hitch, Friend. Before we can do that, we have one more fight we need to win.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=47d5aa7600ab434b9f50a095a54f7248&_e=D3GeeeiZZyXIi6GmfbleKDNXeAI3x2rNYcKluMn6PKIqTNVRe4r_JOPQeude1Ut0wbanXyUzR5VAeyamv7QpHW1orN-fIdotL3V3LRrVmj1fHabi_MxrBIauJYEuksVywiq6Ay8Y_9NRbLIRff-rYX9_TSxvqzxdAVM9YVw_I3UpamGMCcWJYuxYmEr6gN_CM5R4k7stGIV8DwB8xKpjAGdlegsor8H3rSPRf4gghcp-rFGcugwEpxT4azIpvk267T4HDCtGp52ux1EoUESzSjhIzyEKUkaTGLLeU2LbV22HxIelW4bNoJWGLfk83YV93R6O-sEyI8pInrMp-RbQ9fWi8gsyRaIaEWeujrgW2PPQh6GiEAnI8CNJFd1hfzt-gh2cMBuVh-mXZOkSfL5haUytWQyHzP6mmRZ5XadSgR1cJqNyJdUCNfS3u7mTIVsjbI1wZoYbXXfq6DWG3a43Gg%3D%3D)**

In Pennsylvania, the Senate race is going to a recount.
[Senate Republicans are sending field teams to Pennsylvania to help with recounts and legal challenges.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=47d5aa7600ab434b9f50a095a54f7248&_e=D3GeeeiZZyXIi6GmfbleKDNXeAI3x2rNYcKluMn6PKIqTNVRe4r_JOPQeude1Ut0wbanXyUzR5VAeyamv7QpHW1orN-fIdotL3V3LRrVmj1fHabi_MxrBIauJYEuksVywiq6Ay8Y_9NRbLIRff-rYX9_TSxvqzxdAVM9YVw_I3UpamGMCcWJYuxYmEr6gN_CM5R4k7stGIV8DwB8xKpjAGdlegsor8H3rSPRf4gghcp-rFGcugwEpxT4azIpvk267T4HDCtGp52ux1EoUESzSjhIzyEKUkaTGLLeU2LbV22HxIelW4bNoJWGLfk83YV9oQS000QVquH8N6R9P7zBYavGO8doouRTso6LPLMtZdRZWP8DdjrGk4WxDdYwaZ5gvIf4g5iZIcwF3j_qxACnrvmg3eYKvdUpFgC5oAyOXD__eSJf2qDRul89TTh-_aSavrPxY1Tdn6b3KrIDf7DokA%3D%3D) Democrats are doing the same. In Pennsylvania, the Senate race is going to a recount. Democrats are doing the same. We all know how much they will raise and spend to stop us from winning more Senate seats. ****************************************************************************************************** We won on Election Day. Let's keep winning into next year. And let's put America First. Thank you, Senator-elect Tim Sheehy ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. body:
With such a slim House Majority, we NEED my seat to ensure our conservative agenda goes through!
My race is still uncalled...

| |

| | | _**ONE OF THE LAST RACES LEFT!**_

---
| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=00035e77e6e44d398463c77b271d8a90&_e=3zP7VA6aD5K5x-2kRnD7sL3PzfvMz3iiEkCMnMWXMFK7rOLRqxeiB8A33SqU9UO4gx4OYeiSM2ejN-oP28SDozCwl9Iqv3sTNhdbc7D8GhdLQkGKdv6l_THcvHe_DbVcxDt-zM53DGjQDTbXrR07Udn72X395iMi8FyyaFFgiDBsVYp1gwjWXH-d1kvBn34JhTgiJZOWvgCPK9nKjXtCUVY7MdVpBmRn7A4c8PS5Zbo6vvFTJbNT3fxjLLxayce-Y8t-eQMDr5_VDDBZXnGMStONToKSLG31xGhxs5Q9M5epqQkxGuwNbYer3M3-7sJz5OU4YVf4BuKICu9fb1rbYVouO4XN2XFPPbMiP3tGQNOot1gcD0_p-0NOiQTxhkD_rj6RYtMQ_DQ4I9B_--9dV3eoH4aQzhP5iG_ZEeUvH3U%3D)

_It 's Michelle Steel._

Friend, My race is still uncalled, and we are in a dead heat. With such a slim House Majority, we NEED my seat to ensure our conservative agenda goes through!

I'm neck and neck with my radical opponent, and I need your support. I've used every single penny my grassroots supporters have given to keep my campaign going, _**[and I'm humbly asking if you could chip in a few more dollars in our final stretch.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=00035e77e6e44d398463c77b271d8a90&_e=3zP7VA6aD5K5x-2kRnD7sL3PzfvMz3iiEkCMnMWXMFK7rOLRqxeiB8A33SqU9UO4gx4OYeiSM2ejN-oP28SDozCwl9Iqv3sTNhdbc7D8GhdLQkGKdv6l_THcvHe_DbVcxDt-zM53DGjQDTbXrR07Udn72X395iMi8FyyaFFgiDBsVYp1gwjWXH-d1kvBn34JhTgiJZOWvgCPK9nKjXtCUVY7MdVpBmRn7A4c8PS5Zbo6vvFTJbNT3fxjLLxayce-Y8t-eQMDr5_VDDBZXnGMSnJFZBbZLGHK6Y9xlWnLZ9FjRTbQQjHhduUxr9aM9_Qbr6McSbXJSJoCkZtl4yLgNlqU1wY3Xqtcp0h1yLuIiyL6FWr4eEwsldGIF-y9rbWCqldShEs4peevR7cgIAwS_SEtAMRzUxnXWhRjrnKnl2w%3D "and I’m humbly asking if you could chip in a few more dollars in our final stretch.")**_

It all comes down to this race!

Can I count on you in this final stretch Friend?

clean_body: With such a slim House Majority, we NEED my seat to ensure our conservative agenda goes through! My race is still uncalled... | | | | | ONE OF THE LAST RACES LEFT! | It 's Michelle Steel. Friend, My race is still uncalled, and we are in a dead heat. With such a slim House Majority, we NEED my seat to ensure our conservative agenda goes through! I'm neck and neck with my radical opponent, and I need your support. I've used every single penny my grassroots supporters have given to keep my campaign going, "and I’m humbly asking if you could chip in a few more dollars in our final stretch." It all comes down to this race! Can I count on you in this final stretch Friend? | | "SUPPORT MY FINAL STRETCH" -Michelle | | Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress PO Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743 | To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add "info@email.michellesteelca.com" to your address book. clean_body: Democrats will never – NEVER – stop fighting For The People. | | | = This is my very first message to you since the election. Here’s what I need you to know: = We will never stop working to protect your health care and strengthen Social Security. We will never give up the fight to lower your costs and keep our communities safe. = = | = = | = = | = = Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. Jeffries for Congress PO BOX 65322 Washington, DC 20035 United States | mailto:info@hakeemjeffries.com | | | Paid for by Jeffries for Congress

Folks, Vice President Kamala Harris ran an extraordinary presidential campaign in just 107 days. And though the results of the election did not go the way we wanted, I am grateful for everything Kamala – and all of you – has done over the last few months to try and break the glass ceiling. By sharing her inspiring, joyful vision with Americans across the political spectrum, Kamala showed us what a true leader looks like. She showed us what the promise of America could be. And for that, I am truly grateful to have been a co-chair of Kamala’s historic campaign. **[To celebrate Vice President Harris and all she has done for us, will you sign this card thanking her for the joyful campaign she ran?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97289618/512925408/2087025268?source=LOC_EM_EN_2024.11.18_TYKamala_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWRjMjBlMy1lYmE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HeRu_Q46-u7J7zL8kice0FfXCy-IHEN6kiOkw8vUkPM=&emci=1060c074-70a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=d9dc20e3-eba5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=11913588)** | | [**THANK KAMALA »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97289619/512925409/2087025268?source=LOC_EM_EN_2024.11.18_TYKamala_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWRjMjBlMy1lYmE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HeRu_Q46-u7J7zL8kice0FfXCy-IHEN6kiOkw8vUkPM=&emci=1060c074-70a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=d9dc20e3-eba5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=11913588)

name: Senator-elect Tim Sheehy
subject: Friend, the fight continues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Can you read this in the next 12 minutes?

This is Senator-elect Tim Sheehy, Friend.

I wanted to personally thank you for everything you did to help Republicans take back the Senate. With your support, we won in Montana and across the country.

_We 've ensured that President Trump will have an America First Senate Majority -- and I'm ready to get to work when it comes to passing his agenda._

**[But there's a hitch, Friend. Before we can do that, we have one more fight we need to win.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5e458ed728849b6addde822b62dac21&_e=f34An2EEVx2GRexH66cFb_7h8vPLgbnzLJw5Pz7gwtl_MFV5kPGxnLLA02vOMp9lDeps477UBaNuKLG8iOThpm_6TGoi5rUarpCjG1amwblXBWHGuwwXrbs9DzucfC0cFAwdmjX_aFWfZXg5HV3FtJAv09buAczQZkPFqGRIbcdfCwUHMcjjPbpcRD-8GI32M8zx4sxeEy-pd9WPN27N3a60aZkAdY9DyrtvbWcL0_W-4OJv_Q5WQ1Sk5UtcpGAB4Hp3JH4MlfoHVr1IVY8XOfcMzKvTveUqMpFu3o1seI3f1Z-0SbBAZEtbGw40RFLspPDwUnaZXHDwjbQGt3VuArXnB185MyXVBwaLy55e_juitjFqEWpxaeAvA1jSmtdmPD_aKWts0AHeRSVMN08QXo-YNXqlJH4gmpP2TgVowsYmDvfZgAk6Hcq13izSilP1LxFrGtRTO-pvVWc0Bk0XyQ%3D%3D)**

In Pennsylvania, the Senate race is going to a recount.
[Senate Republicans are sending field teams to Pennsylvania to help with recounts and legal challenges.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5e458ed728849b6addde822b62dac21&_e=f34An2EEVx2GRexH66cFb_7h8vPLgbnzLJw5Pz7gwtl_MFV5kPGxnLLA02vOMp9lDeps477UBaNuKLG8iOThpm_6TGoi5rUarpCjG1amwblXBWHGuwwXrbs9DzucfC0cFAwdmjX_aFWfZXg5HV3FtJAv09buAczQZkPFqGRIbcdfCwUHMcjjPbpcRD-8GI32M8zx4sxeEy-pd9WPN27N3a60aZkAdY9DyrtvbWcL0_W-4OJv_Q5WQ1Sk5UtcpGAB4Hp3JH4MlfoHVr1IVY8XOfcMzKvTveUqMpFu3o1seI3f1Z-0SbBAZEtbGw40RFLs4bYR3OI3Q2Ne4zxrXq686vf8wTEDFyAkA_bhDF9-M7zfekDGatIAU_tnd8RLC-PBKioK6s71i54A3kGvvh-snrj_W930fRkoL7LJybLD6hmh2p5ibC7fau1esmHWAXYSWpCvWOmCYE5wQw31WZCnXQ%3D%3D) Democrats are doing the same. We all know how much they will raise and spend to stop us from winning more Senate seats.

**[So, Friend, I'm asking you to donate $50, $35, or even just $5 to the NRSC's Emergency Legal Fund as soon as you can >>](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5e458ed728849b6addde822b62dac21&_e=f34An2EEVx2GRexH66cFb_7h8vPLgbnzLJw5Pz7gwtl_MFV5kPGxnLLA02vOMp9lDeps477UBaNuKLG8iOThpm_6TGoi5rUarpCjG1amwblXBWHGuwwXrbs9DzucfC0cFAwdmjX_aFWfZXg5HV3FtJAv09buAczQZkPFqGRIbcdfCwUHMcjjPbpcRD-8GI32M8zx4sxeEy-pd9WPN27N3a60aZkAdY9DyrtvbWcL0_W-4OJv_Q5WQ1Sk5UtcpGAB4Hp3JH4MlfoHVr1IVY8XOfcMzKvTveUqMpFu3o1seI3f1Z-0SbBAZEtbGw40RFLsNbF62PCkEul6e9aYGpK0ooT_AZzsr7A_zosfkLtzFCrNpVzGvXLnhzngxUagJJZn9kTdh76i4UvdsisaF7FUM37QOkTLr6siRLH7b4JokkOtpwTNhz-Co5TAstWVJ9qkcl2BtcimvnM_K_nuJhPmfA%3D%3D)**

body:
We were going through our voting records and can’t seem to find your results

body:
let’s keep winning into next year

This is Senator-elect Tim Sheehy, Friend.

I wanted to personally thank you for everything you did to help Republicans take back the Senate. With your support, we won in Montana and across the country.

I’m a veteran, consumer rights advocate, and small business owner, and I’m still in the fight to flip California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, Republican-held district in Southern California – from red-to-blue.

I wanted to reach out and give you and update you on our race: **_We just took the lead, but only 36 votes separate us and our opponent._**

Every ballot drop has brought us closer to taking the lead in this toss-up race, but victory is going to come down to counting _every single vote._

[We need to make sure every vote is counted in order to win, so I have to ask for your support. Will you split a contribution between our legal fund and UNITEDemocrats to help us count every vote? name: Bob Casey
subject: Standing up for the people of Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard.
Peter, my priority has always been standing up for the people of Pennsylvania.
Across our Commonwealth, close to 7 million people cast their votes in a free and fair election. Our county election officials will finish counting those votes, just like they do in every election.
We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard. The American democratic process was born in Pennsylvania, and that process must and will play out.
**[I’m here to tell you that the process is not done, and this race is _not_ over. Can you fund our fight to have all voices heard by splitting a donation of $10 or more between myself and Lucas Kunce right now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84318?refcode=em20241118-8676&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8676%2E614464%2E9y0d9Y)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84319?refcode=em20241118-8676&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=8676%2E614464%2E9y0d9Y) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84319?refcode=em20241118-8676&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=8676%2E614464%2E9y0d9Y) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84319?refcode=em20241118-8676&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=8676%2E614464%2E9y0d9Y) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84319?refcode=em20241118-8676&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=8676%2E614464%2E9y0d9Y) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84319?refcode=em20241118-8676&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=8676%2E614464%2E9y0d9Y) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84319?refcode=em20241118-8676&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=8676%2E614464%2E9y0d9Y) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84318?refcode=em20241118-8676&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=8676%2E614464%2E9y0d9Y)

Peter, is there _anything_ we can say to convince you to make a contribution to support the Harris Fight Fund program today? Please let us try: First and foremost, we want to acknowledge the fear, confusion, and sadness many of you are feeling at this moment. But what if we told you that as you read this there are races that are either too close to call, or within the margin of recounts or certain legal challenges. What if we told you that they all need our help to get across the finish line? And what if we told you that your support today will help make sure we succeed and count every vote in these final races? You're needed, Peter. Today. **[Please rush a $50 contribution to support the Harris Fight Fund program. The donation you give will help Democratic candidates across the country who need to protect their victories and make sure every vote is counted in their races.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-hvf-november-fight-fund-2024?refcode=kh_em_fr_20241118_b2_khc_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-res-&amount=50&amounts=50%252C75%252C100%252C250%252C500&countdown=-13&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ak&utm_campaign=kh_em_fr_20241118_b2_khc_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-res-&refcode2=280_2563979_gH0GUU&akid=280%2E2563979%2EgH0GUU)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$50 >>](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/1009?c0=em-hvf-november-fight-fund-2024.OpRu0f&refcode=kh_em_fr_20241118_b2_khc_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-res-&amount=50&amounts=50%252C75%252C100%252C250%252C500&utm_campaign=kh_em_fr_20241118_b2_khc_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-res-&countdown=-13&t=3&akid=280%2E2563979%2EgH0GUU)

If you’d like to unsubscribe from all Harris for President emails, you can **[click here](https://harris.actionkit.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=10&akid=280%2E2563979%2EgH0GUU)**. The first $41,300/$15,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to the DNC. The next $3,300/$5,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to Harris for President’s Recount Account. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits. A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting **info@kamalaharris.com**. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.

As Attorney General, Jason Miyares has been a partisan warrior for his extremist agenda. He has used his office to attack women’s fundamental right to choose and allow working families to struggle with rising costs.After three years, he’s failed every Virginian. And with Donald Trump becoming our next president, we need to do everything we can to put **Virginia families front and center.****In short, Miyares will stand behind Trump and the largest corporations –**** _no matter what._** That’s why I’m in this race, folks. Throughout my career, I’ve put people first by cracking down on ghost guns and taking on slumlords and big banks. I fought to expand Medicaid, increase the minimum wage and give teachers annual pay raises. **Virginia will be the first test of this second Trump administration.** And every Virginian deserves a brighter future for years to come – not darkness and chaos under Donald Trump and Jason Miyares. **[**So right now, before Jason Miyares can get too much momentum, will you make a grassroots contribution to support our campaign and help us kick Jason Miyares out of office in 2025?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97291304/512931597/1597325137?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.11.18_Miyares_B1_F1_S1_C1_15DOxDC_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg2MTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzI4MjU0NDYtZjNhNS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yNv9-dCvndXug71LuFTSmaFeQvNcoaFZIwXEOeHQhd0=)**

clean_body: Miyares will stand behind Trump and the largest corporations – no matter what. | | | | | Folks, we were expecting this news: Republican Attorney General Jason Miyares launched his reelection bid. = = As Attorney General, Jason Miyares has been a partisan warrior for his extremist agenda. He has used his office to attack women’s fundamental right to choose and allow working families to struggle with rising costs.After three years, he’s failed every Virginian. And with Donald Trump becoming our next president, we need to do everything we can to put Virginia families front and center.In short, Miyares will stand behind Trump and the largest corporations – no matter what. That’s why I’m in this race, folks. Throughout my career, I’ve put people first by cracking down on ghost guns and taking on slumlords and big banks. I fought to expand Medicaid, increase the minimum wage and give teachers annual pay raises. Virginia will be the first test of this second Trump administration. And every Virginian deserves a brighter future for years to come – not darkness and chaos under Donald Trump and Jason Miyares. = = = = = = = With you,Jay Jay Jones for Virginia PO Box 2501 Arlington, VA 22202 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: These diaper brands are pro-abortion
body:
Did you know that America’s most popular diaper brands, including Huggies, Pampers, Hello Bello, and Honest Co., all support abortion?

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. #
Friend of Life,

Did you know that America's most popular diaper brands, including Huggies, Pampers, Hello Bello, and Honest Co., all support abortion?

This is peak irony. Brands that provide a necessity for babies also financially and/or publicly support an act that intentionally kills innocent children in the womb.

As pro-life people, we can do something to put a stop to this.

**Live Action is hosting a diaper drive with EveryLife -- the first pro-life diaper company -- to help mothers and their babies in need.**

If you're tired of supporting brands that don't align with your pro-life values, you can do something now to help women AND support a pro-life business.

**Your gift of just $50 will provide six packs of EveryLife diapers to a mom who is considering abortion or is facing a crisis and help her embrace life. Our goal is to provide 34 boxes of diapers to every state.**

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=838c1bd1acb8415aa98b9df27f8ba608&_e=NlGPCyKFbTMU552KWfQmL6o5VqvMal6gzY2XC52rWJMEJkM1d8L8wTwOsZM8mVrPhC8-5Y0N-zw5PIrVNakTb4mL0eR4fBXojoyHa91k3cqDtn62MWoVzhDTyrfS_tblPwYtpWBu2gJP68ihPzYf5wJfSyoRExasd169-YdVnNacI-i_UM_FI1jdZgSCZlKJlsVgSGIllI8HAy_JGSJ4W3l6AMWzQ_E4T6RM8xv3pwiO1VqOeih_0xvu3mNMuxhFf4GKmAEsmfrApLxKX-Gd4ictZZQWuKptBxrx5X3cUalfbpvyXOxavlV7DZSEp9UTOxmy843gL6IH7IbSt-aq-oEATRDaOgBLsrSq8LshbwAPYq3mPY20UaZ5-9-a6QVRbFKqu5k4RSn_p9lCG9lIPg%3D%3D)
Is this something you can do? Here's your secure link to give: **[https://give.liveaction.org/send-a-box-of-diapers-to-a-mom-in-need/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=838c1bd1acb8415aa98b9df27f8ba608&_e=NlGPCyKFbTMU552KWfQmL6o5VqvMal6gzY2XC52rWJMEJkM1d8L8wTwOsZM8mVrPhC8-5Y0N-zw5PIrVNakTb4mL0eR4fBXojoyHa91k3cqDtn62MWoVzhDTyrfS_tblPwYtpWBu2gJP68ihPzYf5wJfSyoRExasd169-YdVnNacI-i_UM_FI1jdZgSCZlKJlsVgSGIllI8HAy_JGSJ4W3l6AMWzQ_E4T6RM8xv3pwiqx7mI1tUEu6xVt9C4nEoc6nDWiRU9PySYa0f6VhE76tjQ62QmXuL06HgX6STLp-WLtQS9E7linQidSslQCEPKnDNpANZuVouDNEzXxeCoMSjlGdwN7xr7rivrjmF5M_lt39uCOO4u4uOKpDOW8pvVB3CyGWn9U2VCEqtNp1QFGw%3D%3D)**

EveryLife prides itself in being a pro-life company that uses premium materials for their diapers-- and better yet, EveryLife promotes the message that every baby is a miracle from God who deserves to be loved, protected, and supported.

Your gift will send a box of diapers to a local pro-life pregnancy clinic so that moms days away from a potentially life-ending decision can receive the practical support they need to choose life.

Thank you in advance for standing with us against big abortion and equipping moms to choose life.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=838c1bd1acb8415aa98b9df27f8ba608&_e=NlGPCyKFbTMU552KWfQmL6o5VqvMal6gzY2XC52rWJMEJkM1d8L8wTwOsZM8mVrPhC8-5Y0N-zw5PIrVNakTb4mL0eR4fBXojoyHa91k3cqDtn62MWoVzhDTyrfS_tblPwYtpWBu2gJP68ihPzYf5wJfSyoRExasd169-YdVnNacI-i_UM_FI1jdZgSCZlKJlsVgSGIllI8HAy_JGSJ4W3l6AMWzQ_E4T6RM8xv3pwgkaO17CPTrt0CQD2bTqqOOJmmn0jIEgKAyQ5MTSUAFY5GkApSP-cBFiW7FTaE9NYP7m-JFFvDl_A7pYlECAfferIHXu2K6ql4EybYUuX-2zS9mKrRNJN8XCG5_eXSma8IicxUmCAUvCB5ib8ngLd2i6jF2fJ5EC8JC-mopgqJlLg%3D%3D)

name: Team McBride
subject: The work ahead of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Join our growing movement to support Sarah's fight for progress
#
While this is a difficult moment for many, our team remains deeply grateful to supporters like you. Because of your efforts, Sarah will be heading to Congress to defend our democracy and fight for working families across Delaware and the country.
Throughout this campaign, Sarah has traveled up and down the state and heard from families about the issues keeping them up at night – the cost of healthcare, the struggle to afford childcare, and the challenge of finding affordable housing.
So while the path ahead in Congress may be challenging, Sarah has shown us time and time again that when we move past the divisions and headlines, real progress is possible. That's exactly what she did in the Delaware State Senate, working across the aisle to:
**✅ Pass paid family and medical leave**
**✅ Secure historic investments in Medicaid**
**✅ Fight for affordable housing**
**✅ Protect reproductive freedom**
Sarah is committed to keeping up that work in Washington, but she’s counting on grassroots supporters like you to help her do it.
[**Will you chip in $5 today to help Sarah start strong as she fights for working families in Congress?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241118?refcode=em20241118-1560&amount=5&refcode2=1560_21716_YS2kKh&akid=1560%2E21716%2EYS2kKh)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241118?amount=5&refcode=em20241118-1560&refcode2=1560_21716_YS2kKh&akid=1560%2E21716%2EYS2kKh)**
What we're building together is bigger than any single election. It's about proving that a different kind of politics is possible – one focused on hope, not hate; on solutions, not soundbites.
We know how hard it is to stay hopeful right now. But as Sarah often reminds us, when Americans come together, we've overcome challenges far greater than the ones we face today.
That's the spirit she’s bringing to Congress – determined to find common ground and deliver real results.
[**With your continued support, we can help Sarah turn that vision into reality.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241118?refcode=em20241118-1560&amount=5&refcode2=1560_21716_YS2kKh&akid=1560%2E21716%2EYS2kKh)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241118?amount=5&refcode=em20241118-1560&refcode2=1560_21716_YS2kKh&akid=1560%2E21716%2EYS2kKh)**
Thank you for your continued support,
Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20241118-1&t=1&refcode2=1560_21716_YS2kKh&akid=1560%2E21716%2EYS2kKh)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1560%2E21716%2EYS2kKh)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1560%2E21716%2EYS2kKh)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1560%2E21716%2EYS2kKh)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Michelle Steel
subject: We're not in the clear yet, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Sorry to reach out like this...

| |
---
| | | Friend, Election Day may be in the books, _but my race isn 't done yet._

_**[I'm neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkTGL3TAMxz-NszlEcuI4Q4aD40GHKwcdOho3VhKDYwdbeXf99uW1vKlLu0r89JP0__5m31yIIW1f3UFzqNWWavluKxNFmTLLJZIrFjvsJYAEY6Hx84BgVtPQDKOCSZvRdM0-D4DemMF1ZsRx9do5DcpPGtEP7sdITZgfcwDAIPSg-lYjjoRTP03jOnWKRN9dp3dMbUg1eKpLzueZY-Cw1DaXrYnzznxWoV4E3gTeKi1XofYjpEK-XfIh8HaEZacYSf65otCSr8RyvZIXeFvzte0sOWe5u_KoCHU7cqKf9ozkNxLqlctFAvXFh13ccbqwJaFen8vb9xf55ds7tgBKK2UZBgPDpCWAMQI1fVoO_j-A356cmBI_5HcZapVPWKD-vNL970ZTZn9-hBhD1aPou-1wIT5e0PC_Jnmf8VcAAAD__-lSnh4 "I’m neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.")**_

If we're going to pull this out and keep my seat, then I'm going to need all hands on deck.

I spent every dime I had just to get through Election Day, and now I'm running on fumes. I NEED your urgent support to help me keep this fight going before the ballots are all counted.

_**[Please, can I count on you, Friend?](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkTGL3TAMxz-NszlEcuI4Q4aD40GHKwcdOho3VhKDYwdbeXf99uW1vKlLu0r89JP0__5m31yIIW1f3UFzqNWWavluKxNFmTLLJZIrFjvsJYAEY6Hx84BgVtPQDKOCSZvRdM0-D4DemMF1ZsRx9do5DcpPGtEP7sdITZgfcwDAIPSg-lYjjoRTP03jOnWKRN9dp3dMbUg1eKpLzueZY-Cw1DaXrYnzznxWoV4E3gTeKi1XofYjpEK-XfIh8HaEZacYSf65otCSr8RyvZIXeFvzte0sOWe5u_KoCHU7cqKf9ozkNxLqlctFAvXFh13ccbqwJaFen8vb9xf55ds7tgBKK2UZBgPDpCWAMQI1fVoO_j-A356cmBI_5HcZapVPWKD-vNL970ZTZn9-hBhD1aPou-1wIT5e0PC_Jnmf8VcAAAD__-lSnh4 "Please, can I count on you, Friend?")**_

Thank you,

Michelle Steel
