name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want your opinion on religious liberty
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country... | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=88ffa506c61947cca906dbb5f997f275&_t=e5igVbwDIxrFcsYdv9rKCsLOA1kYNPQ9gJ5kOGladmLaj51ysNihLnTdQVnS5_G5vYbYQf4aYO_xKF_uYeDIQM8HO5gYJo7lor-bfGi8ZjgOqU-GkqzSLRXhblKyTc1Q)_
---
|
---
| | | [](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=88ffa506c61947cca906dbb5f997f275&_e=mLkovTBLGWx91IpOwWYkkkMVJWqfzIVk80r6aQQ601Tqbo9oiPpT5lm1kp9Roi6QOSBJYSJ4vXyq6xZAz_vE6YsBzNV3DPy3SkrMQtLZ2-XAsEqV0bF8_qqPRMwAK13iK6XnJ4UKBuWJmQi9xhyK8AbY501Ph8-wsFvv8Nk2Wftz-vDxU8PzdNIL0n0ABZZJtubuTRiGRDkCr94YVhRwyVak__vsak6he8iciZ7uWM7RPLNcmaOx_MX9k36nfELJC5R_QSurIb4hN0IvZAnGp32YUpHfWBBWaZrRfADSub34wxAvrVGfqcQpbVvwhk5Zi7o_nptVqpCrq20Cz205zNAv4_VciLhiQA64hzyHasflGcp-PlIslKXbIjazub9-eS8bxCJCJR5eVGEDf8gD-beogfOsUTWmD29Xj-3LXs3a87RfNl6hc9fBc8EWq8Rx)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty_?**](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=88ffa506c61947cca906dbb5f997f275&_e=mLkovTBLGWx91IpOwWYkkkMVJWqfzIVk80r6aQQ601Tqbo9oiPpT5lm1kp9Roi6QOSBJYSJ4vXyq6xZAz_vE6YsBzNV3DPy3SkrMQtLZ2-XAsEqV0bF8_qqPRMwAK13iK6XnJ4UKBuWJmQi9xhyK8AbY501Ph8-wsFvv8Nk2Wftz-vDxU8PzdNIL0n0ABZZJtubuTRiGRDkCr94YVhRwyVak__vsak6he8iciZ7uWM7RPLNcmaOx_MX9k36nfELJC5R_QSurIb4hN0IvZAnGp6SjQ9m3QoeDDzjnM_ob6IgKqv8Y_41Ww4mu92paD7_ySRawAbFrigHK5Qx4hf7s9-q4mx_l83PpkVzAuCYfNDqczdUTiLDAl0e54x8mafrfjJ1MIuZUAzXM08HI-A1A5W72i6Ro_8MOeisyWrSvKeiZmAepnFshKffezu0A2pVb) [](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=88ffa506c61947cca906dbb5f997f275&_e=mLkovTBLGWx91IpOwWYkkkMVJWqfzIVk80r6aQQ601Tqbo9oiPpT5lm1kp9Roi6QOSBJYSJ4vXyq6xZAz_vE6YsBzNV3DPy3SkrMQtLZ2-XAsEqV0bF8_qqPRMwAK13iK6XnJ4UKBuWJmQi9xhyK8AbY501Ph8-wsFvv8Nk2Wftz-vDxU8PzdNIL0n0ABZZJtubuTRiGRDkCr94YVhRwyVak__vsak6he8iciZ7uWM7RPLNcmaOx_MX9k36nfELJC5R_QSurIb4hN0IvZAnGpxsinaOuouMurlE9K2UtcEVZx6df-8vwdVibdf1YoGbuooxDPkkl__kVndicUZ9IKDsTGzLnidksipZDKLqKjr65El5blN5PzPlwJhiJkH44qkkWBh_mefBwc_SoFy094AMlWEnc8QmPcqVWNvKbZQcZeNq-aFviBbRIwA4YXQD_) In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act, numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act, brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values.**

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values,**are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=88ffa506c61947cca906dbb5f997f275&_e=mLkovTBLGWx91IpOwWYkkkMVJWqfzIVk80r6aQQ601Tqbo9oiPpT5lm1kp9Roi6QOSBJYSJ4vXyq6xZAz_vE6YsBzNV3DPy3SkrMQtLZ2-XAsEqV0bF8_qqPRMwAK13iK6XnJ4UKBuWJmQi9xhyK8AbY501Ph8-wsFvv8Nk2Wftz-vDxU8PzdNIL0n0ABZZJtubuTRiGRDkCr94YVhRwyVak__vsak6he8iciZ7uWM7RPLNcmaOx_MX9k36nfELJC5R_QSurIb4hN0IvZAnGp03RuYx4s0yxfNZnzxiOv32uQrtHin-hExWTxDPmPx8mIQdUPLQ_aTSsqVxTd8h1bvf5u3MPS1K_lJpVweJcDLLGcczBq8PVCb8peg8kJibumOz0VtcZ7I1MJfiQHKo9erkIw8YaESEmuxSWp7PuaE1k77txRJCL4FV1KAutyCG-)

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

body:
Rob Always Finds Time to Come Home | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/014d6cc6660e/orientation-week?e=131e83a3c2)
---
| | | |
---
| Good Afternoon,
Before we begin this email, I would like to take a moment to recognize the passing of one of NEPA’s cornerstones. This past week, NEPA lost one of its best, Wally Kuharchik, Rob’s grandfather was called up to heaven. We will all miss Wally, and pray for Rob and his whole family.
---
|
---
|
---
| Rob had a busy week, in our nation's capital this past week. It has been a crazy experience to say the least, but Rob is ready to get past all the formalities and get to work for the people of Northeastern Pennsylvania!
---
|
---
| Rob made sure to make time to come to events in NEPA over the weekend. He also delivered pizzas and water to the brave firefighters battling the brush fire at Montage Mountain, on Saturday. When he’s not fighting for us on Capitol Hill, he’ll be out in the community with all of us!
---
|
---
[](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=0508d05265&e=131e83a3c2)
| This week’s small business we are highlighting is Tammy’s Kitchen, in Wilkes-Barre. Jimmy made the decision to buy the bar he worked in for years and take a chance in NEPA! Thank you to Jimmy, and definitely swing by to grab a drink and enjoy some great food!
---
|
---
| The road to 2026 starts TODAY! Congressman-Elect Bresnahan will face the same California donors getting ready to spread lies about Rob, and we need your help to fight it!
You can donate online. Please give any amount you are able, every penny counts! Click the logo below to donate now!

name: Bob Casey
subject: We must value democracy more than expediency
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Pennsylvania Senate Victory Fund 2024
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4870%2E552475%2E2fPrFe)
Peter,
As a public official, including serving Pennsylvania for three terms in the United States Senate, my top priority and only consideration has been what is best for the Commonwealth.
Right now, counties across Pennsylvania are still tabulating the results of our November election for the first time. As Pennsylvanians wait to learn the final result of this very close Senate election, there has been extensive commentary about why I have not yet conceded.
**The answer is simple: Pennsylvanians deserve to have their voices heard, and the worth of someone’s vote is not determined by how long it takes to be counted.** When a Pennsylvanian takes the time to cast a legal vote, often waiting in long lines and taking time away from their work and family, they deserve to have their vote counted, whether it is the first ballot counted or the last.
The current margin of this race is a quarter of one percent, and it will take time to determine the final result. The slim margin has drawn more attention to this process than in recent elections, but the process itself is not unusual. Our dedicated county election officials are moving through the same democratic process they undertake after every single election, whether the margin is slim or large. Unlike in past elections, the votes in this election could determine the outcome.
There are thousands of eligible voters who cast their ballot but made small errors that would have disenfranchised them if they weren’t able to correct them by their county’s deadline. Most counties allow up to a week for voters to correct these minor errors in a process known as curing ballots. In one case in Allegheny County, a 100-year-old woman who had voted in every election since she had become eligible to vote was able to fix an error on her ballot after Election Day and make sure her vote was counted.
Still, other voters across the Commonwealth went out to vote and did everything right, but because of small mistakes and understandable human error – on the part of the voter or due to election officials – their votes have to move through a lengthier process.
While this process has been lengthy and will still take time, I have remained committed to one clear goal:**Letting the voices of Pennsylvanians be heard and standing up against efforts to silence and disenfranchise voters in the Commonwealth.**
This principle stands in stark opposition to Washington Republicans, who have interrupted this process and filed numerous lawsuits to disenfranchise thousands of voters. Attorneys representing my opponent in this race and national Republicans have argued to disqualify ballots where the voter did everything right, but an election official forgot to counter-sign the ballot envelope.
Poll workers and election officials work very hard, but they are human – and voters should not be penalized for any mistakes they make.
This close race has also put a spotlight on undated mail ballots, as my opponent and his allies have filed an appeal with the Pennsylvania Supreme Court to disqualify mail ballots where a voter has accidentally written the date wrong or didn’t write a date at all.
Undated mail ballots have long been at issue in Pennsylvania’s elections. Gov. Wolf’s administration advocated to have these ballots count, as has Secretary of State Al Schmidt, and even my opponent himself. The Commonwealth Court of Pennsylvania has ruled twice in 2024 alone that throwing out these ballots violates Pennsylvania’s constitution.
At its core, this is a debate about the constitutionality of disenfranchising thousands of voters due to a requirement that has no bearing on a voters’ eligibility and has no impact in deterring fraud. The Pennsylvania Supreme Court has been asked to take up this issue and come to a resolution for a question that has been at issue long before the 2024 election, and which will reverberate far beyond this race.
Unfortunately, this democratic process has been subject to repeated right-wing misinformation and allegations of foul play. I urge the people of Pennsylvania and across the nation to have patience and allow this constitutional process to play out. We cannot set the dangerous precedent that the desire of a political party or election forecasters to declare a race as settled should overrule the voices of the voters who participated in the election – for whom the results have real consequences in their daily lives – or the election officials who work through a painstaking process to tabulate the votes.
I served the people for ten years as Auditor General and State Treasurer in the Finance Building in Harrisburg. The following is inscribed on that building: “All public service is a trust, given in faith and accepted in honor.”
I want to make sure that trust and faith is upheld. Pennsylvanians deserve to trust that when they cast a vote legally, it is counted. They deserve to trust they will not be disenfranchised due to mistakes made by poll workers or election officials. They deserve to trust that expediency will never be valued more than democracy.
Regardless of the final result, I am committed to ensuring Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241118-4?refcode=em20241118-4&refcode2=4870_552475_2fPrFe&akid=4870%2E552475%2E2fPrFe)**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=4870%2E552475%2E2fPrFe)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=4870%2E552475%2E2fPrFe)

To give by check:
Pennsylvania Senate Victory Fund 2024
PO Box 15845
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

name: Michelle Steel - iPhone
subject: We’re not in the clear yet, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Sorry to reach out like this...

| |
---
| | | Friend, Election Day may be in the books, _but my race isn 't done yet._

_**[I'm neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/c_eWcXhIBOooXu2LhcGRyQ~~/AARclAA~~ "I’m neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.")**_

If we're going to pull this out and keep my seat, then I'm going to need all hands on deck.

I spent every dime I had just to get through Election Day, and now I'm running on fumes. I NEED your urgent support to help me keep this fight going before the ballots are all counted.

_**[Please, can I count on you, Friend?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/c_eWcXhIBOooXu2LhcGRyQ~~/AARclAA~~ "Please, can I count on you, Friend?")**_

Thank you,

Michelle Steel
_Sent from my iPhone_

---
Friend - Helga Zepp-LaRouche opened a dialogue with international collaborators this morning by pointing out that the Biden Administration has given permission to Ukraine to use ATACAM missiles for strikes in the territory of Russia. Zepp-LaRouche pointed out that this is obviously a euphemism because everybody knows that Ukraine alone is technically not capable to use the ATACAMS or Taurus or Storm Shadow missiles. Their deployment requires the technical aid of NATO, i.e. US, German, British forces, which means de facto NATO is entering the war with Russia, or has with this decision entered the war. She said that this is extremely dangerous and absolutely insane and we must go in a complete mobilization to warn against it, which she is sure other forces will do likewise. We're talking about a crucial mobilization in the days ahead since, according to media reports the first such attack on the region of Kursk may occur in the next few days. Join us tonight at 8.30 pm to discuss the different activities to make sure this decision is reversed and instead that the U.S. joins the Global Majority, including Russia and China, in building new just economic world order as envisioned by Lyndon LaRouche and his movement over the past decades.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97292060/512933934/1611023793?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_FederalEmployees_241118_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGVkZWYzMC1mN2E1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nh0aTJO-wZ_GWzCM_QOHysu6I4pV4TL-c_5YNy4qk14=) I’ll cut to the chase, Derek.

Donald Trump's Project 2025 agenda is a junk drawer of bad ideas, but one of the worst is his plan to dismantle and relocate the federal workforce.

Look, the whole notion of the civil service was created to make sure that our workforce was not overly politicized. Plus, any vendetta Trump has against the federal workforce would be a disaster for Virginia, especially our state’s economy. Trump – _who claims to be a good businessman_ – should recognize that by moving federal workers all over the nation, we’ll lose a lot of experience and expertise.

**That’s why my message to federal workers is this: I’m ready to stand up for you and protect you every step of the way, no matter what the next administration has in store.**

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Trump will mobilize the Military for mass deportations
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Our job now and for the next four years is to show everyone what Trump is and what he is doing to our country. We have to make it clear — we have to show it. And we have to be honest.
#
Peter — many of you are Veterans.
Many of you are the children of Veterans, or the spouse, brother, sister, or cousin of one. Many of your own children have served, or serve today.
And most of us are going to have to grapple with the reality that Trump’s primary goals — retribution and vengeance — are going to be accomplished by abusing his authority as Commander in Chief.
We saw one of the clearest signs of this today.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov24.0GjwC1&refcode=em241118-1-30&t=1&akid=33981%2E3013755%2EvOwic1)
Trump will mobilize the United States Military for mass deportations.
In doing so, he goes beyond abuse of authority. He undermines the public perception of the Military to the entire nation. No longer will our Military be perceived just as an apolitical force that acts in our collective defense, but an extension of Donald Trump that is pulling families and friends from a community by force.
It’s horrifying. But we’re afraid this is only the beginning.
In deploying the Military on American soil for domestic purposes it will allow him to normalize the use of the Military against American citizens. Make no mistake: This is Trump’s path to using the Military to put down lawful protests against his administration, and worse.
He told us all that this is what he would do. He was clear on the campaign trail that this was his goal — and he said it repeatedly. Whether or not this is what many people wanted when they voted for Donald Trump, this is what he promised. And unfortunately, this is what they are going to get.
The sad truth is... VoteVets is not positioned to prevent this from happening. **But that does not mean that we are powerless.**
Even now, even before he has taken office, many Americans are beginning to understand who and what they voted for. Our job now and for the next four years is to show everyone what Trump is and what he is doing to our country. We have to make it clear — we have to show it.
We may not be able to stop him, but you can be sure that we will fight him every step of the way.
[**Please. As we work to rebuild our infrastructure and reorient for a second Trump presidency, it is vital that this team continues to stay involved and locked in. Your donations are what keep us going. And if you could chip in $5 or anything you can afford today it would have an incredible impact on our efforts.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov24.0GjwC1&refcode=em241118-1-30&t=2&akid=33981%2E3013755%2EvOwic1)

# [Hate Crime Charges Filed After Anti-Muslim Attack Caught On Video](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151821079&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxODIxMDc5LCJpYXQiOjE3MzE5NjczMTUsImV4cCI6MTczNDU1OTMxNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.g7bRZ55lgftmov16lRN-1IyIeYiFtu9d_70LPl_CR5E)
### Just as disturbing as the attack, was that no one stopped the attacker or tried to intervene, and we need to understand the critical lesson from this event
| | [Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Nov 18
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151821079&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxODIxMDc5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMTk2NzMxNSwiZXhwIjoxNzM0NTU5MzE1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.5ByBWyhYUjMBa_H-3MINH2vqojhZXSwSX_4fho4oJJ0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151821079&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxODIxMDc5LCJpYXQiOjE3MzE5NjczMTUsImV4cCI6MTczNDU1OTMxNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.g7bRZ55lgftmov16lRN-1IyIeYiFtu9d_70LPl_CR5E&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151821079&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxODIxMDc5LCJpYXQiOjE3MzE5NjczMTUsImV4cCI6MTczNDU1OTMxNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.g7bRZ55lgftmov16lRN-1IyIeYiFtu9d_70LPl_CR5E)
---
| | [](https://substack..GsEjiEw4H-FFByveUppNCw2yIwLFE8yU_sdRp2KSZms?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/an-anti-muslim-attack-caught-on-video?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---
This week a pregnant Muslim woman and her husband suffered a racist attack at a Panera Bread in Downers Grove, IL. The deeply disturbing video of a white woman named Alexandra Szustakiewicz (64) verbally and physically attacking them because they wore a Palestinian hoodie [is already viral on social media](https://substack.com/redirect/903130e2-429b-4483-a710-5e657ff7e559?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Downers Grove is less than a 30 minutes drive from Plainfield, where last year a white supremacist murdered 6-year-old Wadea Al-Fayoume. And just as disturbing is the fact that while this racist committed her hate crime in broad daylight with dozens of people in the store--not a single person came to their aid. Downers Grove is not in the deep red south. It is not "MAGA country." So what happened and why did no one speak up? **Let 's Address This.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9efd61ef-47f0-4a2c-bed8-53b6c4a72753?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Quick note! I am doing everything in my power over the next 4 years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I welcome your support. **Subscribe below and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..0lBbzq4q93VlvhUobOVKzgH8B44fdtXNmFhbdQ7HXYc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=151821079)
First, take a moment to watch the brief video.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ec000287-d5d1-47c8-bf03-1903c729f9cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The husband, Waseem Zahran was [quoted by local media after the attack](https://substack.com/redirect/3c408014-0ced-4e16-bb5d-91b9d3297f27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> She walked by, and she saw my Palestinian sweater, and that caused her to say, like 'F*** Palestine' and like other, like, 'F*** you, f*** Palestine.'
I want to point out two key points. First, I commend Mr. Zahran for his patience, situational awareness, and self-control. Kudos to him for maintaining his calm, deescalating as best as he could, and protecting his wife. That takes courage and compassion, and he exemplified both.
Next, and here is the part we must reflect on, notice how nobody else intervenes? We can see another woman standing behind the attacker, just minding her own business as if nothing is going on. Nobody at Panera takes any action. Nobody in the rest of the store even bothers to get up from their tables, despite the loud altercation.
And to reiterate, Downers Grove, IL is in a blue district. I state this to make clear that it would be foolish to dismiss the attack as "just what Republicans do." Is the attacker Alexandra Szustakiewicz a MAGA racist? Maybe. Was everyone in that store a MAGA racist--doubtful. There's an important lesson here I want to emphasize.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..0lBbzq4q93VlvhUobOVKzgH8B44fdtXNmFhbdQ7HXYc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151821079)
### Not Racist vs Anti Racist
This event exemplifies what we mean when we talk about the difference between being _not racist_ and being _anti-racis_ t. There are plenty of people who might agree, "_What Alexandra Szustakiewicz did is_ _wrong, she shouldn 't have done that_." But when a person is also _anti-racist_ , they go beyond verbal condemnations _after the fact_ , and take action to undo injustice _in real time_. And in this situation that could have included calling 911 right away--but no one called. It could have meant getting up and standing between the racist and the innocent pregnant woman that the racist was attacking--but no one stood up. It could even have been as simple as raising awareness in the store to do something and let the attacker know she was outnumbered and in the wrong--but no one spoke up.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/97c178ff-1798-431f-976c-461e1d59871c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Police say Alexandra Szustakiewicz, 64, "initiated a physical confrontation" with the couple, who were wearing shirts with the word "Palestine" on them. (DuPage County State's Attorney's Office)
Dangerous examples like this exemplify why the phrase "_being silent is being complicit_ " exists. And especially as Trump's new Muslim ban is expected to go live some time in late January 2025, we know it is going to get worse. If 2017 is any indicator, we can likely expect to see a spike in anti-Muslim hate crimes, and we need to be ready and united.
And finally, we cannot ignore the white privilege in this scenario. First, imagine if the roles were reversed and a person of color attacked a white woman? Media and right wing politicians would run wild to spread fear and disinformation nationally. (_see e.g._ the months long demonization of all Haitians due to one fabricated claim about pets, [made by one white woman](https://substack.com/redirect/12d08fa6-f78c-4da6-9e0b-3a6893525ddf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). But while local media reports that even though police identified the racist woman who attacked the Muslim couple, and even though police have the video evidence of her physically attacking them--she was allowed to leave.
Fortunately--police have finally filed hate crime charges against 64-year-old Alexandra Szustakiewicz. [Local Patch reports](https://substack.com/redirect/e803435f-7c26-4bbf-99b5-228be7aa6421?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "Alexandra Szustakiewicz, 64, was charged with two counts of hate crime and one count of disorderly conduct in connection with Saturday's incident." Additionally, DuPage County State's Attorney Robert Berlin said in a statement:
> Every member of society, regardless of race, religion, sexual orientation or any other individual characteristic, deserves to be treated with respect and civility. This type of behavior and the accompanying prejudice have no place in a civilized society and my office stands ready to file the appropriate charges in such cases.
Szustakiewicz is set to appear in court Dec. 16.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..0lBbzq4q93VlvhUobOVKzgH8B44fdtXNmFhbdQ7HXYc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151821079)
### Moving Forward United
I hopeful that the expectant mother who suffered this hate crime receives the support she needs, and likewise that the racist woman Alexandra Szustakiewicz who committed the hate crime faces the accountability she deserves. As we move forward into this next administration, we have an opportunity to recognize these injustices for what they are, and stand united against them. This is an opportunity for us to improve ourselves by recognizing the importance of being anti-racist, to meaningfully invest in those individuals and organizations working the front lines to counter this violent rhetoric, and to collectively demand justice in all matters. That is how we will not only survive these next four years, but meaningfully move towards a more perfect Union.

_As for me, I will be doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I cannot do it alone. I invite you to support my work and advocacy by subscribing below. Thank you for your trust and partnership._

clean_body: Just as disturbing as the attack, was that no one stopped the attacker or tried to intervene, and we need to understand the critical lesson from this event | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! Just as disturbing as the attack, was that no one stopped the attacker or tried to intervene, and we need to understand the critical lesson from this event | | | Nov 18 | | | | | | | | | | | | This week a pregnant Muslim woman and her husband suffered a racist attack at a Panera Bread in Downers Grove, IL. The deeply disturbing video of a white woman named Alexandra Szustakiewicz (64) verbally and physically attacking them because they wore a Palestinian hoodie . Downers Grove is less than a 30 minutes drive from Plainfield, where last year a white supremacist murdered 6-year-old Wadea Al-Fayoume. And just as disturbing is the fact that while this racist committed her hate crime in broad daylight with dozens of people in the store--not a single person came to their aid. Downers Grove is not in the deep red south. It is not "MAGA country." So what happened and why did no one speak up? Let 's Address This. | | ---|---|--- Quick note! I am doing everything in my power over the next 4 years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I welcome your support. Subscribe below and join the movement. First, take a moment to watch the brief video. The husband, Waseem Zahran was : She walked by, and she saw my Palestinian sweater, and that caused her to say, like 'F Palestine' and like other, like, 'F you, f Palestine.' I want to point out two key points. First, I commend Mr. Zahran for his patience, situational awareness, and self-control. Kudos to him for maintaining his calm, deescalating as best as he could, and protecting his wife. That takes courage and compassion, and he exemplified both. Next, and here is the part we must reflect on, notice how nobody else intervenes? We can see another woman standing behind the attacker, just minding her own business as if nothing is going on. Nobody at Panera takes any action. Nobody in the rest of the store even bothers to get up from their tables, despite the loud altercation. And to reiterate, Downers Grove, IL is in a blue district. I state this to make clear that it would be foolish to dismiss the attack as "just what Republicans do." Is the attacker Alexandra Szustakiewicz a MAGA racist? Maybe. Was everyone in that store a MAGA racist--doubtful. There's an important lesson here I want to emphasize. Not Racist vs Anti Racist This event exemplifies what we mean when we talk about the difference between being not racist and being anti-racis t. There are plenty of people who might agree, "What Alexandra Szustakiewicz did is wrong, she shouldn 't have done that." But when a person is also anti-racist , they go beyond verbal condemnations after the fact , and take action to undo injustice in real time. And in this situation that could have included calling 911 right away--but no one called. It could have meant getting up and standing between the racist and the innocent pregnant woman that the racist was attacking--but no one stood up. It could even have been as simple as raising awareness in the store to do something and let the attacker know she was outnumbered and in the wrong--but no one spoke up. | | ---|---|--- Police say Alexandra Szustakiewicz, 64, "initiated a physical confrontation" with the couple, who were wearing shirts with the word "Palestine" on them. (DuPage County State's Attorney's Office) Dangerous examples like this exemplify why the phrase "being silent is being complicit " exists. And especially as Trump's new Muslim ban is expected to go live some time in late January 2025, we know it is going to get worse. If 2017 is any indicator, we can likely expect to see a spike in anti-Muslim hate crimes, and we need to be ready and united. And finally, we cannot ignore the white privilege in this scenario. First, imagine if the roles were reversed and a person of color attacked a white woman? Media and right wing politicians would run wild to spread fear and disinformation nationally. (see e.g. the months long demonization of all Haitians due to one fabricated claim about pets, ). But while local media reports that even though police identified the racist woman who attacked the Muslim couple, and even though police have the video evidence of her physically attacking them--she was allowed to leave. Fortunately--police have finally filed hate crime charges against 64-year-old Alexandra Szustakiewicz. , "Alexandra Szustakiewicz, 64, was charged with two counts of hate crime and one count of disorderly conduct in connection with Saturday's incident." Additionally, DuPage County State's Attorney Robert Berlin said in a statement: Every member of society, regardless of race, religion, sexual orientation or any other individual characteristic, deserves to be treated with respect and civility. This type of behavior and the accompanying prejudice have no place in a civilized society and my office stands ready to file the appropriate charges in such cases. Szustakiewicz is set to appear in court Dec. 16. Moving Forward United I hopeful that the expectant mother who suffered this hate crime receives the support she needs, and likewise that the racist woman Alexandra Szustakiewicz who committed the hate crime faces the accountability she deserves. As we move forward into this next administration, we have an opportunity to recognize these injustices for what they are, and stand united against them. This is an opportunity for us to improve ourselves by recognizing the importance of being anti-racist, to meaningfully invest in those individuals and organizations working the front lines to counter this violent rhetoric, and to collectively demand justice in all matters. That is how we will not only survive these next four years, but meaningfully move towards a more perfect Union. As for me, I will be doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I cannot do it alone. I invite you to support my work and advocacy by subscribing below. Thank you for your trust and partnership. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.** | | ---|---|--- You 're currently a free subscriber to Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid. subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
| |

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=76bf8b65c3e740529bec715b211922c8&_e=x32hDa40nAzgKCBuxAR7hWhMC9J9_gtjDDDMjRr-dqnvHIUVrJ34_F5AJtYQrQbX2JS-LsTe0pW-z1LRLUn4HIuOxjAeFDHxjGVYqATY8h7qtIFeguAxaziuQekT6bhXcD9qKXVHWz5OmhqetFeEsC-LzWKlO_B0jKWGUlgcR36FDq9yvMFOfI_Klu3knvckyRza68HYt329YX-4xHrJMxe7S4PStLEj2k02YBbRjWkF2sI0f0ZmgpFRaTsy5D6AgBKNFXuaHPMauSQVjKZRtaGwV13MyT_gCsQ0WWtzRReFoUFClPfEMHDB2FYwmCHHr_BzJYEx7oFPq70VXrmxKmxr_S-TCPNOUYs4OcgdxexOlkhi4yH5ZDpVUEv6JsXmaRQJH8lLtu9WPQrUYOL7fA%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Peter,

I’m glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=76bf8b65c3e740529bec715b211922c8&_e=x32hDa40nAzgKCBuxAR7hWhMC9J9_gtjDDDMjRr-dqnvHIUVrJ34_F5AJtYQrQbX2JS-LsTe0pW-z1LRLUn4HIuOxjAeFDHxjGVYqATY8h7qtIFeguAxaziuQekT6bhXcD9qKXVHWz5OmhqetFeEsC-LzWKlO_B0jKWGUlgcR36FDq9yvMFOfI_Klu3knvckyRza68HYt329YX-4xHrJMxe7S4PStLEj2k02YBbRjWnfdpg9JvwU_DsREvBpW_rutwIn1OjgKVnvW3OwLXzfXKp1s7VIRPstGJJ5kgZXRY179lCTIi2_Z6FMdsdt8AeozyIMyo_MnozUgbW51xlcN1b7WRgQxUA6JcWA3cvuf4lQMJegmkenqqx0WiTP2EBvIqqqR08vLG71gLThbnMdlw%3D%3D)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans’ concerns about CRT’s influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you’ll help us gather important insights to defend America’s founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=76bf8b65c3e740529bec715b211922c8&_e=x32hDa40nAzgKCBuxAR7hWhMC9J9_gtjDDDMjRr-dqnvHIUVrJ34_F5AJtYQrQbX2JS-LsTe0pW-z1LRLUn4HIuOxjAeFDHxjGVYqATY8h7qtIFeguAxaziuQekT6bhXcD9qKXVHWz5OmhqetFeEsC-LzWKlO_B0jKWGUlgcR36FDq9yvMFOfI_Klu3knvckyRza68HYt329YX-4xHrJMxe7S4PStLEj2k02YBbRjWlyBNFYwWjbyjX3ymHqCqiz2oTuNwBpN9RhLwCJK1xh2ySR9G7ETVUGjvyV6edK2QQl9THAD7q6xqFPSDFgtNRag-tdMITvIEkg14p7PmE8_wUIVA-Rz9Vs-oLjRlrtCf124VDVLoJ_mPJC3E1zcM1HkouZAVNW8O0zr6rDzecopg%3D%3D)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you’ll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=76bf8b65c3e740529bec715b211922c8&_t=0kllk8-hEIimHZisZ-f3g-l1-d8DTd2oyqF0uoiziP_g-4UDLW2Tw6mb5rQK6DCAWYP6w9OVzT5syfdFgTkTAHiZVqdGBfuROcbakl6wXViXicB1fWimC_XcXzm_d9tL)

---
# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly. I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths. They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. | | | | Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

body:
Our priorities right now are clear, and they are urgent.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97292774/512936764/2145040083?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=241118_team_2026&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmFiOWVmYS1mOWE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6iSoM94-LkygI1svQ3zx3F5-L7b8TAj42BNo1TQHlaI=)

Peter, here is the truth. **The fight we enter now is greater than the one before.** Trump won the popular vote, swept the swing states, and will take office with a GOP trifecta and a Supreme Court that he stacked with extremist judges. Our priorities right now are clear, and they are urgent. _**First, we must limit the damage that Trump and his radical allies can do.** That will take persistence, creativity, and a lot of hard work — but that's exactly what Yassamin will do every day in the House._ **_Second, we must win back the House in 2026. _** That fight starts right now, and it will once again hinge on Arizona. So we're not wasting any time, Peter. We're already investing in the long-term organizing work that will help us win for communities like ours. [_**If you'd like to help power that work, you can do so right here:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97292775/512936765/2145040083?refcode=241118_team_2026&ms=241118_team_2026&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmFiOWVmYS1mOWE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6iSoM94-LkygI1svQ3zx3F5-L7b8TAj42BNo1TQHlaI=) **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97292776/512936766/2145040083?refcode=241118_team_2026&ms=241118_team_2026&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmFiOWVmYS1mOWE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6iSoM94-LkygI1svQ3zx3F5-L7b8TAj42BNo1TQHlaI=)** Peter, giving up is not an option. We will fight back, and we will win. Thanks for being in this fight with us. — Team Yassamin
| **Yassamin Ansari is the Democratic nominee for AZ-03,** and former Vice Mayor of Phoenix. She has championed housing and healthcare affordability, reproductive freedom, education, and workers' rights. Yassamin is a trailblazer who has dedicated her life to serving her community. She's now running to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress and needs your help.

name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: Join us Tonight for our Statewide Call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Do you want to make a difference?

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_nov_statewide_call_remind&n=1)
---
Monday, November 18, 2024 |
### It's time to get involved, Locally
Join us Tonight, Monday November 18th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. You can RSVP with the button below. If the recent election left you with a renewed desire for some new options, call in to learn how we are making that happen! [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u2Dt1n837RKwUJg_KtN7MY7q18JSzxr4IIh1PTMDpFPRQGa3i-p7rAuoG8kynt2Tiw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_nov_statewide_call_remind&n=2) We want to thank everyone that supported us and our candidates in 2024. Tens of thousands of Pennsylvanians voted for a Forward Party Candidate. Our organization welcomed new volunteers from Philadelphia to Erie and everywhere in between in supporting two statewide campaigns. While we didn't make our goal of achieving minor party status, we learned a lot that will help us in future election cycles. For 2025, the challenge is different, it's local, local, local. The offices up for election this year are all local and it's important we find some great candidates to run. We can support these candidates from across the state, but the local organizing around these races will be critical. You may not be able to change what happens with the Presidency, but you can have a huge impact on a local, Mayor, Township Supervisor, School Board, or Judge of Elections race.
* * *
### Support our 2025 Efforts
There are a lot of ways to help us meet our goals in 2025, one of those ways is financially. We don't like asking for money in every email, so we don't do it. We don't send endless texts asking you to chip in $2. We're not trying to spend millions of dollars on campaigns that have no chance of winning. We're running a very efficient small organization that can support candidates in races where we can have an impact. We'd like to grow our base of support in 2025 and we ask you to consider making a recurring financial contribution to let us do more. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgEQ8LiKSs_WIlu6d10HpikhG&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_nov_statewide_call_remind&n=3 "Make a Donation") [Make a Donation](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgEQ8LiKSs_WIlu6d10HpikhG&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_nov_statewide_call_remind&n=3)
---
* * *
We have an active community on Slack, come join the conversation.[
](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=OO1xB82Dwc0SwW5xslNAt5demYUjnvMsNObg_2SsnH4C04dQQgB9BZ02TA7y9H7t-4vbxkv79HHUmZ6qj3hodUR-7alEp57O08vr8cfcTeFUloFbffPqlZP8qsSt5ozRpo-ljG0b_nmp5HGri8eilg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_nov_statewide_call_remind&n=4)
* * *
We also need some fresh voices in our state leadership. If you'd like to help our organization succeed, there are plenty of ways to get involved with whatever time you're willing to give. Just reply to this email to start the conversation.
We look Forward to seeing you Tonight at 8pm!
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_nov_statewide_call_remind&n=5) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_nov_statewide_call_remind&n=6) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_nov_statewide_call_remind&n=7) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_nov_statewide_call_remind&n=8) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_nov_statewide_call_remind&n=9) Copyright © 2024 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is:
1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

body:
|

Friend, thanks to your support, Team DASS had some incredible wins this election: ✅ **Sarah Copeland Hanzas WON in Vermont,** ✅ **Elaine Marshall WON in North Carolina,** ✅ **Steve Hobbs WON in Washington,** ✅ **And Tobias Read WON in Oregon,** We know that the presidential election results aren’t what we hoped for – and it’s terrifying to think about Donald Trump back in the White House. **But we can’t let this setback stop us from pushing forward.** Our democracy depends on leaders who will defend voting rights, protect fair elections, and ensure accountability. With Trump in the White House, we’ll need champions at every level more than ever. Together, we’ll continue to support leaders who are committed to fighting for our democracy. Thank you again for your dedication – we’re counting on you to stay with us in the battles ahead. clean_body: | = Friend, thanks to your support, Team DASS had some incredible wins this election: ✅ Sarah Copeland Hanzas WON in Vermont, ✅ Elaine Marshall WON in North Carolina, ✅ Steve Hobbs WON in Washington, ✅ And Tobias Read WON in Oregon, We know that the presidential election results aren’t what we hoped for – and it’s terrifying to think about Donald Trump back in the White House. But we can’t let this setback stop us from pushing forward. Our democracy depends on leaders who will defend voting rights, protect fair elections, and ensure accountability. With Trump in the White House, we’ll need champions at every level more than ever. Together, we’ll continue to support leaders who are committed to fighting for our democracy. Thank you again for your dedication – we’re counting on you to stay with us in the battles ahead. Your state legislators are responsible for making decisions that will most impact your day-to-day life.
Your state legislature decides everything from when and how you vote to the curriculum taught in school classrooms – that’s why it’s vital that we elect strong Democratic leaders who will fight for progress in places like your community and nationwide.
**Even just $1 will help put our party on the path to victory in 2025 and beyond.**
[Will you donate $1 to help elect Democrats, protect our democracy, and defend our fundamental freedoms in state legislatures across the country? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqskafkX0PKr0_LE7jSFyDsCvcUZujFF0XT246RddJwUGleliqi-uEkQgarVLoQAvfSifJREHoE_M6MfkmKK8xudmkhQhOZLcF7s_nrfMM_OsgLbr9VVVvw6lwb8FJiF7NqMIhOOGrXieYTce9Opj8b_g8UNDoNuItEjeZWoixqa5cJ6UiLdughw5tGu03ER830kIvofDL8CuYk94sLmgU5qfowNHzXzSshfanhubCs9ur8Qv1KIBvNV4OWupdgEj0itXQGSGSK0FmPXqJCFpeoteNbqsIHy7MR9vOkQ942C9rAwUF6THI_g0dY0p-z3ngdZAlvkkf9wUr9X-h7z_gufqz5AEPBuwey27d-rmQZDvKVYiWI21GM6sZPXkAUWiOA/4bk/ooJUxNxaSvK6FISF4a00IQ/h7/h001.aRIlvOUXl1Ot-4Qk6sBSOAWId8k1szcSe7sWkR4-CcI)

name: Giffords.org
subject: [ADD YOUR NAME] Show you support safe storage laws
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
In honor of National Injury Prevention Day, will you sign our petition to show your support for commonsense gun safety measures like safe storage laws to help protect our children?
#

Friends -
Gun violence is the LEADING cause of death for children in our nation. It’s not car crashes. It’s not cancer. It’s guns.
Far too often, children are killed in unintentional shootings where a firearm is left unlocked and loaded. It’s a horrible truth, and we must call on our leaders to take action to fix this epidemic of children unintentionally hurting themselves and others with guns.
Today is National Injury Prevention Day. Here at GIFFORDS, we are working day in and out to help pass safe storage laws in every community across our nation. When safe storage laws are enacted and properly implemented, they have the power to save a child’s life.
**We need you to join us in our commitment to protecting children from preventable gun violence:**
[**In honor of National Injury Prevention Day, will you sign our petition to show your support for commonsense gun safety measures like safe storage laws to help protect our children?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_safestorage_nov24/?source=em241118-1-30&refcode2=9460.3935704.5SSKcv&akid=9460%2E3935704%2E5SSKcv)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_safestorage_nov24/?source=em241118-1-30&refcode2=9460.3935704.5SSKcv&akid=9460%2E3935704%2E5SSKcv)**
We appreciate you taking the time to use your voice. We must work together to keep children safe from preventable gun violence.
\- The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=9460%2E3935704%2E5SSKcv) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97293047/512937762/823540626?refcode=ea.c5fff51d-fda5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.c5fff51d-fda5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWZmZjUxZC1mZGE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MoYXBFS5ZL6zUVqPJ5mEfOW3Bbd7eO7vMkT34bPZIJU=&emci=f452db73-e4a5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=c5fff51d-fda5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=1049176)
Peter, Josh Stein is going to be the next Governor of North Carolina. **This is a victory for our state, for our future, for our rights, and for the Democratic Party.** At a moment when the federal government seems poised to take a hard turn in opposition to the progress we have made on issues ranging from the climate to the economy and further an outright assault on reproductive health care, **governors are again our last line of defense.** Experts called this gubernatorial race the most important of 2024 for good reason: Josh’s opponent was unmatched in his extremism and the danger he posed to North Carolina. Now, instead of facing the threat a far-right governorship posed to women, LGBTQ+ North Carolinians, and the rule of law, we have a leader who will stand up for the rights we hold dear. I am proud and grateful that our team contributed to Governor-elect Stein’s success. Your support helped Democrats win this race. **[Now, we have one thing left to do, Peter. I’d like you to join me in congratulating our next Governor. Sign our e-card below, and consider leaving a message of support that we can pass along to Josh’s team.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97293048/512937763/731943748?refcode=ea.c5fff51d-fda5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.c5fff51d-fda5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWZmZjUxZC1mZGE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MoYXBFS5ZL6zUVqPJ5mEfOW3Bbd7eO7vMkT34bPZIJU=&emci=f452db73-e4a5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=c5fff51d-fda5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=1049176)** name: Californians for Choice Organizing Team
subject: You’re invited: Join Eleni for a call about what's next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Californians for Choice (www
body:
#
Peter,
We know many of you are wondering what comes next. That’s why we’re hosting a call with Eleni tomorrow, and we want you to join us!
She wants to thank you personally for your work and talk about where we go from here. [**You can get the details and RSVP here:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97293098/512937956/-2054836344?ms=email_20241118&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjgwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzU3YzA5Yy1mZGE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g04CsH-DsNBFU3X3WuU0WzjfoX6EVrSFSqifb9RvucM=&emci=35036be2-eea5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=e357c09c-fda5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=18887817)
**What's Next for Reproductive Rights
with Lt. Governor Eleni Kounalakis**
Tuesday, Nov. 19 at 6:00 PM PT
Zoom link provided upon RSVP
**[RSVP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97293099/512937957/-2054836344?ms=email_20241118&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjgwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzU3YzA5Yy1mZGE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g04CsH-DsNBFU3X3WuU0WzjfoX6EVrSFSqifb9RvucM=&emci=35036be2-eea5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=e357c09c-fda5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=18887817)**
This virtual briefing is exclusively for our top volunteers and supporters.
We’ll talk about the status of our historic grassroots effort in 5 swing CA congressional districts and discuss what's next in the fight to protect reproductive rights.
Your involvement is going to be critical to our efforts moving forward. Together, we organized and turned out pro-choice voters to win key California races this year. This work is just getting started, and we need you to continue to work alongside Lt. Governor Kounalakis to safeguard abortion rights.
[**Please sign up to attend today, and we’ll send you the information to join. We know Eleni would love to see you and thank you personally for all you did to protect reproductive rights.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97293100/512937958/-2054836344?ms=email_20241118&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjgwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzU3YzA5Yy1mZGE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g04CsH-DsNBFU3X3WuU0WzjfoX6EVrSFSqifb9RvucM=&emci=35036be2-eea5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=e357c09c-fda5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=18887817)
Thank you,
Team Californians for Choice

body:
We’re grateful for all your support and want to make sure you saw the recent headlines about our victory and Sarah’s plan as she heads to Washington.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97293180/512938096/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-11-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmYxNDNlYS1mZGE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ccsLNGBpow-wds3pnJ0x5Zgg0_4v7HFZ5Q3AoSpcv8=)
---
| Our victory earlier this month means we’re sending Sarah to represent Maryland’s Third Congressional District in Congress. We’re grateful for all your support and want to make sure you saw the recent headlines about our victory and Sarah’s plan as she heads to Washington.

_Take a look:_
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97293181/512938097/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-11-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmYxNDNlYS1mZGE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ccsLNGBpow-wds3pnJ0x5Zgg0_4v7HFZ5Q3AoSpcv8=) _**Democrat Sarah Elfreth wins election to U.S. House in Maryland's 3rd Congressional District**_

“Democrat Sarah Elfreth won election to a U.S. House seat representing Maryland on Tuesday, November 5th.” [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97293183/512938099/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-11-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmYxNDNlYS1mZGE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ccsLNGBpow-wds3pnJ0x5Zgg0_4v7HFZ5Q3AoSpcv8=) _**Sarah Elfreth vows to keep fighting to protect Marylanders’ interests ‘regardless of who controls Congress’**_

“Congresswoman-elect Sarah Elfreth plans to work hard for her constituents, but knows getting things done won't be easy as a Democrat.” [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97293185/512938101/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-11-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmYxNDNlYS1mZGE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ccsLNGBpow-wds3pnJ0x5Zgg0_4v7HFZ5Q3AoSpcv8=) **_Sarah Elfreth heads to Washington with a to-do list and everything she wanted._**

“After all this — a year of campaigning and fundraising, of juggling her roles as a state senator and new dog owner — Elfreth will take the oath of office Jan. 3 as a member of the 119th Congress.” [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97293187/512938103/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-11-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmYxNDNlYS1mZGE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ccsLNGBpow-wds3pnJ0x5Zgg0_4v7HFZ5Q3AoSpcv8=) _**‘A pretty cool moment': Behind the scenes with Maryland's U.S. House rookies**_

“Representatives-elect Johnny Olszewski Jr., Sarah Elfreth and April McClain Delaney, all Democrats, began 10 days of orientation in Washington”
---
Now, we’re on our way to Congress, and Sarah is preparing to continue to serve our community in Washington. She’s ready to work on day one and deliver for Maryland’s Third Congressional District.

[_**Will you contribute $10 or more today to celebrate our victory and help us get off to a strong start in Congress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97293189/512938105/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-11-18_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmYxNDNlYS1mZGE1LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ccsLNGBpow-wds3pnJ0x5Zgg0_4v7HFZ5Q3AoSpcv8=)

clean_body: We’re grateful for all your support and want to make sure you saw the recent headlines about our victory and Sarah’s plan as she heads to Washington. | = | Our victory earlier this month means we’re sending Sarah to represent Maryland’s Third Congressional District in Congress. We’re grateful for all your support and want to make sure you saw the recent headlines about our victory and Sarah’s plan as she heads to Washington. Take a look: | | = Democrat Sarah Elfreth wins election to U.S. House in Maryland's 3rd Congressional District “Democrat Sarah Elfreth won election to a U.S. House seat representing Maryland on Tuesday, November 5th.” = Sarah Elfreth vows to keep fighting to protect Marylanders’ interests ‘regardless of who controls Congress’ “Congresswoman-elect Sarah Elfreth plans to work hard for her constituents, but knows getting things done won't be easy as a Democrat.” = Sarah Elfreth heads to Washington with a to-do list and everything she wanted. “After all this — a year of campaigning and fundraising, of juggling her roles as a state senator and new dog owner — Elfreth will take the oath of office Jan. 3 as a member of the 119th Congress.” = ‘A pretty cool moment': Behind the scenes with Maryland's U.S. House rookies “Representatives-elect Johnny Olszewski Jr., Sarah Elfreth and April McClain Delaney, all Democrats, began 10 days of orientation in Washington” Now, we’re on our way to Congress, and Sarah is preparing to continue to serve our community in Washington. She’s ready to work on day one and deliver for Maryland’s Third Congressional District. = | = | = | = | = | = –Team Elfreth HQ * | | = Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland Elfreth for Maryland PO Box 5935 Annapolis, MD 21403 United States

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Before they're gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yluWuXEYBJuvdxWOQSH7QQ~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yluWuXEYBJuvdxWOQSH7QQ~~/AARclAA~~~) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yluWuXEYBJuvdxWOQSH7QQ~~/AARclAA~~~)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yluWuXEYBJuvdxWOQSH7QQ~~/AARclAA~~~)**
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

subject: Will I see you on Sunday?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39310%2E3422442%2Et11voo)
Derek, extremists and special interests want us to look away from government, so they can escape accountability. We won’t give that to them.
Every day brings new announcements of sycophants joining the Trump administration—from Elon Musk to Matt Gaetz. If you’re asking yourself, “What does this mean for me?” or you’re overwhelmed by all the news, **you are not alone.**
To help folks understand the moment we’re in, I’m hosting a grassroots discussion about how the new Trump administration is shaping up:

Sunday, November 24, 5pm PT
_Zoom link provided upon RSVP_

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: This is real life.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Some people may want to take a kind of vengeful stance about how people were misled about Donald Trump’s plans for mass deportations, but it is genuinely heartbreaking.
There are millions of people in this country — and I was one of them — working two to three shifts a day to try to make ends meet. You’re not reading the newspaper every morning with a cup of coffee.
It’s not to say that people are uneducated or not informed. **This is real life**. You’ve got a baby on your hip, you’ve got three shifts that day. You have such an overwhelm of information.
Something that I think is different about this moment than after 2020 or 2016, is that the day after, people immediately came to me and said, “He’s not _actually_ going to do that, right?”
Something I learned: I asked folks who voted for Donald Trump and me where they got their news from, where they take in information.
And one of the things that they said is that one of their primary trusted sources of information was “you” — as in me. That means they rely on me as their elected official for information directly. **That also means that they are listening to _him_ directly for information.**
And so I think people that believe what he says, when he says “We’re only going after criminals,” they think that he’s going after somebody else. Meanwhile the Republican Party, the Trump campaign, people like Stephen Miller — _they believe that being undocumented means you are a criminal_.
I’m not here to sugarcoat what we all are about to collectively experience.
What we _can_ do to prepare is build community, which is **one of the most powerful and radical things you can do in an environment like this.**
Regimes and autocracies are taken down by millions of drops of small actions that would otherwise be invisible by masses of people.
[ Will you make a $5 contribution right now to help us continue the fight for real progressive change as we enter this new chapter?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241118.v4Por_&refcode=em20241118-7604-P_FND_CTR_IMM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7604%2E2526796%2ES7_Z3A)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241118.v4Por_&refcode=em20241118-7604-P_FND_CTR_IMM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7604%2E2526796%2ES7_Z3A)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241118?refcode=em20241118-7604-P_FND_CTR_IMM&t=21&refcode2=7604_2526796_S7_Z3A&akid=7604%2E2526796%2ES7_Z3A)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241118-7604-P_FND_CTR_IMM&t=22&akid=7604%2E2526796%2ES7_Z3A)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
clean_body: Some people may want to take a kind of vengeful stance about how people were misled about Donald Trump’s plans for mass deportations, but it is genuinely heartbreaking. There are millions of people in this country — and I was one of them — working two to three shifts a day to try to make ends meet. You’re not reading the newspaper every morning with a cup of coffee. It’s not to say that people are uneducated or not informed. This is real life. You’ve got a baby on your hip, you’ve got three shifts that day. You have such an overwhelm of information. Something that I think is different about this moment than after 2020 or 2016, is that the day after, people immediately came to me and said, “He’s not actually going to do that, right?” Something I learned: I asked folks who voted for Donald Trump and me where they got their news from, where they take in information. And one of the things that they said is that one of their primary trusted sources of information was “you” — as in me. That means they rely on me as their elected official for information directly. That also means that they are listening to him directly for information. And so I think people that believe what he says, when he says “We’re only going after criminals,” they think that he’s going after somebody else. Meanwhile the Republican Party, the Trump campaign, people like Stephen Miller — they believe that being undocumented means you are a criminal. I’m not here to sugarcoat what we all are about to collectively experience. What we can do to prepare is build community, which is one of the most powerful and radical things you can do in an environment like this. Regimes and autocracies are taken down by millions of drops of small actions that would otherwise be invisible by masses of people. In solidarity, Alexandria | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Alan Cohn
subject: Our Last Line of Defense
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97293457/512939266/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWEyNWNiZDItMDBhNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rXvffK1KOJHxV-LuVTivrJu7lHhy7moqCZ4NyYQGXIg=&emci=5f2e8e3e-f8a5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=9a25cbd2-00a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
Are you tired of the non-stop calls, emails, and text messages from candidates and campaigns?
So are we!
But that’s not going to change until we change how we fund our politics, and if you want to know who’s responsible, it’s the Supreme Court.
In 2010, SCOTUS ruled in the case “Citizens United” corporations are people and money is free speech.
Big corporations are free to dole out millions, primarily to Republicans. Democrats need to harass individual contributors like you.
The only way to change that is to retire the radical MAGA majority on the Supreme Court.
This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court, the national campaign working with 75 members of Congress, including Hakeem Jeffries and Adam Schiff, to end lifetime appointments to SCOTUS and enact 18-year term limits.
We’re already back to work. We’re raising resources to back candidates in the midterms pledging to support the TERM ACT, and we’re about to mount a major public pressure campaign to force Congress to act.
But we need majorities in the House and Senate. And we need you to join our movement!
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/term-limits-yes-inc-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97293458/512939267/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWEyNWNiZDItMDBhNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rXvffK1KOJHxV-LuVTivrJu7lHhy7moqCZ4NyYQGXIg=)
Polls show over 70% of Americans support our cause.
[**> >>The MAGA majority has already robbed women of the right to make their own healthcare decisions. Help us retire Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito. Help us restore SCOTUS to its mission of “Equal Justice under Law.”**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97293459/512939268/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWEyNWNiZDItMDBhNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rXvffK1KOJHxV-LuVTivrJu7lHhy7moqCZ4NyYQGXIg=)
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

**[Please pitch in what you can today to support the national campaign to create term limits for the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97293460/512939269/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWEyNWNiZDItMDBhNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rXvffK1KOJHxV-LuVTivrJu7lHhy7moqCZ4NyYQGXIg=)**
[CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97293461/512939271/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWEyNWNiZDItMDBhNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rXvffK1KOJHxV-LuVTivrJu7lHhy7moqCZ4NyYQGXIg=)

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues for Records on $27M Grants to ‘Miscellaneous Foreign Awardees’ for Use in Gaza
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the United States Agency for International Development (USAID) for records about the $27 million in U.S. grants awarded to “Miscellaneous Foreign Awardees” that have been designated for use in Gaza.

It is called the Racial Equity Consciousness Institute (RECI) and its founders at the University of Pittsburgh claim it is essential because “systemic racism is an endemic public health crisis in the United States that has a profoundly negative impact on the mental and physical health of millions of people—focally, people of color.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71145&L=33909&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmFjaWFsLWVxdWl0eS1jb25zY2lvdXNuZXNzLWluc3RpdHV0ZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=3ca3fcc50ceb254269bf0ed2b1d842700b459fb52753407de651afccfa533be9)

The much-needed office will be headed by billionaire Elon Musk, the head of electric car company Tesla, rocket company SpaceX and social media platform X and Vivek Ramaswamy, a pharmaceutical entrepreneur and Yale Law School graduate. Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the United States Agency for International Development (USAID) for records about the $27 million in U.S. grants awarded to “Miscellaneous Foreign Awardees” that have been designated for use in Gaza (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Agency for International Development (No. 1:24-cv-02159)). ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Defense for information regarding the rebranding of West Point’s Diversity, Equity and Inclusion (DEI) office to “Office of Engagement and Retention”. ---|--- | | | | | A public university in Pennsylvania is getting $5 million from American taxpayers to research the effectiveness of a special center it launched in 2021 to address systemic racism. It is called the Racial Equity Consciousness Institute (RECI) and its founders at the University of Pittsburgh claim it is essential because “systemic racism is an endemic public health crisis in the United States that has a profoundly negative impact on the mental and physical health of millions of people—focally, people of color.” ---|--- | | | | | President-elect Donald Trump’s creation of a new Department of Government Efficiency to, among other things, cut wasteful expenditures is a welcome addition for American taxpayers who have seen record amounts of public funds go to all sorts of outrageous projects during the Biden administration. The much-needed office will be headed by billionaire Elon Musk, the head of electric car company Tesla, rocket company SpaceX and social media platform X and Vivek Ramaswamy, a pharmaceutical entrepreneur and Yale Law School graduate. ---|--- | | | Washington Examiner The story of how Harris pocketed record sums while failing to gain support from voters will be studied by campaigns for decades to come.
