name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I shared this chart with fellow Democrats in Congress:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We need to get back to our roots as a party for the working class.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241118-4524-footer&t=1&akid=4524%2E420207%2EQbGwt_)
Democrats are losing the working class, Peter.
I’m not trying to be an alarmist, but that’s what the data shows after this year’s election. Take a look at this chart that I shared with some fellow Democrats in Congress:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241118?refcode=em20241118-4524&amount=3&refcode2=4524_420207_QbGwt_&akid=4524%2E420207%2EQbGwt_)
**We need to get back to our roots as a party for the working class, and I need your help to make that happen.** [**If you can, please pitch in $3 to my campaign today, and read on for more details on the work ahead.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241118?refcode=em20241118-4524&amount=3&refcode2=4524_420207_QbGwt_&akid=4524%2E420207%2EQbGwt_)
This year we lost many voters who are typically considered part of our base, and this wasn’t the first time in recent years that’s happened. Aside from losing all of the swing states, every state besides my home state of Washington shifted redder this year.
There’s no way around it: This happened because Democrats were seen as defenders of a broken status quo. Poor and working people – our base who have long been taken for granted – are angry (rightfully so) with a system that is rigged against them. Meanwhile, Donald Trump promised to blow up the system.
Part of it was the fact that too many Democrats embraced wealthy donors instead of committing to get big money out of politics. Many working class voters were left with the impression that we wouldn’t stand up to corporate interests.
**So despite this year’s setbacks, there is a clear path forward: We need to rebuild our brand and people’s belief that we are on the side of poor and working people.**
Over the next four years, we need to be both an opposition party to Trump’s chaos and cruelty, but also a proposition party that has a clear, bold economic agenda. We need to lead on health care, getting big money out of politics, and more.
Just look at the ballot initiatives that passed with big majorities in states where Trump won. We saw multiple Trump states vote to raise the minimum wage, protect abortion rights, implement paid sick leave, and more.
An agenda focused on supporting poor and working people is clearly popular. We just need to rebuild voters’ trust and belief that Democrats will actually deliver on that agenda when we get the chance.
I’m doing everything I can to make that happen, Peter, but I need your help. I don’t take corporate PAC money, which means supporters like you are crucial to powering this movement.
[**Will you pitch in $3 or any amount you can today to help us rebuild the Democratic Party as a party that’s truly for poor and working class people?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241118?refcode=em20241118-4524&amount=3&refcode2=4524_420207_QbGwt_&akid=4524%2E420207%2EQbGwt_)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241118?amount=3&refcode=em20241118-4524&refcode2=4524_420207_QbGwt_&akid=4524%2E420207%2EQbGwt_)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241118-4524-footer&t=2&refcode2=4524_420207_QbGwt_&akid=4524%2E420207%2EQbGwt_)**

This year we lost many voters who are typically considered part of our base, and this wasn’t the first time in recent years that’s happened. Aside from losing all of the swing states, every state besides my home state of Washington shifted redder this year. There’s no way around it: This happened because Democrats were seen as defenders of a broken status quo. Poor and working people – our base who have long been taken for granted – are angry (rightfully so) with a system that is rigged against them. Meanwhile, Donald Trump promised to blow up the system. Part of it was the fact that too many Democrats embraced wealthy donors instead of committing to get big money out of politics. Many working class voters were left with the impression that we wouldn’t stand up to corporate interests. So despite this year’s setbacks, there is a clear path forward: We need to rebuild our brand and people’s belief that we are on the side of poor and working people. Over the next four years, we need to be both an opposition party to Trump’s chaos and cruelty, but also a proposition party that has a clear, bold economic agenda. We need to lead on health care, getting big money out of politics, and more. Just look at the ballot initiatives that passed with big majorities in states where Trump won. We saw multiple Trump states vote to raise the minimum wage, protect abortion rights, implement paid sick leave, and more. An agenda focused on supporting poor and working people is clearly popular. We just need to rebuild voters’ trust and belief that Democrats will actually deliver on that agenda when we get the chance. I’m doing everything I can to make that happen, Peter, but I need your help. I don’t take corporate PAC money, which means supporters like you are crucial to powering this movement. In solidarity, Pramila Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Patti Reilly
subject: My police officer son is going to prison
body:
My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.
Dear Peter,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=04b3e83e7b20466494e8abe02acdc9df&_e=byQ1X72FGTY-Hsm4nCg9ODfj9jjOSLnJv0r8CrILmC4NQA2RcAuKQYSnNYuEDrhN6b5Qztiqkn0S8y55JjPtjFGWEYgT9Q0GPEILVEmOU0Xtrv-hd1z2D1Qqp7IFKliIKPfaz5yy_f5xGJa7V_FxSxQ-df_MCoPbVYYNtfQXt2aBCVWj84bX-5zUOREK-_VpMQFBv3pgLBHMqK27KGfc88pLZdCm0IZ0Vjocs9Nby3iNfTLRfhIHgvZ7uQ_5aj45v8AD9dPJSHij4n1nasOPr7OU-9gArCX8LYox2u4XdOCW7K-UWJQ6rb1WtzEfYuEczxLHH14lpBqpA09c1bp9lmyLlj2Fhg4-h75hVdWYTck9l5192vpHZf8sl3c_vmfCjwdGVH-SuQGrst3uJyzVvg%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=04b3e83e7b20466494e8abe02acdc9df&_e=byQ1X72FGTY-Hsm4nCg9ODfj9jjOSLnJv0r8CrILmC4NQA2RcAuKQYSnNYuEDrhN6b5Qztiqkn0S8y55JjPtjFGWEYgT9Q0GPEILVEmOU0Xtrv-hd1z2D1Qqp7IFKliIKPfaz5yy_f5xGJa7V_FxSxQ-df_MCoPbVYYNtfQXt2aBCVWj84bX-5zUOREK-_VpMQFBv3pgLBHMqK27KGfc88pLZdCm0IZ0Vjocs9Nby3gmOucayUDide1rS-MzWnyq9Qd4pBZiaegfHq5XVNqBBfKd40ebowzYozJ-6OH6mhp3odMJ9eE4ypdwyvWHp31LYiSHJLwWg8jl_g2QN5-yHOWTClEz7tM0f5g2O79l0h7JmiALpVPjRVeztiuG3dcPEEaypOEKm2-PVO78Dtia7Q%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=04b3e83e7b20466494e8abe02acdc9df&_e=byQ1X72FGTY-Hsm4nCg9ODfj9jjOSLnJv0r8CrILmC4NQA2RcAuKQYSnNYuEDrhN6b5Qztiqkn0S8y55JjPtjFGWEYgT9Q0GPEILVEmOU0Xtrv-hd1z2D1Qqp7IFKliIKPfaz5yy_f5xGJa7V_FxSxQ-df_MCoPbVYYNtfQXt2aBCVWj84bX-5zUOREK-_VpMQFBv3pgLBHMqK27KGfc88pLZdCm0IZ0Vjocs9Nby3j6rqZS1WdaxRqH5hdQyJixiugwIcj32sYwJCWeiQNgqyYXwfXM494fxg2G0qO3Rx3A_9aZUsSSpF-HCYmT6RmQdTM_4Z1FPpuA1s7Y2wDWk1CFxuI_ZjPRmzO7wiKtT45aOonDdd7VAr_kDfLEjRaRBc1GkR7S8fBwkOBMTGEbAg%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=04b3e83e7b20466494e8abe02acdc9df&_e=byQ1X72FGTY-Hsm4nCg9ODfj9jjOSLnJv0r8CrILmC4NQA2RcAuKQYSnNYuEDrhN6b5Qztiqkn0S8y55JjPtjFGWEYgT9Q0GPEILVEmOU0Xtrv-hd1z2D1Qqp7IFKliIKPfaz5yy_f5xGJa7V_FxSxQ-df_MCoPbVYYNtfQXt2aBCVWj84bX-5zUOREK-_VpMQFBv3pgLBHMqK27KGfc88pLZdCm0IZ0Vjocs9Nby3jpFOkRGzABBeRB27pMYaRIxHwzqNy_7LvSxjRKR3iSUuD1cbiC350Ax0hOBWPV3-rflEmIBRFT2MEYrfQHCm7sfPV3PPwOkn1cyQkpB-Lc3gDaZlfHVXuNTrzb_jXYYjzzW2h3POPQWCBKzUS0kOoc2Zv63g4futGfPDlGPoIDOA%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=04b3e83e7b20466494e8abe02acdc9df&_e=byQ1X72FGTY-Hsm4nCg9ODfj9jjOSLnJv0r8CrILmC4NQA2RcAuKQYSnNYuEDrhN6b5Qztiqkn0S8y55JjPtjFGWEYgT9Q0GPEILVEmOU0Xtrv-hd1z2D1Qqp7IFKliIKPfaz5yy_f5xGJa7V_FxSxQ-df_MCoPbVYYNtfQXt2aBCVWj84bX-5zUOREK-_VpMQFBv3pgLBHMqK27KGfc88pLZdCm0IZ0Vjocs9Nby3iPxrP3CyUIYdt5-1uhEcr9R3_mVWIk8HmfacXlW8dZNhXC-tXA0NcV1F5aGCkPNwxu2TRceFtfFCdIrdYDMg-H1YIHdvjnLSPO4SjbmLo10H4ZYn8tIZxGTxeTB-N5YLNPcUO_tFIG7RO_Y2pEkPAZoIIt-A5mI8qQE01js4dZDA%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=04b3e83e7b20466494e8abe02acdc9df&_e=byQ1X72FGTY-Hsm4nCg9ODfj9jjOSLnJv0r8CrILmC4NQA2RcAuKQYSnNYuEDrhN6b5Qztiqkn0S8y55JjPtjFGWEYgT9Q0GPEILVEmOU0Xtrv-hd1z2D1Qqp7IFKliIKPfaz5yy_f5xGJa7V_FxSxQ-df_MCoPbVYYNtfQXt2aBCVWj84bX-5zUOREK-_VpMQFBv3pgLBHMqK27KGfc88pLZdCm0IZ0Vjocs9Nby3jdIpacrwGGrq7vhJb8Xoef73sQN5D-ajneBeBy0pCXTvWRumWaM1FaxFGeNBdfiwMAaMOAvxRkKk8m86ZDrdZuW-1kqy79awwZI92Zesslc02T-oXPXkY5S_tMZylvVUBCIi78SIT2j6Lj5G8M81Pl0GNgMeH9THereXr80WD8ZA%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=04b3e83e7b20466494e8abe02acdc9df&_e=byQ1X72FGTY-Hsm4nCg9OLooAnprTCppdg4bt8YJ_y3LtznbQT2J6tasPMRUkSCRg-9Z8ehSurLp7cjwM3b6GvIzoN-3YQbaaRytu2wpxWS1wTw_Auwz2mvVsIxoJGfdpsv39Mjil22mkzOgwMo04ljgsX8qUXNpycPL9a9mzNxOk7ROIfUvLzgx4f4V06TN2WVTkxKRhW7IKu7bWcC69g%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click here to [Unsubscribe](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=04b3e83e7b20466494e8abe02acdc9df&_t=fOQCahEgwI3t1yy0JcGjJF9uCg2ck9hMzNsZgrwqsBiDvkq8wBX9KbWEBvVcxZiVajL-DNX_DDukv6udH6nzA1p8uMH7dVwkhMAjRjNJEIsedz4wKtbgxAiQPFtXh4d5)

[DON’T MISS THIS HISTORIC MOMENT](https://www.mahanow.org/mosaic-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mosaic_final_11_14_24_1&n=4)

Dear Peter,
**History is being made right before our eyes.**
President-elect Donald Trump has nominated Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as Secretary of Health and Human Services—a move that solidifies their shared vision to restore America’s freedoms, stop forever wars, and Make America Healthy Again.
[Now, you have the opportunity to commemorate this historic alliance in a tangible and lasting way.](https://www.mahanow.org/mosaic-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mosaic_final_11_14_24_1&n=6)
For just $47, _your photo_ will become part of a stunning mosaic capturing the iconic Kennedy-Trump handshake. This artwork will stand as a powerful symbol of unity, progress, and the movement that’s transforming our nation.
**[There are only 100 tiles left!](https://www.mahanow.org/mosaic-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mosaic_final_11_14_24_1&n=7) So don't wait to claim your place in history – **a spot in the poster of the mosaic that will proudly hang in Bobby’s office!****
[SECURE YOUR PLACE](https://www.mahanow.org/mosaic-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mosaic_final_11_14_24_1&n=8)
Thank you for being part of history. All proceeds will go to help pay down the campaign debt.
Team Kennedy

Call: [805-728-9443](tel:8057289443) and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

clean_body: Commemorate RFK Jr.’s Nomination with This Historic Mosaic! | | | | | | Final Opportunity — Claim Your Place in the Kennedy-Trump Mosaic! Dear Peter, History is being made right before our eyes. President-elect Donald Trump has nominated Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as Secretary of Health and Human Services—a move that solidifies their shared vision to restore America’s freedoms, stop forever wars, and Make America Healthy Again. For just $47, your photo will become part of a stunning mosaic capturing the iconic Kennedy-Trump handshake. This artwork will stand as a powerful symbol of unity, progress, and the movement that’s transforming our nation. So don't wait to claim your place in history – a spot in the poster of the mosaic that will proudly hang in Bobby’s office!**** Thank you for being part of history. All proceeds will go to help pay down the campaign debt. Team Kennedy | | ©2024 • • • • PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY P.O. Box 147 South Walpole, MA 02071 This communication is not authorized by any other candidate. Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Targeting my husband and President Trump
body:
Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bd7860c9b41747f5bbea613d7e452822&_e=S086piqmSePxHosQp0bv3sOceI7wcMEz5lDojJEuxGh7aT_y1JtzYuCJnR4D7Xy_v5s0eS0uP3ZgBRozmcBMIUciRNjfzfEq8dsaf91tFSdiTH9vs-Rv4nFRo22LBIPj4Uc4bhr5EtIFIeEDs7X2Tnp0-WuaTJo5yUQbKuxGvO3fmjzS14ge33ueHUWXaC1vDoDTr7N-vBZNCZMLm3lcM9n8JaOA9g9whZfwUyL5X1XxebbYd4iBIeDi2ZMS2OMp0qrwMExkWEZ2sdpes9s2QDtVOHk4sBo_sQPRAq9nuHGJZ0A5DGTJLxjhvVN3_sFBzIG2l3lKMHUH9C34To72yPrqj60hQ1wUlKDdBHDmC06fcjeLxjleO6MVfORRk7gN)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bd7860c9b41747f5bbea613d7e452822&_e=S086piqmSePxHosQp0bv3sOceI7wcMEz5lDojJEuxGh7aT_y1JtzYuCJnR4D7Xy_v5s0eS0uP3ZgBRozmcBMIUciRNjfzfEq8dsaf91tFSdiTH9vs-Rv4nFRo22LBIPj4Uc4bhr5EtIFIeEDs7X2Tnp0-WuaTJo5yUQbKuxGvO3fmjzS14ge33ueHUWXaC1vDoDTr7N-vBZNCZMLm3lcM9n8JaOA9g9whZfwUyL5X1W97nlO0_ZUppNGrZxe0q3geM_z3Ma_5gA5VvgrEaw7e3cRV2gFY5_p-9o3CezhPo-0NQXQdpii_m7Nzloh2yjI184DYS7kSnzfzdZH4U-L6JP6zTD3HN55V3XxJGhLqWnrEZsXrwPQNuAjrfXoBIzw)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bd7860c9b41747f5bbea613d7e452822&_e=S086piqmSePxHosQp0bv3sOceI7wcMEz5lDojJEuxGh7aT_y1JtzYuCJnR4D7Xy_v5s0eS0uP3ZgBRozmcBMIUciRNjfzfEq8dsaf91tFSdiTH9vs-Rv4nFRo22LBIPj4Uc4bhr5EtIFIeEDs7X2Tnp0-WuaTJo5yUQbKuxGvO3fmjzS14ge33ueHUWXaC1vDoDTr7N-vBZNCZMLm3lcM9n8JaOA9g9whZfwUyL5X1Vve3RJv-iA6kFx6eBY6le6o0hUOMXu6rrmUftuJsk5L1xUYtFsDdixJv0It4TnEg3nmNLtqNUiiTrqjO9kSNSTbsqOGWLekl91-2utcCOSvfupajqfjEVfKarrREyNOBsHiM-0Abp0W0SCchUy-IVI)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bd7860c9b41747f5bbea613d7e452822&_e=S086piqmSePxHosQp0bv3sOceI7wcMEz5lDojJEuxGh7aT_y1JtzYuCJnR4D7Xy_v5s0eS0uP3ZgBRozmcBMIUciRNjfzfEq8dsaf91tFSdiTH9vs-Rv4nFRo22LBIPj4Uc4bhr5EtIFIeEDs7X2Tnp0-WuaTJo5yUQbKuxGvO3fmjzS14ge33ueHUWXaC1vDoDTr7N-vBZNCZMLm3lcM9n8JaOA9g9whZfwUyL5X1XMtvFcnHkIhXuwajpi9tYCLo6c3oiLVo__IT-seLZIfd-W4bN_FMI0gjEQpZWa0Aorqh-GAyuFxJmZY51AnKKv0ClCNwkfeifJWQMRO_AhN59HXizEZ6y5T8DJs9wUX_3632aYuVKt_UlG6jbJbDqF)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bd7860c9b41747f5bbea613d7e452822&_e=S086piqmSePxHosQp0bv3sOceI7wcMEz5lDojJEuxGh7aT_y1JtzYuCJnR4D7Xy_v5s0eS0uP3ZgBRozmcBMIUciRNjfzfEq8dsaf91tFSdiTH9vs-Rv4nFRo22LBIPj4Uc4bhr5EtIFIeEDs7X2Tnp0-WuaTJo5yUQbKuxGvO3fmjzS14ge33ueHUWXaC1vDoDTr7N-vBZNCZMLm3lcM9n8JaOA9g9whZfwUyL5X1UMilyJobmbvzhHJg0_RK5vBCrUGAnFOPHxCd0gVlJfvxrHdBgklVasrKneLO-LWRauDwb8E95gtojz-cCTv36uEgC8tfE21y3dSuBIcG9yxltaCcuRSCnM46KHIFquVZasYXxEhCkmXx1dFHvDansH)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bd7860c9b41747f5bbea613d7e452822&_e=S086piqmSePxHosQp0bv3sOceI7wcMEz5lDojJEuxGh7aT_y1JtzYuCJnR4D7Xy_v5s0eS0uP3ZgBRozmcBMIUciRNjfzfEq8dsaf91tFSdiTH9vs-Rv4nFRo22LBIPj4Uc4bhr5EtIFIeEDs7X2Tnp0-WuaTJo5yUQbKuxGvO3fmjzS14ge33ueHUWXaC1vDoDTr7N-vBZNCZMLm3lcM9n8JaOA9g9whZfwUyL5X1UxsKoZ3ZzfZI8okwYe6fjnvjtAgkf-qZY_wWoy5EAQZkXdms08EECjh9GERYWXv9ZnoHc_mfQhIQRhWW2xnfAcz8e1KDPTgPX5gzdKUDN2tvWMMOH7w-WrchEQ7CdyBspfzV3iACemEkmSlKEa4FGe)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bd7860c9b41747f5bbea613d7e452822&_e=S086piqmSePxHosQp0bv3sOceI7wcMEz5lDojJEuxGh7aT_y1JtzYuCJnR4D7Xy_v5s0eS0uP3ZgBRozmcBMIUciRNjfzfEq8dsaf91tFSdiTH9vs-Rv4nFRo22LBIPj4Uc4bhr5EtIFIeEDs7X2Tnp0-WuaTJo5yUQbKuxGvO3fmjzS14ge33ueHUWXaC1vDoDTr7N-vBZNCZMLm3lcM9n8JaOA9g9whZfwUyL5X1VbBgRLoaVD0MdAbyRpXWIBnGWHeDQjDt2Jlvghfl6nGXmvThr1ec5CpymJ65QBXpAo-ioZqTDXBsRzYobZI-IFMaryP0itjurW_pf6uy9Bi8Z9KVXE_97lvXjBNHppriPQi2knQN-XImkXvtxx5Nee)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

clean_body: Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Dear Fellow Patriot, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! subject: we know what it takes

Alongside our alums, we will continue to fight for the rights of every American. Progress is not always easy, but at Emerge, we know what it takes: training to win.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97294169/512941581/-247203143?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2024-11-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmNGRjNWJmLTA2YTYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FgI8__5ll0msqBOySezWb2FyI791-2G7AQ08bLkhIO0=)

| Peter,

Emerge alums are on the frontlines of Congress and state and local governments, ready to act as a firewall to protect our most critical freedoms.

The result of this election doesn’t change Emerge’s work. Alongside our alums, we will continue to fight for the rights of every American. Progress is not always easy, but at Emerge, we know what it takes: _training to win._

[_**_But this work wouldn’t be possible without your support._ A generous donor offered to _MATCH_ contributions – dollar for dollar – up to $50,000 through the end of the year! Will you contribute $25 (becomes $50) or more today to show your support for Emerge as we ramp up efforts to train the next generation of Democratic women?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97294170/512941582/-247203143?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2024-11-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmNGRjNWJmLTA2YTYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FgI8__5ll0msqBOySezWb2FyI791-2G7AQ08bLkhIO0=)

Emerge, which came out of Harris’ bid for district attorney in the early 2000s, had _**more than 550 alums**_ on the ballot, and around _**70%**_ of them have won their races so far with more expected to join them. This includes the 13 alums that will be part of the Emerge Congressional Caucus, as well as women elected to state legislatures, mayor’s offices, school boards, and more critical state and local elected offices.

name: Michelle Steel [iPhone]
subject: We're not in the clear yet, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Sorry to reach out like this...

| |
---
| | | Peter, Election Day may be in the books, _but my race isn 't done yet._

_**[I'm neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=ab3fd832f4a04b2fad1f6c270ee2f7fb&_e=lY5pQMW8cZPLfENIdS3Rb_PbkR9xTbiUIoVgo6VrV1Q0Jc3cWUDEMsbQ4ENfpHl4mvOF8LtQZQFVhfKbLsfAktMcTCTv7RcLRmpWgJiW0mBYdwmikzfZzjD5dqSR-OiBCSScngKa24zro8X2gXTPTj6c7gePzG68nYcv4gTxHrjDELf6oQQJEq3uMTlQ_QCr7ZY2MGoN9cbEQYq9wiJKlRZ0CihuVWpO48EGurfQ7EYKWLs5OS9JMQqTjhrWZa0_dzIMf87zYFYcjbp46sYl4HFvk7Up6aULFb75hrE8IssiR45KUj_o9MUb6exuNvrze2rZYmzlD_SL3Md_ctbbApRFmJ7FEXD_g1uWhoAlMLU-pAS1RUP-eYTUWD9bZzNtMWoAVnAyQUAC2_1ox34NmUeN5Bs7ayiB5nIeMBtdOAugVDI8LQYjKVstgsHZd3uy1mySSztoE8UB9sdkbpv5FA%3D%3D "I’m neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.")**_

If we're going to pull this out and keep my seat, then I'm going to need all hands on deck.

I spent every dime I had just to get through Election Day, and now I'm running on fumes. I NEED your urgent support to help me keep this fight going before the ballots are all counted.

_**[Please, can I count on you, Peter?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=ab3fd832f4a04b2fad1f6c270ee2f7fb&_e=lY5pQMW8cZPLfENIdS3Rb_PbkR9xTbiUIoVgo6VrV1Q0Jc3cWUDEMsbQ4ENfpHl4mvOF8LtQZQFVhfKbLsfAktMcTCTv7RcLRmpWgJiW0mBYdwmikzfZzjD5dqSR-OiBCSScngKa24zro8X2gXTPTj6c7gePzG68nYcv4gTxHrjDELf6oQQJEq3uMTlQ_QCr7ZY2MGoN9cbEQYq9wiJKlRZ0CihuVWpO48EGurfQ7EYKWLs5OS9JMQqTjhrWZa0_dzIMf87zYFYcjbp46sYl4HFvk7Up6aULFb75hrE8IstwuwY4lmWSh_Xb7xdDREWD4hUYrz0IWB2M7nzfPDRCny4tVpKXH9aSfMfvMh1HU49GwRn9C-HVUVhiEN07_M8LE2y1AnTptwEk4EIl3aXIiNOEnSCCjR4LdQ6Q5lV9hi4efXH5J2_PB5Ve8tIKUHaQTDcGoXO4zSaHlj3PedwGXg%3D%3D "Please, can I count on you, Friend?")**_

Thank you,

Michelle Steel

**TIM WALZ TOLD YOU** the Electoral College “needs to go”!

**PETE BUTTIGIEG TOLD YOU** “America would be better off if we got rid of the Electoral College.”

**But you STILL haven’t signed our emergency petition to abolish the Electoral College?!**

subject: re: Barack Obama’s message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by HMP, # [#]
body:
Click here to unsubscribe. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4xBla9HqS06_watf7h3QaQ2?source=header_rfe]
We need you to hear this.

Barack Obama just broke his silence about this election – and called us all to action!

Barack Obama: We need to "keep building a country that is more fair and more just" [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/91305/images/Obama%20post%20ed%20quote.png]

As usual, Barack is so right.

If we want ANY chance of keeping the Republican Majority as tiny as possible, we need to win every last House race that’s still up for grabs. Please, we don’t have a second to waste. Will you rush a 900% MATCHED $15 to help Democrats build an unbeatable war chest? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-match-2024-post-ed?amount=15]

900% MATCH EXTENDED FOR:
dpwillis67@gmail.com [#]
DEADLINE: 11:59PM
SUGGESTED SUPPORT: $15 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-match-2024-post-ed?amount=15]

We won’t sugarcoat it.

We’re devastated about this election.

And we’re sure you are too.

But some House races are still up for grabs.

And if Democrats step up, we can ensure our Democrats count every last vote.

That’s why we’re asking you to step up now, rather than later. We know you’re still processing this election. But if we’re serious about keeping Trump’s House Majority as TINY as possible... We can’t waste a single second. Please, will you rush a 900% MATCHED $15? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-match-2024-post-ed?amount=15]
